services.shortDescription: This product targets scientific, administrative, and research competencies who have distinguished capabilities and experiences that can contribute to strengthening local capabilities and exchanging experiences.  As the Kingdom seeks to embrace the best minds from all over the world to reside and work to promote development, creativity, and investment in human resources, the product works to support the stability of beneficiary residents in Saudi society.

serviceConditions: The applicant must obtain a bachelor’s degree as a minimum from a university accredited by the Ministry of Education. If the university is not listed among the universities accredited by the Ministry of Education on the Safeer portal, the academic certificate must be authenticated by any of the Saudi cultural attachés.
The applicant must have concluded an employment contract with one of the centers accredited by the centre.
The employment contract concluded must be in a priority field and for a highly skilled profession
The applicant must have completed the probation period - if any - at the employer

Passing the minimum points system.
The transaction period in the system is 3 months, which can be increased according to each transaction.
All residencies and passports must be valid for 6 months at the time of application.
An employment contract in the specified entities with a priority specialization.
Submit 3 research papers in a related field.

services.shortDescription: This product targets investors wishing to invest in economic activities in Saudi Arabia.  The Kingdom is the largest market in the region thanks to its strong economy and large population base. The product works to support investors' stability and enable their businesses to achieve ambitious positive results.

services.name: Submit a request to authenticate a document
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to authenticate letters and documents

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of submitting a document authentication request is an official service provided by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows individuals or institutions to submit an electronic request to authenticate the authenticity of documents and papers issued or related to media activities or businesses subject to the authority’s supervision. Certification aims to give documents an official and legal character, ensuring their reliability before government and private agencies, and granting legal security in commercial or media transactions.

Submitting a request for certification requires filling out electronic forms through the government “Etalam” platform or the relevant official platforms, attaching a clear copy of the original document to be certified, and submitting the applicant’s data, whether an individual or a legal entity, via the national ID, commercial registry, and national address. The service may include documents such as media work contracts, distribution certificates, intellectual rights statements, legal declarations, or certificates related to media and artistic production.

After submitting the application and examining the documents and information, the Authority officially issues the certification decision via an electronic message or an electronically stamped and numbered document that can be submitted to the relevant authorities. Processing usually takes one to three business days, with the ability to monitor the status of the application electronically until certification is completed.

The importance of submitting a document authentication request service

Ensuring official acceptance of media documents by all governmental and private agencies.
Protecting the rights of individuals and institutions in contracts, intellectual property, and media records.
Enhancing transparency and confidence in transactions related to media and licensed activities.
Supporting the credibility of documents when used internationally or in legal disputes.
Facilitating administrative processes and accelerating the completion of procedures in government agencies or in employment contracts in the media sector.

Difficulties and challenges related to submitting a request to authenticate a document

The need to provide clear and complete copies of documents and the absence of any deficiencies or unapproved modifications.
Commitment to entering all data and attachments correctly to avoid rejection of the application or delay in processing it.
Commitment to pay the required fees and update the applicant’s statutory data.
Facing some procedural complications if the documents are issued by third parties or relate to special, uncommon circumstances.
It is necessary to continuously monitor the status of the application and respond to any inquiry from the Authority to ensure that implementation is completed on time.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the document to be certified or the form of the letter to be certified.
serviceConditions: The fee is 35 riyals per page.

Ensuring official acceptance of media documents by all governmental and private agencies.
Protecting the rights of individuals and institutions in contracts, intellectual property, and media records.
Enhancing transparency and confidence in transactions related to media and licensed activities.
Supporting the credibility of documents when used internationally or in legal disputes.
Facilitating administrative processes and accelerating the completion of procedures in government agencies or in employment contracts in the media sector.

Difficulties and challenges related to submitting a request to authenticate a document

The need to provide clear and complete copies of documents and the absence of any deficiencies or unapproved modifications.
Commitment to entering all data and attachments correctly to avoid rejection of the application or delay in processing it.
Commitment to pay the required fees and update the applicant’s statutory data.
Facing some procedural complications if the documents are issued by third parties or relate to special, uncommon circumstances.
It is necessary to continuously monitor the status of the application and respond to any inquiry from the Authority to ensure that implementation is completed on time.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the document to be certified or the form of the letter to be certified.
serviceConditions: The fee is 35 riyals per page.

services.name: Submit a request to authenticate a document
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to authenticate letters and documents

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of submitting a document authentication request is an official service provided by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows individuals or institutions to submit an electronic request to authenticate the authenticity of documents and papers issued or related to media activities or businesses subject to the authority’s supervision. Certification aims to give documents an official and legal character, ensuring their reliability before government and private agencies, and granting legal security in commercial or media transactions.

Submitting a request for certification requires filling out electronic forms through the government “Etalam” platform or the relevant official platforms, attaching a clear copy of the original document to be certified, and submitting the applicant’s data, whether an individual or a legal entity, via the national ID, commercial registry, and national address. The service may include documents such as media work contracts, distribution certificates, intellectual rights statements, legal declarations, or certificates related to media and artistic production.

After submitting the application and examining the documents and information, the Authority officially issues the certification decision via an electronic message or an electronically stamped and numbered document that can be submitted to the relevant authorities. Processing usually takes one to three business days, with the ability to monitor the status of the application electronically until certification is completed.

The importance of submitting a document authentication request service

Ensuring official acceptance of media documents by all governmental and private agencies.
Protecting the rights of individuals and institutions in contracts, intellectual property, and media records.
Enhancing transparency and confidence in transactions related to media and licensed activities.
Supporting the credibility of documents when used internationally or in legal disputes.
Facilitating administrative processes and accelerating the completion of procedures in government agencies or in employment contracts in the media sector.

Difficulties and challenges related to submitting a request to authenticate a document

The need to provide clear and complete copies of documents and the absence of any deficiencies or unapproved modifications.
Commitment to entering all data and attachments correctly to avoid rejection of the application or delay in processing it.
Commitment to pay the required fees and update the applicant’s statutory data.
Facing some procedural complications if the documents are issued by third parties or relate to special, uncommon circumstances.
It is necessary to continuously monitor the status of the application and respond to any inquiry from the Authority to ensure that implementation is completed on time.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the document to be certified or the form of the letter to be certified.
serviceConditions: The fee is 35 riyals per page.

services.name: Create an account
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the establishment owner to create an account in the Chamber of Commerce

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of creating an account in the Federation of Saudi Chambers of Commerce is an official service provided by the electronic platform of the Federation of Saudi Chambers. It allows individuals, establishments, and businessmen to register a special account that enables them to benefit from the multiple services provided by the Federation, such as issuing and renewing membership in chambers of commerce, managing company records, submitting commercial applications, and obtaining electronic affiliation certificates, in addition to facilitating communication with various chambers and integration with government agencies.

Creating an account requires filling out the user’s personal data or business data, such as the national ID number or commercial registration number, email, mobile number, and confirming the national address. In the case of institutions or companies, a copy of the commercial register and the information of the establishment’s representative must be attached.

After entering and verifying the data, the user obtains a user name and password that allows him to enter the platform and benefit from all electronic services. He is required to adhere to the policies and terms of use of the platform, and to update the data directly upon any legal or administrative change.

The account includes the ability to track membership and pay fees electronically, request the attestation of commercial documents, apply for certificate issuance services, and inquire about the transactions of the Chamber or government agencies. The account also facilitates the management of services remotely and provides technical support and guidance to beneficiaries.

The importance of creating an account with the Federation of Chambers of Commerce

Facilitating access to commercial and administrative services electronically without the need to visit the rooms in person.
Enhancing the reliability of doing business and ensuring that business information is documented legally and in an organized manner.
Enabling individuals and companies to manage membership and business transactions in a fast and secure manner.
Supporting digital transformation in the commercial sector and integrating data with government agencies.
Providing authentication services and electronic certificates to facilitate commercial and economic procedures.

Difficulties and challenges related to creating an account

It is necessary to provide complete and correct data and follow the steps carefully to ensure account acceptance.
Compliance with regulatory requirements such as commercial registration and national identity validity.
Facing some difficulties in linking accounts with various chambers of commerce or with government platforms.
Continuously updating the data when the establishment’s representatives or commercial registry details change.
Dealing with technical protection and passwords to avoid security issues and unauthorized access.
requiredDocuments: National address.
ID photo.

services.name: Negotiation services
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to add a delegate

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Authorization services are a group of electronic services provided by government systems or private sector institutions in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which enable individuals or establishments to grant powers to some individuals, employees, or agents to carry out specific tasks, sign, or represent the entity in administrative, commercial, or governmental transactions. Authorizations are widely used to facilitate commercial and procedural work, such as authorizing a representative to complete procedures in chambers of commerce, authorizing an employee to complete a customs process, or granting an agent the right to sign contracts or receive shipments.

Most authorization services require prior registration on the relevant service platform (such as the platform of the Federation of Chambers, the Ministry of Commerce, Customs, or others), and submitting the data of the person or entity authorized, along with attaching the necessary documents, such as the national ID, commercial registry number, and contact information. The identity of the delegate and the validity of the authorization data are often verified digitally or on paper, with the requirement that the authorizations be limited to a specific period of time and clear powers.

After the authorization is approved, the authorized person can access the systems or complete the required procedure on his own account, and the original party has the ability to supervise, withdraw or amend the authorization at any time electronically.

Types of authorizations include: delegation of powers to delegates, customs authorization, bank authorizations, and receipt and delivery authorizations, in addition to administrative authorizations such as authorization for Hajj, Umrah, and municipal services.

The importance of authorization services

Facilitating the completion of government and commercial transactions without the need for the original party to be present for each procedure.
Reducing administrative complications and increasing the speed and efficiency of completing procedures.
Supporting flexibility in business management and commercial operations, especially for large or multi-branch establishments.
Protecting rights by documenting the powers of delegates and agents and determining the duration and scope.
Contributing to digital transformation and making government and commercial services available remotely safely and transparently.

Difficulties and challenges related to authorization services

The data of the delegate and his delegate must be correct and constantly updated to avoid rejection of the procedures.
Commitment to accurately document and define powers to avoid abuse of authorization.
Difficulty withdrawing or terminating some authorizations when not updating or losing the original account powers.
Experiencing technical malfunctions in electronic systems, which may delay implementation or supervision processes.
It is necessary to adhere to the legal and regulatory requirements of each entity in drafting the text of the authorization and the validity period.
requiredDocuments: Type of authorization, job title and powers.
A copy of the commercial register.
National address.
Data required for the account holder and the delegate: (email address - Absher mobile number - national ID or resident ID if the facility owner is a resident).

services.name: Submit a request to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the employer to certify services at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of documenting some transactions and services at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is an official electronic service provided by the Saudi Ministry of Foreign Affairs to individuals, institutions and companies through its digital platforms. It enables beneficiaries to submit various requests such as issuing or extending tourist and business visas, authenticating official documents, requests for consular support, or inquiring and following up on government requests related to international relations and diplomatic dealings.

To submit the application, you must create an account on the Ministry of Foreign Affairs platform or log in using the unified national sign-on, then fill out the electronic form appropriate for the type of service required (visa, authentication, support, inquiry), and attach official documents such as the national ID or residency number, passport, documents to be authenticated, or documents supporting the application (official letters of invitation, employment contracts, letters from government agencies).

After completing the electronic form and paying the fees, the application is submitted and the beneficiary receives a follow-up number through which he can monitor the status of the application and respond to any inquiries or comments from Ministry of Foreign Affairs employees. Most requests are completed within a period ranging from two to ten working days, depending on the type of service and the extent to which the request meets the conditions.

Services include government visa applications, authentication of documents and contracts, requests for assistance in emergency cases outside the Kingdom, inquiries about consular services, and requests for quick communication with Saudi embassies and attachés abroad.

The importance of submitting an application to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Facilitating consular and diplomatic procedures for citizens, residents and companies.
Ensuring that requests are completed in a legal and documented manner in accordance with the rules and regulations of the Kingdom and international relations.
Protecting the personal and legal rights of beneficiaries in their external dealings.
Supporting rapid communication with the government and external representations to resolve crises and facilitate business.
Enhancing the Kingdom’s reputation in providing professional and advanced electronic external services.

Difficulties and challenges related to submitting the application

All data and attachments must be completed correctly to avoid rejection or delay of the application.
Follow up on the status of the application, respond to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs’ comments, and verify that the required documents are updated.
Commitment to pay fees that vary according to the type of request and service requested.
Facing some delays in completion time, especially in cases of urgent or complex requests.
The need to review details for each service to ensure accurate implementation and compliance with diplomatic and consular regulations.
requiredDocuments: The application number for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs to be authenticated.

services.name: Issuing an employment contract for a visa
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the service owner to issue an employment contract for a recruitment visa

serviceDetails.serviceDescription: A service that enables the service owner to issue an employment contract for a recruitment visa.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the visa, the worker’s passport, and the duration of the contract.
A copy of the commercial register.
National address.
ID photo.

services.name: Request to update facility data
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the employer to update establishment data.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The facility data update request service is an official electronic service provided by the platforms of government agencies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, such as the Ministry of Commerce, the Ministry of Human Resources, the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority, and the Federation of Chambers of Commerce. The service aims to enable establishments (institutions or companies) to modify or update their main data, such as the national address, contact numbers, email, name of the company manager or owner, or commercial registration and licensing data, in order to ensure the accuracy of the information and its integration with the databases of the relevant government agencies.

To benefit from the service, you must enter the relevant authority’s portal (such as the Ministry of E-Commerce portal or the Federation of Chambers of Commerce platform), choose the facility data update service, then fill out the designated electronic form with the information required to be amended, and attach official documents proving the new data such as the national address certificate, an updated copy of the commercial registry, or official letters with the new names.
After submission, the application is reviewed by specialists and the authenticity of the documents is verified. If approved, the data is officially updated within all of the entity’s systems, and you receive an electronic notification of the completion of the process.
Establishments are advised to follow up on any legislative or regulatory update that requires amending data periodically, to ensure that government records remain accurate and to avoid violations or disruption of procedures.

The importance of facility data updating service

Maintaining the accuracy and reliability of establishment data at all government agencies.
Facilitating government approval procedures and renewing commercial licenses without delay or complexity.
Supporting continuity of communication between government agencies and the facility and rapid response to official letters or reports.
Enhancing confidence in the facility’s commercial and financial transactions before partners and customers.
Preventing the establishment from being subjected to penalties or suspension due to failure to update data or the presence of incorrect outdated information.
Difficulties and challenges related to the data update service
The facility’s commitment to update all data in a timely manner on all relevant government agency platforms.
It is necessary to attach updated and correct official documents to complete the update request without rejection or delay.
Facing some technical problems in electronic platforms or delays in reviewing applications from specialists.
The facility is forced to update its data in several agencies at the same time to avoid discrepancies in information between government agencies.
The importance of constantly reviewing legislation to ensure that data updates match any new regulatory changes.
requiredDocuments: National address.
A copy of the commercial register.
A copy of the insurance certificate.
A copy of the articles of incorporation.
A copy of the investment license.
Required data: (email - Absher mobile number - national ID or resident ID if the facility owner is a resident).

services.name: Renewing the Chamber of Commerce subscription
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the establishment owner to renew the Chamber of Commerce subscription

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Chamber of Commerce subscription renewal service is an electronic service provided by the Federation of Chambers of Commerce platform in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows members of the Chambers of Commerce to renew their subscriptions easily and quickly via the Internet before the end of the current subscription period. The service guarantees the continuation of membership and the rights resulting from issuing certificates, permits, administrative and commercial support, and facilitating business operations for all members.

To renew, the member or establishment must log into its electronic account on the Federation of Chambers platform, select the subscription renewal service, then fill in the required data such as the commercial registration number, subscription expiration date, and confirm the financial and administrative data. In addition, the prescribed fees may be required to be paid via available electronic payment systems, with the possibility of submitting supporting documents such as a copy of the commercial registry, the previous subscription certificate or any additional relevant documents.

The request is processed within a period ranging from one to three business days, and you will receive a notification confirming the renewal, which ensures the continuity of membership without interruptions and enhances confidence in the registration processes and accompanying services.

The importance of renewing the Chamber of Commerce subscription

Ensuring continued membership and the company or institution’s benefit from all administrative and commercial chamber services.
Extending the rights of official transactions, permits and certificates issued by the Chamber.
Maintaining the validity of licenses and registered commercial activities.
Supporting the organization’s reputation in the local market with its commitment to regulation and transparency.
Strengthening the relationship with government agencies and supporting the administrative and operational development process of the institution.

Difficulties and challenges related to subscription renewal

It is necessary to submit data and documents correctly and completely to avoid rejection or delay of the application.
Managing the payment process through complex electronic systems may raise some technical challenges.
Update data periodically to keep pace with legal and regulatory changes.
Commitment to the specified dates to avoid interruption of services or cessation of membership.
Dealing with inconsistencies between old and new records data, or complexity of procedures in large organizations.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
National address.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: There must be one month remaining until the subscription expires, or the subscription must have expired for renewal.
Government fees are determined by the system according to the facility’s activity.

services.name: Print the subscription certificate
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the establishment owner to print the Chamber of Commerce certificate electronically

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The subscription certificate printing service is an official electronic service provided by the Chamber of Commerce or the Federation of Chambers of Commerce in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows members to obtain an official subscription certificate proving the registration of the establishment or company as a member of the Chamber of Commerce. The subscription certificate is an official document that reflects membership status, and is used in many legal and commercial transactions such as tenders, government contracts, proof of commercial identity, and as evidence of commitment to organizing and updating membership.

To obtain a subscription certificate, the member must have a valid subscription, and log into the membership account through the Union of Chambers website, where you can choose to request to print the certificate electronically. It is required to prove payment of the required fees to the Chamber, and to update the facility or company data to ensure the accuracy and completeness of the information before issuing the certificate. After submitting the application, the certificate is issued in electronic or paper form as requested by the member, and is sent via email or can be printed directly from the platform.

The certificate is characterized by the fact that it bears the chamber’s seal, membership number, and date of issuance, which ensures its credibility. The service is characterized by the ease and speed of obtaining the certificate without the need for a field visit, which saves time and effort for members and enhances the transparency of membership data.

The importance of the subscription certificate printing service

Official proof of the establishment’s membership in the Chamber of Commerce, and enhancing its legal and commercial status.
The certification is necessary to obtain government permits and participate in tenders and commercial events.
Facilitating procedures for dealing with government and private agencies through approved official documents.
Improve trust with partners and customers by having clear and quick documentation of membership status.
Supporting digital transformation in commercial services and raising the level of transparency and modern management.

Difficulties and challenges related to the subscription certificate printing service

It is necessary to update the member’s data to ensure that a correct certificate is issued without delay.
Technical challenges some users may face in accessing the platform or downloading the certificate.
Commitment to pay the required fees, which may affect the possibility of issuing the certificate to the non-compliant member.
Some members need multiple certificates or additional documents that may require additional procedures.
Follow up on periodic subscription renewal to ensure the continuity of the certificate’s validity and that accompanying services are not disrupted.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: The commercial register must be valid.

services.name: Create and authenticate a salary introduction letter
services.shortDescription: We provide the service of creating a salary introduction letter for the employee and having it authenticated by the Chamber of Commerce

serviceDetails.serviceDescription: We provide the service of creating a salary introduction letter for the employee and having it authenticated by the Chamber of Commerce.
requiredDocuments: After submitting the application to the competent government department within 1 working day for approval.
serviceConditions: After submitting the application to the competent government department within 1 working day for approval.

services.name: Financial portfolio services
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the establishment owner to add credit to benefit from the Chamber of Commerce’s services

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The financial wallet service is an integrated electronic service provided by many economic and commercial entities in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, aiming to provide a safe and effective digital means for preserving, managing, and organizing funds and financial transactions for users, whether individuals or companies. The financial wallet acts as a digital account through which one can receive money, pay bills, transfer money between accounts, purchase services and products, and manage budgets with ease and speed through smartphones or computers.

When creating a financial wallet, the user records personal or facility data accurately through the service platform, and links the wallet to bank accounts, mada cards, or credit cards to facilitate financial operations. In addition, the service includes strict security controls such as two-factor verification, encryption, and compliance procedures with national and international banking standards to prevent fraud and ensure confidentiality. Financial wallets are widely used in electronic commercial transactions, and contribute to enhancing financial inclusion in the national economy.

Some wallets provide the ability to add details of multiple accounts and control usage licenses, as well as issue periodic financial reports to review financial performance and deposit and withdrawal operations. The duration of use of the wallet is open according to the user’s need, with the ability to update information and change settings easily through the service platform.

The importance of the financial portfolio service

Facilitating money management and financial transactions in one place without the need to visit bank branches.
Increase the speed of financial transfers and pay bills instantly and securely.
Supporting the pace of financial inclusion by enabling non-users of banking services to access integrated digital solutions.
Providing accurate financial monitoring tools such as spending reports and multiple accounts, which enhances personal and business financial planning.
Improving the user experience and providing flexible options for electronic payment in e-commerce and government services.

Difficulties and challenges related to the financial portfolio service

It is necessary to adhere to advanced security procedures and maintain the confidentiality of information to prevent hacking.
Dealing with potential technical problems such as service interruptions or difficulties in connecting with banking systems.
Challenges of updating data and managing the permissions of users or owners in the case of multiple wallets.
It is necessary to provide continuous technical support to help users and solve technical problems quickly.
Facing some regulatory challenges related to compliance with financial standards and local and international laws.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
National address.
Required data: (email - Absher mobile number - national ID or resident ID if the facility owner is a resident).
serviceConditions: The balance must be filled according to the customer’s capabilities and according to the room of the customer’s facility.

services.name: Password recovery
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to recover the password

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The password recovery service is an electronic service provided by most government and private digital platforms in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows users to recover or reset the password for their accounts in the event that they forget or lose it. The service aims to enable users to regain access to their accounts safely and easily while reducing security risks related to hacking or misuse.

When using the password recovery service, the user usually clicks on the “Forgot Password” option on the login page, and then enters the email or mobile phone number associated with the account. There are several ways to verify a user's identity, such as sending a temporary verification code (OTP) to an email or phone number, answering security questions, or using the national single sign-on system. After verification, the user is allowed to set a new password.

The service is characterized by speed and privacy, while using advanced encryption and authentication technologies to ensure data protection. Some systems also provide the possibility of updating the contacts associated with the account to increase the security of the password recovery process in the future.

The importance of password recovery service

Ensuring that users continue to have access to their accounts and do not lose important data.
Reducing the need for direct contact with technical support to save time and effort.
Protect accounts from unauthorized access through multiple verification steps.
Enhancing confidence in using electronic services provided through governments and private platforms.
Supporting the stability of the electronic system for digital and information services.

Difficulties and challenges related to the password recovery service

It is necessary to update the contact information associated with the account to activate the recovery service.
Potential for phishing attempts if verification plans are not stringent.
Experiencing technical problems that may lead to a system crash or failure to receive verification codes.
The need for awareness and training on using the service in safe and effective ways.
Dealing with users who may forget answers to security questions or lose access to means of verification.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
National address.

services.name: Request to add a new facility
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to add a new facility

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of requesting to add a new establishment is an electronic service provided through the platforms of Saudi government agencies such as the Ministry of Commerce, the Ministry of Human Resources, and the Federation of Chambers of Commerce, as it allows individuals and establishments to officially register new establishments and add them to the records of the competent authorities. This service enables business owners to register their new establishments legally and officially, which qualifies them to practice commercial, industrial or professional activity within the regulatory frameworks approved in the Kingdom.

The application is submitted through the relevant electronic platform after creating the user account, and the establishment addition form is filled out by entering the basic establishment data such as trade name, activity, commercial registration number, and national address. The application is accompanied by official documents such as a copy of the commercial registry, the national ID or residence card of the legal representative, and any other licenses or approvals that may be required depending on the type of activity.
After submitting and reviewing the data, the competent authority examines the application and enters the new establishment in its records. The system sends a notification to the applicant of the result of the application, whether approval or rejection, with an explanation of the reasons in the event of rejection.

This service is a starting point for activating and renewing all commercial services such as licenses and permits. It also facilitates the facility’s connection with other government agencies and enables it to access support programs and facilities available for business.

The importance of the service of requesting the addition of a new facility

Providing an official legal registration for establishments, which ensures that they carry out the activity within regulatory frameworks.
Enabling establishments to benefit from all government and private services related to commercial activity.
Supporting business growth by linking it to a unified database that facilitates all administrative and financial procedures.
Promoting transparency and reducing the risks of evasion or irregular action.
Reducing the burden of paper reviews by providing easy and quick electronic procedures.

Difficulties and challenges related to servicing the request to add a new facility

The accuracy and validity of the information provided must be accurate and correct, and all required documents must be attached without deficiency.
Dealing with delays in reviewing data and examining the application due to appointment pressure or lack of qualifications.
The need to comply with legal and regulatory requirements specific to each business.
Difficulty in coordination between multiple government agencies in the event of overlapping licensing requirements.
It is necessary to update facility data periodically to ensure continued legal enablement of services.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
Attach a file containing proof of employment and its number.
Attach a copy of the commercial license and investment license.
serviceConditions: The commercial register must be valid.

services.name: Delisting an establishment
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to write off the facility.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The establishment cancellation service is an electronic service available through the platforms of government agencies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, such as the Ministry of Commerce or the Ministry of Human Resources, and allows commercial establishments, companies or government institutions to request deletion or cancellation of the establishment’s registration from official records in a legal and official manner. This service is used when an establishment wishes to cease activity, correct its legal status, or close the commercial registry permanently.

To submit a request for delisting, the legal representative or practitioner of the activity must log in to the relevant platform, fill out the application form, and submit the required official documents, such as a copy of the commercial register, the license to practice the activity, and proof that the facility is free of any financial or legal obligations. A fee may be required, which may vary depending on the type of activity or registration entity. After completing the application, the data is reviewed, and if it conforms to the conditions, an electronic deletion decision is issued and kept in the name of the establishment as an official procedure that allows the termination of all transactions related to it.

This service ensures the disposal of the legal status of any facility in an official and reliable manner, helps protect the economic and legal system from ineffective or suspended activities, and helps the competent authorities to follow up the system and regulate the market more efficiently.

The importance of facility write-off service

Filtering commercial records and updating official data periodically and reliably.
Enabling establishments to close their activities legally and transparently.
Reducing the financial or legal risks associated with incorrect management of closed facilities.
Supporting control procedures and combating tax evasion or unlicensed activity.
Improving the business environment and enhancing transparency and market flow.

Difficulties and challenges related to the establishment write-off service

It is necessary to verify the validity and accuracy of all documents submitted before approving the application.
Facing complications in the procedures for closing the facility if it is suspended or has debts or financial obligations.
Possible delay in reviewing applications or objections from concerned authorities.
The need for continuous follow-up to ensure that data is updated and that there are no outdated records that affect the process.
Dealing with cases of fraud or illegal use of closed facilities.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.

services.name: Create a family recruitment request
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to authenticate family recruitment applications

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The facility owner attestation service for the family recruitment request is an electronic service provided by the competent government agencies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, such as the Ministry of Interior and the “Absher” platform, which allows the facility owner or sponsor to officially approve the request to bring in family members who wish to join the resident within the Kingdom. The service aims to document the sponsor’s official approval of the family recruitment request, which ensures compliance with the regulations and laws regulating immigration and residency.

The certification process includes logging into the Absher platform or the relevant government platform, then reviewing the submitted recruitment application, and judging it by approval or rejection after ensuring that the data provided is correct and the recruitment conditions are met. The facility owner is required to provide his personal data, residence number, and commercial registration number (if he is a sponsor of a company), while verifying that there are no violations committed by the recruiter or sponsor to ensure that the procedures proceed legally. An electronic notification is issued confirming the implementation of the certification, and it is possible to follow up on the status of the application and its processing until it is completed.

The certification process is an essential step in securing the rights of the employer and the recruiter alike. It also contributes to organizing the recruitment movement and reducing cases of irregular or fraudulent recruitment.

The importance of the establishment owner’s authentication service for the family recruitment application

Ensuring that the facility owner adheres to the laws and conditions regulating family recruitment.
Facilitating procedures and making them official and documented, which speeds up the issuance of visas and the procedures associated with them.
Providing legal protection for the sponsoring party and the recruiter from any violations or legal ambiguities.
Supporting the stability of the relationship between employers and residents and strengthening order in the labor market.
Reducing risks related to unauthorized recruitment and ensuring that people are transferred in a legal manner.

Difficulties and challenges related to the facility owner’s authentication service for the family recruitment application

The accuracy and validity of the data provided by the facility owner is necessary to avoid rejection or delay of the application.
Updating information that may change over time, such as commercial registry data or residence number.
Dealing with security inspection and periodic reviews by the competent authorities, which may take time.
The possibility of facing rejection of the application due to violations committed by the facility owner or the recruiter.
The need to closely monitor the status of the request and respond quickly to any additional requirements.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the visa and the visa application number.
A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: Having a recruitment visa.

categoryName: General Organization for Social Insurance - Business

services.name: Issuing a zakat and income certificate - business
services.shortDescription: This service allows issuing a certificate to be submitted to the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Zakat and Income Certificate Issuance Service - Aamal is an electronic service provided by the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia through the “Zakatati” platform and the “Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority” platform. It is considered one of the most important services that enable commercial establishments and companies to prove their commitment to paying the zakat and taxes legally due on them. This certificate allows the establishment to carry out its official business with government and private agencies, participate in tenders and contracts, and activate or renew commercial licenses.

To obtain a zakat and income certificate, the establishment must first be registered in the Authority’s system and accurately update its financial data, then log into the establishment’s official account and choose the service for issuing a zakat and income certificate. The system verifies the payment of all financial obligations, whether they are zakat, income taxes, or value-added taxes, and the establishment must settle any late amounts before submitting. After completing the payment and review procedures, the system issues the certificate electronically in a digital format signed and approved by the Authority, which can be printed or shared electronically when needed.

The validity period of the certificate is usually one year from the date of issuance, and it can be automatically renewed upon continued financial commitment to pay the required dues. This certificate is considered one of the most important regulatory documents to link the establishment to the official financial systems and ensure the transparency of its commercial and tax dealings.

The importance of the service of issuing a zakat and income certificate - Business

It represents official proof of the establishment’s compliance with the zakat and tax system in force in the Kingdom.
It is a prerequisite for participating in government tenders and major commercial contracts.
It contributes to enhancing the facility’s reputation and the confidence of local and international partners and investors.
Enables the facility to benefit from other government services such as renewals and permits.
It supports financial transparency and motivates institutions to adhere to regulatory responsibilities.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service of issuing a zakat and income certificate

It is necessary to update financial statements periodically and submit returns with high accuracy.
The possibility of delaying the issuance of the certificate in the event of unpaid obligations or incomplete data.
The complexity of the procedures for settling some receivables due to the different nature of commercial activities.
The service requires good knowledge of the Authority’s electronic systems and procedures.
The need for periodic follow-up to renew the certificate on time to avoid interruption of related services.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: There are no amounts, violations, or fines imposed on the facility.

services.name: Transferring the credit balance between the establishment’s branches - Business
services.shortDescription: This service allows the transfer of the credit balance between the facility's branches, where money can easily be transferred between the different branches of the facility.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Credit balance transfer service between establishment branches - Aamal is an electronic service provided by the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia through its official platform. It aims to enable establishments that own more than one branch to transfer the credit balances available in one branch to another branch affiliated with it, in a systematic and safe manner. This service comes within the framework of improving the management of financial flows within multi-branch establishments, and ensuring the continuity of their zakat and tax obligations without delay or duplication in payment.

The service is characterized by the ease of electronic procedure; The user (the facility owner or the authorized person) can access the facility’s account on the Authority’s platform, and then choose the credit balance transfer service between branches and fill out the form designated for that. You must enter information for both the transferring branch and the branch to which it is transferred, specifying the amount to be transferred and the type of balance (Zakat, income tax, value-added tax, or customs duties).
After verifying the accuracy of the data and reviewing it by the Authority, the transfer process is approved electronically, and the two parties (branches) are notified of the successful implementation of the process. The transfer does not require additional fees as long as the transferred balance results from an actual payment approved by the Authority.

The service helps financial entities in establishments manage funds more efficiently and achieve financial integration between the establishment’s branches without the need for paper procedures or manual reviews.

The importance of the credit balance transfer service between the establishment’s branches - Aamal

It enables multi-branch establishments to organize their zakat and tax accounts in an accurate and balanced manner.
It contributes to facilitating the flow of funds between branches and avoiding delays in settling financial obligations.
Strengthens internal financial control and reduces duplication of balances and collections.
It supports the principle of transparency in dealing with the Authority, and enhances confidence in the financial statements provided.
It is an important step in achieving complete digital transformation in the Saudi financial and commercial system.

Difficulties and challenges related to the credit balance transfer service between branches

It is necessary to ensure the unification of branch data and the integration of their financial records into the Authority’s electronic system.
The possibility of rejecting the transfer when there are tax obligations or financial violations on one of the branches.
The need for a careful review of debts and balances documents before approving the transfer.
There may be a delay in approving the transfer due to financial review procedures.
The need for accounting and administrative expertise to ensure the correctness and accuracy of operations within the system.
requiredDocuments: An official letter from the facility requesting the transfer.
A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: Ensure that the two facilities are automatically linked to the system.
Ensure that there are no observations on the facility.

services.name: Modifying the subscription period for an active subscriber - Business
services.shortDescription: This service allows amending the subscriber's enrollment date, to ensure the accuracy of subscribers' data.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service for amending the subscription period for an active subscriber - Aamal is an electronic service provided by the Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority through its official platform, and aims to enable establishment owners or authorized persons to amend or correct the zakat or tax subscription period registered in the system for active establishments that have an existing record. This service allows the business sector to update subscription periods in accordance with the actual reality of the facility’s commercial or financial activity, in an accurate electronic manner that ensures data integrity and continued regulatory compliance.

The modification process is done by logging into the establishment’s account on the Authority’s platform, then selecting the service from the “Manage Subscriptions” list, and specifying the active subscription whose duration is to be modified. The user enters new data such as the start and end dates of the new zakat or tax period, attaching justifications and supporting documents (such as financial statements or operational documents) to prove the required amendment. After submitting the application, the Authority reviews it and verifies its validity before officially approving the change. The subscription to the system is then automatically updated, and the customer is notified with an electronic confirmation message to complete the process.

The service aims to achieve accuracy in zakat and tax records and facilitate establishments in amending their subscription periods without the need to visit the Authority’s offices, which enhances digital transformation and supports the efficiency of financial compliance.

The importance of the service of modifying the subscription period for an active subscriber - Business

Enabling establishments to manage their zakat and tax contributions in a manner commensurate with the nature of their actual business.
Enhance the accuracy of financial data and reduce errors resulting from subscription periods that do not match the operational status.
Reducing the need for paper transactions and increasing the speed of completing requests electronically.
Ensuring the facility’s compliance with financial and zakat regulations without interruption or delay in obligations.
Increasing the efficiency of financial times management and improving time planning for tax returns and obligations.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service of modifying the subscription period

It is necessary to provide accurate justifications and correct attachments to confirm the reason for amending the subscription period.
There may be a delay in approving the application in the event of financial discrepancies or mismatched data.
The importance of verifying the record of previous periods to avoid time overlap between old and new subscriptions.
The need to understand the technical rules for each type of subscription (Zakat, income tax, value-added tax).
The facility’s commitment to follow up on notifications from the Authority to confirm approval or complete missing documents.
requiredDocuments: Employment contract for the worker.
A copy of the commercial register.

services.name: Facility Owners Management - Business
services.shortDescription: This service allows you to easily modify and manage facility owners’ data, which contributes to updating the information accurately and effectively.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Establishment Owners Management Service - Aamal is an electronic service provided to establishments in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia through concerned authorities such as the General Authority for Social Insurance and government service platforms, and allows establishments to manage the data and names of owners and shareholders associated with them in an organized and digital manner. Through this service, the facility can update the facility’s ownership data, such as adding new owners, modifying ownership percentages, or updating current owners’ information, which helps maintain the accuracy of official records and comply with legal and regulatory requirements.

The service portal is accessed through the facility’s account on the relevant government platform, and choosing the “Facility Owners Management” service or its equivalent, where the manager or the person authorized for management can view the list of registered owners and update the details, including names, nationality, ownership percentage, and contact information. It is required to attach documents supporting the change, such as ownership documents or official contracts, and the amendments are subject to review and approval by the competent authority to ensure their validity.

Owners management service is considered an essential part of the facilities management system, as it contributes to enriching the facility’s financial and organizational data, and enhances ownership transparency that may affect administrative and financial decision-making, in addition to its direct impact on legal and tax obligations.

The importance of facility owners management service - Business

Enhancing the accuracy of official ownership data for establishments and updating them immediately.
Enabling enterprises to modify the ownership structure to suit investment or legal changes.
Contributing to enhancing transparency before government agencies, investors and partners.
Facilitating legal and financial processes related to ownership, such as profits tax and zakat.
Support making correct management decisions based on up-to-date and clear proprietary data.

Difficulties and challenges related to facility owners management service - Business

Complexity in collecting and documenting the documents required to prove or modify ownership.
It is necessary to ensure the validity and accuracy of updated data to avoid rejection or legal problems.
Dealing with differences in regulatory regulations that may affect ownership percentage or change of owners.
Coordinating with multiple parties to approve amendments or issue new official documents.
The need for periodic follow-up to update data to suit market changes or investment operations.
requiredDocuments: Commercial registration/license.
Articles of incorporation (for companies only).
ID photo.

services.name: Amending the legal entity of the establishment - business
services.shortDescription: This service allows you to modify the facility’s identification data, as the facility’s basic information can be updated, the postal address and contact information can be modified, in addition to updating the facility’s bank account data, which ensures the accuracy and completeness of the facility’s information and thus facilitates procedures.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of amending the legal entity of an establishment - Aamal is an electronic service provided by the General Authority for Social Insurance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It allows establishment owners to amend the legal entity type of their commercial establishments electronically without the need to visit the authority’s branches, such as transferring from a sole proprietorship to a limited liability company or vice versa, or amending the type of company such as transferring from a joint liability company to a limited liability company.

The process of amending the legal entity is done by logging in to the Authority’s platform for establishments, then choosing the “Modify Legal Entity” service, and writing the new data for the preferred legal entity, while attaching the required official documents that support the amendment, such as copies of the new commercial registry, contracts, or agreements for establishment or amendment. After submitting the application, the Authority reviews the data and ensures that all legal conditions and controls are met, and the facility owner is notified of the acceptance of the application or the request to complete the documents.

The legal entity amendment service is an important step to enhance business development and change the facility structure in line with market requirements. It also contributes to updating the authority’s records and facilitating linking with other government agencies to update data simultaneously.

The importance of the service of amending the legal entity of the establishment - Business

Enabling enterprises to change the structure of the legal entity with the aim of improving performance and achieving legal flexibility.
Support compliance with new legal and regulatory requirements to control facility operations.
Improving relations with government agencies and investors through updated and accurate data.
Facilitating procedures for expansion or change in the legal form of the facility without complications.
Increasing opportunities for obtaining financing and supporting projects by updating the legal status to suit investment options.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service of amending the establishment’s legal entity - Business

It is necessary to submit complete and clear documents proving the change in the legal entity.
Handling administrative procedures that may require time to review compared to other services.
The possibility of complex legal conditions for some types of transfers and the approval of relevant authorities.
The need for periodic follow-up with the Authority to speed up the amendment process and ensure its legal completion.
It is the facility's responsibility to ensure that all records and licenses related to the new entity are up to date.
requiredDocuments: Commercial registration/license.
A copy of the articles of incorporation if amended for a company.

services.name: Joint Exclusion - Business
services.shortDescription: This service allows excluding subscribers registered on an employer's account, as the list of subscribers can be managed in a way that suits needs and requirements.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Subscriber Exclusion Service - Business is an electronic service provided by the General Organization for Social Insurance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia through its official platform, and enables business owners to exclude subscribers (employees) registered on the facility’s account upon the end of their contractual relationship or for a legal reason such as resignation, dismissal, death of the employee, or declaration of bankruptcy of the facility. This service is part of organizing the subscriber management process and ensuring establishments' commitment to managing insurance records accurately and legally.

Employers can perform the service by logging into the establishment’s account on the Social Insurance platform, searching for the participant they want to exclude, then clicking on the “Exclude” option. It is required to enter the correct date of exclusion, and the reason for exclusion from the list of specified reasons such as termination of the contract, termination of the contract during the trial period, or death. After completing the procedures, the system changes the subscriber’s status to “inactive” and stops collecting the subscriptions due from him.

The service facilitates the follow-up and control of employee records and organizes the process of terminating the government relationship with subscribers, which ensures that the data is consistent with the regulations and helps avoid fines or violations related to labor registration.

The importance of joint exclusion service - business

Organizing employee records accurately with the aim of keeping insurance subscription data updated.
Reducing the ongoing financial obligations of subscribers whose services have ended with the facility.
Protecting the facility from paying undue contributions for employees who no longer work for it.
Facilitating communication with government agencies and improving the credibility of monthly reports.
Supporting regulatory compliance and reducing the risk of penalties and fines.

Difficulties and challenges related to joint exclusion service - business

It is necessary to enter the date of dismissal accurately to reflect the reality of legal termination of service.
Dealing with potential delays in approving an exclusion request due to data review procedures.
Facing problems where the employee’s data is not updated or there is confusion about his status with the account.
Potential difficulty in handling complex cases such as transfer of sponsorship or termination of service for complex legal reasons.
The need for continuous follow-up of the facility to constantly update subscribers’ data and avoid violations.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: If the date of exclusion exceeds the month preceding the current month, a document proving the end of the work relationship must be attached.

services.name: Modifying a subscriber's subscription period retroactively - Business
services.shortDescription: This service allows the exclusion of registered subscribers who are inactive with the employer.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Service to retroactively modify a subscriber’s subscription period - Aamal is an electronic service available through the General Organization for Social Insurance platform in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and allows employers to retroactively modify and add subscription periods for employees registered with them in insurance. This service allows the correction of subscription periods that were not registered in a timely manner or due to an error, or to add subscription periods that were not previously included, so that they reflect actual and realistic data for work and insurance periods.

The employer or delegate logs into the establishment’s account on the social insurance platform, then chooses the service for retroactively amending subscription periods, and fills out the required data accurately, such as specifying the beginning and end of the period to be amended, in addition to the reason for the request, such as failure to register work periods, or other exceptional circumstances. Documents that support the amendment request must be attached, such as payslips, employment contracts, or any official documents. Applications are subject to oversight and review by the insurance authority to ensure the accuracy of the data and its compliance with regulations.

It should be noted that adding subscription periods retroactively is subject to strict conditions, including that the period must not exceed a maximum of 24 months before the date of the application, that the participant must not have received a reward or pension for the required period, and that the participant must not be more than 59 years old when submitting the application. The service aims to guarantee the rights of employees and employers alike while preserving the continuity of social security benefits.

The importance of retroactively amending a subscriber’s subscription term service - Business

Correcting insurance data to reflect actual and approved subscription periods.
Enabling companies to settle late subscriptions without violating the system.
Protecting the rights of subscribers to their pensions and insurance entitlements due to interruption or delay.
Providing flexibility in managing subscriptions to avoid fines and violations.
Ensure compliance with the laws and regulations governing social security.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service of modifying the subscription period retroactively
It is necessary to provide accurate supporting documents to prove periods of work and insurance retroactively.
Delayed processing of orders due to quality audit and regulatory compliance check.
Complexity of cases involving uninterrupted periods or changing employment situations.
Legal restrictions on the maximum period allowed for amendment.
Continuous follow-up of notifications and additional requirements from the institution to ensure acceptance.
requiredDocuments: 1- Employment contract / appointment decision / direct appointment.
2- Wage marches / Bank marches / Wage gradation statement.
3- Evidence proving the correct reason for exclusion.
4- A copy of the commercial register.

services.name: Separating/connecting facilities - works
services.shortDescription: This service allows the employer to modify the structure of the establishments, as he can separate his branches from the main establishment or connect them with another establishment as needed. This comes through the authority of the branch account manager.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Establishment separation and connection service - Aamal is an electronic service provided by the General Organization for Social Insurance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and aims to organize and manage the structure of establishments and their branches within the insurance system. This service allows the employer or authorized user to classify his affiliated establishments, as the establishment’s branches can be separated from the main establishment or branches can be linked to other establishments according to organizational and operational need.

The service is used by logging into the employer’s account on the social insurance platform, choosing the service of disconnecting or linking establishments, then specifying the branch or establishment to be disconnected or linked. Requires the attachment of official documents proving the branch's organizational affiliation, such as commercial records or contracts and institutional relations. After submitting the application, the insurance authority reviews the documents and enters the required amendments into the system, and then sends confirmation of the implementation of the process electronically.

The service of separating and linking establishments facilitates the management of individuals participating in insurance, as they are linked or separated from establishments accurately, which ensures the accuracy of insurance and financial reports and provides a better control mechanism for managing employees and organizing accounts.

The importance of the service of disconnecting and connecting facilities - Business

Strengthening the organization of the administrative structure of multi-branch establishments and increasing the accuracy of insurance reports.
Facilitating administrative procedures related to transferring or adding subscribers between different branches and establishments.
Improving the accuracy of the process of calculating insurance fees and contributions for each branch or facility separately.
Support the continuity of updating insurance records in accordance with the actual business structure.
Reducing accounting and technical errors in processing subscriptions and data.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service of disconnecting and connecting facilities - Business

It is necessary to submit clear and correct legal documents proving the relationship between the main establishment and the branches.
Possibility of delay in executing the request due to the intensity of data review and auditing by insurance companies.
The complexity of coordination between branches and related facilities, especially in large and multi-activity institutions.
Need to ensure data is updated in real time to avoid errors in subscriptions and reports.
The facility management is responsible for following up on changes and ensuring their compliance with regulations and laws.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: 1- There are no subscriber transfer transactions or receipt of payment.
2- The facility must be in an active state.

services.name: Termination of business activity
services.shortDescription: This service enables the process of submitting a request to proactively terminate the activity of an unregistered facility.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The facility activity termination service - Business is an electronic service provided by the General Organization for Social Insurance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It aims to enable facility owners to officially close or terminate the activity of their facility in the insurance system, ensuring the cessation of the monthly insurance contributions associated with the facility and the termination of the insurance relationship with its subscribers. The service targets establishments that have decided to permanently stop practicing their commercial, industrial or professional activity, or transfer or sell their activity.

The activity termination service is performed by logging in to the Business Insurance platform, then selecting the desired facility, and moving to the facility activity termination option. After ensuring that the termination conditions have been met, such as excluding all active subscribers in advance, and that there are no pending transactions or unpaid financial dues, the user enters the bank account number to recover any credit balance, and then attaches the required documents such as a certificate of cancellation of the commercial register or ownership transfer documents if the facility has been sold or closed.

After the application is completed and the Authority approves it, the facility’s file in the insurance system is closed, and the provision of new services under the same status file is prohibited, which reduces the administrative and financial burdens on facility owners and ensures the regularity of official records.

The importance of the service for terminating an establishment’s activity - business

Ensuring the termination of the facility’s insurance and legal obligations in a regular and organized manner.
Protecting the rights of all subscribers working for the facility, including end-of-service rights.
Reducing the financial burdens on entities that no longer engage in economic activity.
Updating the database and government reports accurately and transparently.
Supporting the stability of the business environment by alleviating problems associated with inactive or closed facilities.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service of terminating the activity of an establishment - business

It is necessary to carefully ensure that all participants are excluded and that there are no debts or dues.
Potential problems in cases of transfer of ownership of the facility or its merger with other facilities.
Delay in review or application procedures due to lack of documents or legal complications.
It is the responsibility of the facility owner to follow up on the application and requirements to ensure its completion.
The facility adheres to local laws and regulations to ensure that the closure is completed without violations.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the cancellation of the commercial register or license.
Ownership transfer document if ownership of the facility is transferred.
Attach the bank IBAN number to transfer the credit balance (if any).​
serviceConditions: Closing the establishment file in the Ministry of Human Resources.
If there are amounts or fines that must be paid.

services.name: Create an account - Business
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to create an account on the social insurance platform

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Account creation service - Business is an electronic service provided by the General Organization for Social Insurance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and allows owners of establishments and institutions to create an account for their organization on the official social insurance platform. The account aims to enable the establishment to manage all insurance services related to its employees, such as registering subscribers, updating data, submitting official applications, and following up on subscriptions and reports accurately and easily.

The steps to create an account include visiting the Social Insurance platform, then registering by entering the basic facility data, which is the commercial registry number, the national address, and the data of the facility owner or manager, in addition to uploading official documents such as a copy of the commercial registry and a copy of the national ID. After verifying and approving the information, the account is activated and is able to use all the services of the business platform.

The account is an essential starting point for organizing insurance work electronically, through which subscriptions can be managed, certificates can be issued, legal entities can be amended, and financial statements can be submitted, which makes it easier for the facility to comply with regulations and provide agile administrative performance.

The importance of creating an account service - Business

Facilitating facility management on the social insurance digital platform with ease and convenience.
Providing central access to all insurance and administrative services for the facility.
Ensure that financial data and reports are updated through a documented and digital account.
Supporting the legal obligation to register all employees of the facility without delay.
Improving the level of organization and financial management of the facility to enhance transparency and professionalism.

Difficulties and challenges related to the account creation service - Business

It is necessary to verify and accurately enter the data to avoid rejecting the application or disabling the account.
Official documentation requirements may place a burden on some establishments or lead to delays in documentation.
Challenges in integrating facility data with various government systems in an integrated manner.
The need for continuous follow-up after creating the account to ensure continued activation of the service and not disruption.
Limited technical support Users may encounter technical problems during registration.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
Letter to the account manager.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: The facility does not have a previous account.

services.name: Add/Edit Account Manager - Business
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to modify the facility's account manager

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Account Manager Amendment Service - Business is an electronic service provided by the General Organization for Social Insurance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows the employer or delegates to change or update the facility’s branch account manager quickly and easily through the official platform.
