The Continuing Professional Education Program is a program affiliated with the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants, and it mainly aims to update and enhance the professional and technical skills and knowledge of members working in the professions of accounting, auditing, zakat and tax services. The program focuses on providing continuing education opportunities that contribute to raising the efficiency of members and maintaining continuous development of their professional skills in their various fields of specialization. This program is one of the basic pillars of ensuring professional compatibility with approved local and international standards, and focuses on developing performance and raising professional standards to ensure the provision of reliable, high-quality accounting and auditing services.

The continuing professional education program includes a wide range of accredited educational programs, such as training courses, practical workshops, conferences, lectures, and scientific research related to accounting and auditing. The program also calculates educational points for each hour of training or educational participation, and basic practicing members are required to achieve a minimum number of professional education points periodically to maintain their membership and the validity of their professional accreditation. Some hours of education can also be completed through informal education programs that include self-study, watching educational videos, and interacting in some permitted activities.

To make it easier for members, the program provides an electronic tracking system that enables members to register, follow up, and attach supporting documents for female vocational education students, while providing technical support and guidance to ensure the effectiveness of the service and the success of the application. The Authority also ensures follow-up and monitoring of members’ commitment and completion of the required educational hours throughout the membership period, imposing appropriate penalties in the event of non-compliance.

The importance of the continuing professional education program

Updating and developing professional knowledge and skills periodically according to the requirements of the times.
Enhancing the confidence of clients and stakeholders in the quality of accounting and auditing services.
Maintaining professional accreditation and ensuring the continuity of practicing the profession officially.
Raising the efficiency of workers and achieving the highest levels of quality and professionalism.
Strengthening the position of professionals in the labor market and increasing opportunities for professional advancement.

Challenges and difficulties

Members’ commitment to complete the number of hours of professional education within the specified time period.
Providing high-quality training content that meets the various needs and requirements of members.
Follow up on software updates in accordance with technical developments and new professional standards.
Ensuring ease of use of the electronic system and increasing participation in available programs.
requiredDocuments: Attach documents proving continuing professional education hours.
ID photo.

services.name: Preparation and training program to prepare for the accounting and auditing tests
services.shortDescription: Preparation and training program to prepare for the accounting and auditing tests

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The preparation and training program to prepare for the accounting and auditing exams is one of the important programs offered by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants. It aims to enable applicants to pass the professional certification exams by providing comprehensive and intensive training that covers the theoretical and practical aspects of the two subjects. The program targets individuals who wish to obtain a professional associate degree in accounting and auditing, so that it provides them with the knowledge and skills necessary to pass the exams with high confidence. The program addresses a detailed explanation of the intellectual framework of financial accounting and the presentation of financial statements, a comprehensive review to understand the various accounting operations and recording transactions, in addition to a review of basic internal auditing and reviewing skills.

The program is implemented through focused training sessions that include virtual lectures and interactive workshops, in addition to practical exercises using previous exam models and question banks containing more than 2,000 questions. The program is offered over 30 training days in addition to intensive meetings focused on discussing applied issues, and ensures continuous follow-up with trainers and responses to inquiries, with updated training materials that include all test topics. The program also includes an explanation of modern accounting systems, financial performance analysis, and understanding financial reporting requirements in accordance with the Saudi Authority’s regulations and international best practices.

The program typically does not require an additional registration fee and is open to all test registrants, and includes access to electronic training materials that can be reviewed at any time. The program focuses on building a strong knowledge base that helps trainees successfully pass exams, and prepares professional accountants and auditors to work efficiently and professionally in various governmental and private sectors.

The importance of the preparation and training program to prepare for the accounting and auditing tests

Increasing trainees' readiness to take the test's knowledge and skills requirements.
Enhance applicants’ understanding of accounting standards and modern auditing methods.
Improving the chances of success in professional certification exams through practical and theoretical training.
Supporting the development of professional performance and raising the level of national accounting qualification.
Providing an interactive, easily accessible online learning environment with comprehensive support.

Challenges and difficulties related to the service

Trainees’ commitment to training dates and continuous follow-up to achieve the best benefit.
The need to absorb integrated, advanced content requires focused effort and ongoing preparation.
Difficulty in going beyond some applied aspects and conforming to precise professional standards.
Continuous motivation for trainees to actively participate and interact with the program to ensure success.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The service requires registration with an email.

services.name: Postponing the fellowship exam
services.shortDescription: The applicant can request postponement of fellowship exam subjects through electronic services

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The fellowship exam postponement service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants. It allows applicants for professional associate degree exams in various subjects, such as accounting, auditing, zakat, taxes, and others, the ability to request postponement of taking a specific subject exam to later courses without losing their right to pass it. The Authority gives this opportunity to ensure that applicants are able to better prepare and achieve the highest levels of success according to regulatory conditions.

For the postponement service, the application must be submitted at least two weeks before the specified test date through the Authority’s electronic services portal. The applicant is allowed to postpone the subject for a maximum of two consecutive sessions, and in the event of not registering in the next session, the applicant will be considered absent from the test for that subject, and the approved policies will be applied in such cases. The postponement request does not require any additional fees, and the request is processed within ten working days from the end of the registration period for the tests, with the possibility of following up on the request and escalating via email in the event of no response.

Fellowship exams are usually held three times during the year in major cities such as Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Mecca, and Medina, and applicants must commit to choosing appropriate dates and departments, as the exam questions are organized in an integrated system that includes multiple choice and essay questions, and a success rate of no less than 60% is required to pass the subject. After passing the exam, the applicant is granted an associate’s certificate, which qualifies him to practice accounting and legal auditing officially and recognized in the Kingdom.

The importance of the fellowship exam postponement service

It provides great flexibility for applicants to better prepare for exams.
Guarantees applicants' rights to complete exams without loss due to unforeseen circumstances.
It helps raise the level of success by providing the opportunity to re-plan study time.
It facilitates electronic follow-up of applications, saving effort and time for applicants.
It ensures the continuity of the professional attainment process and obtaining the associate degree in an organized manner.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

It is necessary to adhere to the deadlines for submitting postponement requests to avoid losing the opportunity.
The challenge of following up on requests and ensuring that procedures are completed in a timely manner.
Possibility of postponement of applications due to crowding during the registration and testing period.
Difficulty achieving a balance between studying and managing new schedules after each postponement.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: A request to postpone the test may be submitted at least thirty days before the start date of the testing period, provided that registration for the postponed test takes place during the next testing session or the one that follows it.

services.name: Postponing professional exams
services.shortDescription: The applicant can request to postpone professional tests via email

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The professional exam postponement service provided by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants is an electronic service that aims to give applicants for professional certification exams the opportunity to postpone attendance of one of the exam subjects to a maximum of one or two subsequent sessions, provided that the postponement request is submitted in advance through the authority’s electronic services platform at least two weeks before the exam date. This service provides flexibility for applicants to better prepare for emergency circumstances that may prevent them from passing the test on the specified date without losing their rights to take tests in the next round in accordance with the approved regulations.

The procedures for submitting a postponement request are facilitated by sending an official e-mail to the Authority on the exams’ mail, stating the desire to postpone the subject, without imposing any additional fees on the postponement request. The Authority processes the application within a period not exceeding ten working days from the end of the official period for submitting applications, and allows applicants the ability to follow the status of the application electronically, with escalation options in the event of delayed responses to applications.

Professional tests are held on specific and fixed dates during the year, and include several courses aimed at keeping up with demand and ensuring the largest number of applicants. Applicants are required to adhere to the laws and instructions regulating the tests, as the focus is on achieving a specific success rate for each subject to ensure high-quality professional qualification.

The importance of the service of postponing professional tests

It offers organizational flexibility that helps applicants arrange their academic and professional time appropriately.
It protects the rights of applicants to benefit from testing opportunities without loss, whether due to urgent health or professional conditions.
It supports raising success rates by providing additional preparation opportunities for subjects in which the applicant faces difficulties.
It facilitates the electronic follow-up of applications, which reduces crowding and pressure on the Authority’s centers.
Ensures respect for the Authority’s regulations in the interest of developing the profession and the quality of its outputs.

Challenges and difficulties related to the service

The postponement request must be submitted within the specified time period to avoid depriving the applicant.
Technical challenges in following up on requests and addressing delays in responses.
The possibility of an accumulation of postponement requests in some periods, which may affect the speed of processing.
Motivating applicants to plan well and make optimal use of the available postponement opportunities.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: A request to postpone the test may be submitted at least thirty days before the test date, provided that registration for the test takes place during the next or subsequent testing session.

services.name: Request to register for courses
services.shortDescription: This service allows you to register for courses and training programs electronically

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The registration request service for courses is one of the main electronic services provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants. It targets all professional groups, including chartered accountants, accountants, students, and workers in financial departments in the public and private sectors who wish to develop their professional skills and expertise by enrolling in specialized training courses. This service enables members and non-members to benefit from the many training programs provided by the Authority, which meet the needs of the national labor market and raise the efficiency of human resources in the accounting, auditing, finance, zakat and tax sectors.

The registration process is done electronically by accessing the Authority’s electronic services platform, then selecting the scheduled courses or training programs and viewing their details, such as objectives, topics, fees, course duration, and venue, whether in person or remotely. After that, the applicant completes the registration steps by filling out the required data, attaching the documents (if any), and then selecting the appropriate payment method to complete the reservation. The courses target various professional levels and are available at varying fees depending on the type and duration of the course, with some courses provided for free or for a nominal fee, and financing and support programs for students and graduates.

The Authority gives registrants the ability to electronically monitor the status of their applications, obtain acceptance notifications or joining dates, and also provides approved electronic certificates of attendance issued after completing the course and passing its requirements. The Authority also manages evaluations of the content of courses and trainers on a periodic basis to ensure the quality of training and its suitability to international standards and meet the evolving needs of the profession.

The importance of the course registration request service

Developing the technical and practical skills of accountants and professionals and constantly raising their efficiency.
Updating accounting and financial information and keeping pace with the latest local and global trends and regulations.
Providing a flexible and easy electronic platform to facilitate access to specific training opportunities.
Enhancing opportunities to obtain specialized professional certificates and improving opportunities for employment and professional advancement.
Supporting the Kingdom’s vision of raising the quality of human resources and empowering national cadres in vital sectors.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Overcrowding in some distinguished courses and lack of seats during peak training times.
Facing difficulty in choosing between the courses that best suit the trainee’s aspirations and professional needs.
The importance of the trainee realizing the importance of attending all course hours to ensure acceptance of his certificate.
Develop and update training content on a permanent basis to keep pace with modern accounting and auditing standards.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
National address.
Required data: (name - email - mobile number - national ID)
serviceConditions: Training course fees vary depending on their type and duration.
You must provide full name (Arabic - English), ID number, mobile number, email, national address - employer (if any)

services.name: Request to apply for the value-added tax specialist exam
services.shortDescription: The applicant can register for the test through electronic services

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The application service for applying for the value-added tax specialist exam is one of the important electronic services provided by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants in cooperation with the General Authority of Zakat and Tax in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. This service aims to provide an integrated electronic interface that allows those interested and specialists in the field of value-added tax to register to take the professional certification test for a value-added tax specialist, which measures the extent of applicants’ proficiency in theoretical knowledge and practical skills related to the application of value-added tax in accordance with Saudi regulations and international standards.

Applicants for this test are required to have accredited accounting qualifications. Holders of a bachelor’s degree or a higher qualification in accounting, or holders of one of the accredited professional certificates such as an associate’s degree or an accounting technician certificate issued by the Authority, are accepted for the test, in addition to holders of associate’s certificates from recognized international accounting institutes. It also requires paying a test entry fee of 1,200 Saudi riyals for the first time, and 500 riyals to retake the test in the event of failure the first time, in addition to attending a preparatory training program organized by the Authority or an approved body.

The test includes 60 multiple-choice questions to be solved within 150 minutes and requires a pass rate of at least 60%. The system allows the possibility of postponing the test provided that the application is submitted 30 days before the test date. Applications and fees are submitted electronically, with the ability to follow the status of the application until approval is issued to attend the test. The program provides practical and theoretical training on VAT-related topics, as well as mock tests and educational resources that help applicants be well prepared to ensure success.

The importance of the application service for applying for the value-added tax specialist exam

Enhancing the technical skills and capabilities of accountants specializing in value-added tax.
Increase knowledge and understanding of national and international tax systems related to VAT.
Supporting tax compliance and legal requirements for companies and institutions.
Increasing opportunities to obtain accredited professional certificates that enhance employment and advancement opportunities.
Providing comprehensive training and preparation that helps you pass the tests with confidence and competence.

Challenges and difficulties

The need to pass an exam with a high level of rigor requires comprehensive preparation.
Applicants must be committed to attending the announced test dates and adhering to the regulations.
Complete the prerequisite training and practical requirements to ensure admission to the test.
The necessity of constantly updating knowledge due to developments in tax regulations and standards.
requiredDocuments: A colored personal photo.
A copy of a bachelor’s degree, diploma, master’s degree, or professional certificate.
A copy of the passport for non-Saudis.
A declaration and authorization form, a certificate equivalency decision, or a certificate verification report.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: Bachelor's degree or higher qualification in Accounting.
Holding one of the following professional certificates issued by the Authority: Associate’s Certificate, Accounting Technician Certificate
Holders of one of the fellowship certificates from the following international institutes: AICPA, ICAEW, CICA, CA Australia, ACCA, ICAP, ICAI.

Holders of a diploma or higher qualification in one of the specializations of the Colleges of Administrative Sciences. Provided: - The applicant’s academic record contains at least 6 accounting hours, or the accounting hours are completed by methods approved by the Authority.
Only educational certificates recognized by the Ministry of Education are accepted.

services.name: Request to apply for the fellowship exam
services.shortDescription: The applicant can register for the test through electronic services

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The fellowship test application service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants. It is intended for those wishing to obtain a professional fellowship certificate, which is considered one of the highest degrees of accreditation in the authority, and represents a high-level professional qualification that qualifies those who obtain it to practice the accounting and auditing profession in an official and recognized manner in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. This certificate is considered a major gateway to work in governmental and private institutions with high professional requirements, and it highlights the accountant’s ability to possess theoretical and practical knowledge and his commitment to the behavioral and ethical professional standards followed in the accounting profession.

The applicant is required to have a bachelor’s degree or its equivalent in accounting or administrative specializations that contain approved accounting hours. He must also fulfill the minimum number of study hours in accounting in accordance with the regulating rules approved by the Authority.

The application application includes filling out an electronic form through the Authority’s electronic services platform, attaching the required official documents such as a copy of the national ID/residency, a personal photo, academic record, and bachelor’s degree or qualification provided. After completing the application, it will be reviewed and approval will be issued within a period not exceeding ten working days. The applicant will be able to choose dates and testing centers from among 11 cities within the Kingdom, such as Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, and others, according to a specific timetable issued by the authority annually.

The test consists of basic subjects that include accounting, auditing, zakat and tax, commercial systems, business environment, and jurisprudence. The applicant must pass each subject with a grade of no less than 60%, with permission to repeat subjects that have not been passed during multiple courses. After passing all subjects, the holder is awarded an associate degree, which opens wide opportunities for him to practice the profession and participate in developing the sector.

The importance of the fellowship examination application service

Enabling accountants to obtain a high-level professional qualification that enhances job opportunities.
Supporting the quality and reliability of accounting and auditing services in the Kingdom.
Providing an easy and flexible electronic registration and testing experience.
Enable applicants to plan their tests well by choosing appropriate dates and locations.
Officially strengthening the position of accountants in the market in accordance with international and local standards.

Challenges and difficulties related to the service

Complete all application documents accurately in accordance with the Authority’s standards and time requirements.
Comprehensive preparation for tests with extensive and varied content covering several topics.
Adhere to registration deadlines and choose testing centers appropriately.
Dealing with high pressure during registration and tests in terms of the number of applicants.
requiredDocuments: A colored personal photo.
A copy of the bachelor’s degree.
A copy of the academic record.
A copy of the passport for non-Saudis.
A declaration and authorization form, a certificate equivalency decision, or a certificate verification report.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: The registration fee for the test is 1000 (one thousand riyals) for the first time and 500 (five hundred riyals) for retaking the test, in addition to an entry fee for each subject of 300 (three hundred riyals).
Bachelor's degree or higher qualification in Accounting.

A university degree or any higher qualification in one of the administrative sciences specializations or its branches, provided that the test taker has completed (twenty-one) hours in accounting or its branches, or what the Authority considers equivalent to it.

services.name: Request to take the professional certification exam in public sector accounting standards
services.shortDescription: The applicant can register for the test through electronic services

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The application service for applying for the professional certificate test in accounting standards for the public sector is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants, and it is intended for those wishing to obtain an accredited professional certificate in the field of accounting standards approved in the Kingdom for the public sector. The test aims to measure the competence of applicants in terms of theoretical knowledge of these standards, the practical skills necessary to apply them, in addition to the extent of awareness of professional responsibility and the requirements associated with carrying out accounting tasks in the government sector.

Registration for the test takes place via the Authority’s electronic platform, where the applicant creates a user account and fills out the registration form including personal information, academic qualification, and specialization, along with uploading the required documents such as a university degree and a copy of the national ID or residency. After registration, the applicant is asked to choose the city in which he wishes to take the test, which the Authority provides in a number of major cities in the Kingdom, such as Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Abha, and Tabuk, and specify the type of payment, whether electronic or another approved method.

The duration of the test is 180 minutes and includes 75 objective, multiple-choice questions covering various aspects of public sector accounting standards. The applicant is required to achieve a success rate of no less than 60% to pass the test. In the event of failure, the test is permitted to be retaken with the payment of fees again. The applicant also has the right to submit a request to postpone the test, provided that it is submitted at least 30 days before the test date, and registration is made for the next or subsequent test session.

This certificate is considered an important professional qualification that enhances job opportunities in the government sector, supports the continued development of the government accounting system in accordance with the best international standards, and also reflects a commitment to standards of transparency and financial accountability.
The Authority provides technical support and electronic guidance to applicants, while providing the ability to follow up on the status of their applications electronically to ensure that the procedures run smoothly.

The importance of the application service for applying for the professional certification test in public sector accounting standards

Enhances professional knowledge in accordance with internationally and locally approved accounting standards.
It facilitates entry into the government sector with an accredited qualification that enhances employment opportunities.
Provides an effective and smooth electronic registration and follow-up system.
It helps raise the quality of government financial reports and improve accounting performance.
Ensures compliance with the latest applicable regulatory and professional regulations.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

The academic and technical requirements must be met precisely to ensure admission.
Commitment to the specified times for submitting applications and registration.
Dealing with applicant pressure during high enrollment periods.
Difficulty preparing for tests that cover technical and advanced topics.
requiredDocuments: A colored personal photo.
A copy of your bachelor’s degree, diploma or master’s degree.
A copy of the passport for non-Saudis.
A declaration and authorization form, a certificate equivalency decision, or a certificate verification report.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: Holders of a diploma or any higher qualification in accounting specializations (provided that the duration of the diploma is not less than two academic years) from Saudi universities, colleges, institutes, or similar recognized bodies.
Holders of a bachelor’s degree or any higher qualification in one of the economic or administrative sciences disciplines from Saudi universities and other recognized universities.

Holders of a bachelor’s degree in any other specialty from recognized universities and colleges, provided that the applicant obtains (15) hours in accounting or completes it using methods approved by the Authority.

services.name: Request to take the financial fraud examiner certification exam
services.shortDescription: The applicant can register for the test through electronic services

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The application service for the Financial Fraud Examiner Certification Exam is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants, aiming to enable accountants and specialists in the field of combating financial fraud to apply to take an accredited professional exam to obtain the “Financial Fraud Examiner” certificate, which is recognized locally and internationally. This test measures the applicant's proficiency in theoretical knowledge and practical skills for fraud examination, financial investigations, and anti-corruption in government and private institutions, in addition to awareness of professional responsibility and legal frameworks related to work.

Registration for the test is done through the Authority’s electronic platform by creating a user account, filling out the application form with personal information, academic qualification, practical experience, and uploading the required documents, including a copy of the identity card, university or professional certificate, and a personal photo. After completing the application, the test date and location are chosen from available cities such as Riyadh, Jeddah, and Dammam.

The test contains 100 multiple-choice questions with a time duration of 150 minutes, and a success rate of at least 75% is required to pass the test. Applicants are allowed to retry if they fail by paying the renewed test fees, and the test fees are supported by the Human Resources Development Fund “Hadaf” for Saudi citizens within the vocational training and qualification programs.

The qualifying course that precedes the exam provides a detailed explanation of topics related to financial fraud, forensic analysis, investigative techniques, forensic evidence, and reporting financial crimes, while providing practical training in writing technical reports and analyzing data.

The importance of the application service for applying for the financial fraud examiner certification exam

Obtaining an accredited professional certificate that enhances job opportunities and develops the career path.
Enabling specialists to examine financial crimes and work with high professional efficiency.
Supporting government and private agencies in combating financial corruption and improving oversight.
Obtaining financial support and approved training from the Human Resources Fund programs.
Being able to join the network of professionals specialized in combating fraud locally and globally.

Challenges and difficulties

High level of difficulty and the need for comprehensive and intensive preparation.
Commitment to the specified dates for tests and registration within the official periods.
The need for an in-depth understanding of the topics of forensic investigation and analysis and their applications.
Ensure continuous updating of knowledge to keep pace with developments in laws and technologies.
requiredDocuments: A colored personal photo.
A copy of your bachelor’s or master’s degree.
A copy of the passport for non-Saudis.
A declaration and authorization form, a certificate equivalency decision, or a certificate verification report.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: Holders of a bachelor’s degree or any higher qualification in accounting specializations from recognized universities and colleges.

Holders of a bachelor’s degree or any higher qualification in one of the economic or administrative sciences, law, law, or regulations from recognized universities and colleges, provided that the test taker has completed twenty-one hours in accounting (or what the Authority considers equivalent to it).
Holding one of the following professional certificates issued by the Authority: Associate’s Certificate or Accounting Technician Certificate.

Holders of one of the fellowship certificates issued by the following professional bodies: The Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants (SOCPA). American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA). Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW). The Institute of Chartered Certified Accountants in Britain (ACCA). Canadian Institute of Chartered Accountants (CICA). Institute of Chartered Accountants Australia and New Zealand (CAANZ).

services.name: Request to apply for the accounting technician exam
services.shortDescription: The applicant can register for the test through electronic services

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Accounting Technician Test application service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants, aiming to enable those wishing to obtain the “Accounting Technician” certificate to register to take an official, approved test that measures the applicants’ proficiency in theoretical knowledge and practical skills in the field of accounting. This certificate is directed to those who have diploma or bachelor’s level qualifications in accounting or related disciplines, and aims to help them qualify to work in various economic establishments, especially small and medium-sized ones, in daily accounting tasks such as bookkeeping, processing invoices, preparing financial statements and calculating costs.

Registration for the test is done through the Authority’s electronic platform by creating a personal account and filling out the application form that includes entering personal data, academic qualification, and required documents such as a copy of the certificate and a copy of the national ID or residence permit. After completing registration and choosing the date and location of the test, the prescribed fees are paid, which amount to 1,200 Saudi riyals for the first time, and 500 riyals for retaking the test in the event of failure, with financial support from the Human Resources Development Fund (Hadaf) for Saudi citizens.

The test contains 60 multiple-choice questions that are asked over a period of 150 minutes, and a success rate of 60% is required to pass the test. Applicants have the right to postpone the test a maximum of two times, provided that the postponement request is submitted 14 days before the test date.

The importance of the accounting technician exam application service

Qualifying accountants to work in various business sectors according to approved professional standards.
Raising the level of accounting skills among individuals and qualifying them to assume daily responsibilities accurately and efficiently.
Providing an easy electronic platform for registering tests and following up on requests.
Supporting employment in small and medium enterprises that constitute the pillar of the national economy.
Issuing a professional certificate recognized locally and internationally that enhances job opportunities and professional excellence.

Challenges and difficulties related to the service

All documents and requirements must be completed within the specified time frames.
Understand the theoretical and practical content of the test covering several accounting areas.
Dealing with the limited testing dates and applicants’ commitment to them.
The need to continue training and continuous development to keep pace with the requirements of the labor market.
requiredDocuments: A colored personal photo.
A copy of a bachelor’s degree, diploma or master’s degree.
A copy of the passport for non-Saudis.
A declaration and authorization form, a certificate equivalency decision, or a certificate verification report.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: Holders of a diploma (or any higher degree) in accounting (provided that the duration of the diploma is not less than two academic years) from Saudi universities, colleges, institutes, or similar recognized bodies.

Holders of a bachelor’s degree (or any higher degree) in one of the following specializations: business administration, financial, administrative, and economic sciences, from Saudi universities and other recognized universities.

Holders of a bachelor’s degree in any other specialty from Saudi universities and other recognized universities, provided that they have obtained (15) hours in accounting or completed them using methods approved by the Commission*.

services.name: Request to cancel registration in a course
services.shortDescription: This service allows cancellation of registration in courses and training programs according to cancellation policies

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of requesting cancellation of registration in a course is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants, which allows trainees who have registered in any training course or training program to submit a request to cancel their registration. The service aims to give the registrant the opportunity to organize his training according to a comfortable schedule or to stop the course if there are circumstances that prevent them from completing. The application is followed up and reviewed in accordance with specific policies and procedures that guarantee the rights of the trainee and the authority at the same time.

The trainee can apply to cancel his registration in the course for free. The application must be submitted within a maximum of one working day from the time of official registration in the course. The request is sent via the training e-mail, mentioning the student’s details and the course number for which you wish to cancel registration. After receiving the request, the Authority will respond within a short period to confirm the cancellation of registration, with the possibility of escalating electronically if an appropriate response is not received.

This service comes as part of the system of supporting and facilitating trainees, while ensuring that courses are organized in accordance with best professional practices and avoiding crowding or late cancellations that affect the course of training programs. The Authority also provides a clear guide to educate users about cancellation policies to ensure everyone’s rights and not disrupt the organizational scheduling of courses.

The importance of the service of requesting cancellation of registration in a course

It facilitates the reorganization of trainees' schedules to suit their personal and professional circumstances.
It protects the rights of trainees from being exposed to any unjustified fees due to early cancellation.
It enhances the discipline of the training session by carefully organizing registration and cancellation processes.
Improving the trainee's experience by providing technical support and advice regarding cancellation procedures.
It supports the Authority’s efforts in providing integrated and professional educational services.

Challenges and difficulties associated with the service

It is necessary to submit the cancellation request on time to avoid rejection.
Ensuring that requests are received and followed up electronically in an effective and rapid manner.
Dealing with emergency cancellations that may affect the course's progress.
Maintaining the quality of training and the balance between the number of participants and educational effectiveness.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The trainee cannot change the course after paying the invoice.
The trainee is not entitled to a refund of the training course fees in the event of withdrawal after the start of the training course.
The trainee is not entitled to a refund of fees if he does not attend the course, or if a cancellation is not requested at least 5 working days before the start of the course.

The trainee has the right to recover the course fees or transfer the balance to another course of the same value in the event that the Authority cancels or postpones a training course - To recover the payment fees, a request to cancel the training course must be submitted 5 working days before the start of the course - The process of refunding the training course fees takes 20 working days.

services.name: Request to postpone a course
services.shortDescription: This service allows training courses and programs to be postponed electronically according to available training schedules

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The course postponement request service is one of the electronic services provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants with the aim of supporting trainees and professionals who have had circumstances that prevent them from attending training courses or qualifying programs at the planned time. The service allows for the possibility of submitting an official request to postpone a course or training program to a future period available within the Authority’s training schedules, which contributes to achieving flexibility and facilitating the continuity of professional development for beneficiaries.

The procedures for requesting postponement are carried out electronically through the Authority’s portal, where the trainee logs into his account and chooses the course to be postponed, then fills out the application form including personal data, course details, and specifying the reasons that require postponement. The Authority reviews the application and issues an approval or rejection decision according to the approved policies and available training schedules. The Authority does not impose additional fees when submitting a postponement request, provided that the permitted postponement period is adhered to, which is usually specific days before the course date (varies depending on the type of course and program).

The importance of this service is highlighted in enabling professionals to maintain the pace of continuing education and not lose development opportunities due to a temporary emergency. It also helps organize course attendance in accordance with trainees' schedules and prevents the accumulation of absences or loss of investment in paid training programs. The Authority provides an electronic follow-up channel for requests, and the possibility of escalation in the event of failure to respond to the request within the specified periods.

The challenges associated with this service include the necessity of prior coordination with the Authority, taking into account postponement policies and registration controls, and the inability to postpone courses that are not included in the available training schedules, in addition to limiting the frequency of unjustified postponement requests in order to preserve the quality of the approved training programs.

The importance of the service of requesting postponement of a course

Supporting the continuity of vocational education for trainees without losing training opportunities.
Achieving flexibility in training schedules to suit the trainees’ circumstances.
Preventing the accumulation of absences or loss of paid training programs.
Managing and organizing attendance in a way that preserves the interests of the Authority and the trainees together.
Facilitating postponement request procedures and accurately following up on the status of the application electronically.

Challenges and difficulties

It is necessary to adhere to the specified postponement period to avoid rejection of the application.
Coordinating the attendance and absence of trainees to ensure the continuity of training programs.
Preventing misuse of the service through unjustified repetition of postponement requests.
Rapid handling of requests to meet trainees' needs immediately.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
Course application number.

services.name: Request special courses for companies and government agencies
services.shortDescription: This service allows submitting a request to implement special training courses for companies and government agencies

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of requesting special courses for companies and government agencies is a distinctive electronic service provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants. This service targets government sectors and major companies that wish to organize customized training courses that meet their professional and technical needs in particular. The service allows companies and entities to conclude agreements with the Authority to hold customized courses that suit the requirements of their employees, whether in terms of training content, date and location, which ensures achieving the highest levels of integration and professional development in line with the Kingdom’s Vision 2030 and the local and international labor market.

Special course services include a variety of advanced topics in the fields of accounting, auditing, zakat, taxation, governance, anti-fraud, risk management, and international standards for financial performance. Training materials and curricula are designed in an interactive manner that covers theoretical and practical aspects, while providing field exercises and simulations of real cases. Entities can request integrated programs that include workshops, lectures, assessment tests, and professional consultations to enhance participants’ experiences and achieve the institution’s training objectives.

The application mechanism is done electronically through the authority’s portal, where the competent authority fills out the application form that includes the basic data of the entity, the number of participants, the type of courses required, preferred timings, and any other special requirements that suit the internal policies of the entity or company. The application is reviewed by the Authority, and it presents a customized training plan that includes the schedule and content plan, followed by signing the official agreement and setting competitive prices commensurate with the size and specialization of the course. The Authority also provides continuous support before, during and after the implementation of the course to ensure the quality of training and achieve the maximum benefit for the beneficiary.

The importance of the service of requesting special courses for companies and government agencies

Meeting specific training needs in a specialized, professional manner.
Enhancing the professional competence of employees in government and private agencies.
Providing flexible programs that fit schedules and work requirements.
Supporting the application of professionalism and international standards in the Saudi work environment.
Strengthening strategic partnerships between the Authority and government and private agencies.

Challenges and difficulties

The necessity of careful coordination with the beneficiary to ensure that its needs are met.
The challenge is to design customized training programs to suit diverse requirements.
Manage the training schedule and resources to cover all required courses with high quality.
Follow up on customer satisfaction and continuous development to update training programs.
requiredDocuments: National address.
Financial baptism.
Data required for trainees: (name - email - mobile number - national ID)
serviceConditions: The number of trainees should not be less than 15 trainees per course.

services.name: Request to transfer a course
services.shortDescription: Training courses and programs are transferred electronically through the electronic services website according to the terms and policies in the available tables

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The course transfer request service is one of the electronic services provided by the Saudi Organization for Auditors and Accountants. It is directed to trainees who have completed their registration in a specific training course or training program and wish to transfer their participation to another similar course held at another time or place within the Authority’s approved programs. This service aims to give trainees complete flexibility in managing their training schedules, especially if their circumstances change or they face a conflict with the timing of the basic course, which enhances the training value and provides them with a renewed professional environment.

The transfer request procedures are carried out through the Authority’s digital platform, where the trainee logs into his account, then chooses the course he is registered for and fills out the transfer request form, specifying in the form the name of the new course to which he wants to transfer, mentioning the reasons for the transfer and time or place preferences. A basic condition for transfer approval is that the new course fees be identical to the original course fees, with vacant seats available in the course to which you want to transfer. Registration for the new course must still be available within the official registration period.

After receiving the application, the Authority reviews it and ensures that all conditions and standards are met, then sends confirmation of approval or rejection to the trainee. It is recommended that the application be submitted sufficiently before the course date to facilitate processing and ensure the right of priority for seats. If the transfer is successful, the trainee will receive an official electronic notification that includes all the details of his new participation, the date and location of the alternative course, and he can follow the course procedures completely electronically.

The importance of the course transfer request service

Providing the highest degree of flexibility for trainees in amending their training plans.
Reducing the chances of absence or losing the value of the paid course due to scheduling conflicts or emergency circumstances.
Improving the trainees’ experience and increasing their satisfaction by facilitating the adaptation of the training schedule.
Support strategic planning and invest training resources more effectively.
Ensure adherence to the operational efficiency of courses by redistributing vacant seats.

Challenges and difficulties

Possibility of limited seats in alternative courses, especially during peak periods.
It is necessary to match the value of the fees for the two courses and the registration period.
The importance of processing speed to ensure that the trainee benefits from the desired course.
Developing the electronic system to ensure easy and smooth ordering for all users.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The fees for the course to which the trainee wishes to transfer must be identical to the fees for the course in which he was previously registered.
Registration in the course that the trainee wishes to change must be through personal payments.

services.name: Student membership
services.shortDescription: The service allows students to register and belong to the accounting entity to benefit from the authority’s outputs and obtain developments in the profession.

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The student membership service is a service provided by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants, and aims to enable students who study in recognized universities and colleges and official educational bodies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, to join the Authority as associate members to benefit from the Authority’s various services, and to obtain professional and scientific developments related to the accounting and auditing profession. This membership is offered to students at bachelor's level or any higher degree in related disciplines, such as accounting and business administration, and gives them the opportunity to learn about the professional requirements and frameworks followed in the accounting and auditing market.

Student membership provides students with the opportunity to follow the latest professional news, advancements in development and professional standards, and attend seminars and workshops organized by the Authority for free or at special discounts, in addition to the possibility of printing an approved electronic membership certificate that enhances their CV and future opportunities in the labor market. The Authority is committed not to impose any subscription fees on affiliated students, which makes this membership open and available to everyone. Its goal is to support and guide students from university studies to transitioning to the professional labor market in a smooth and orderly manner.

To request membership, clear and correct personal data must be submitted, accompanied by a copy of the academic record or transcript, and a copy of an official letter of introduction issued by the university with a recent date confirming that the student is registered in the college during the current period. It is also possible to upload a colored personal photo, along with attaching other information if requested by the Authority. The validity of applications is verified and completed through the Authority’s electronic system through the membership portal.

Student membership is considered an important foundational stage that supports the student in a way that enables him to navigate the world of accounting and auditing, and enhances his educational, training and professional opportunities. It also opens the door for him later to be promoted to higher professional memberships upon completion of work requirements and experiences. It also contributes to building a network of professional relationships between students, professionals and experts in the field.

The importance of student membership service

Supporting education related to the labor market by providing special content and workshops.
Promoting practical and applied training opportunities for students on accounting principles and basics.
Providing educational resources and professional tools that contribute to developing students’ skills.
Providing students with professional recognition and facilities that support their gateway to the labor market.
Enhancing opportunities for communication with professionals and specialists for the purpose of professional guidance and guidance.

Challenges and difficulties related to the service

Ensure that the student’s data is updated and follow up on the continuity of his affiliation.
Providing a smooth user experience in the electronic registration system.
Handling large numbers of requests at peak times.
Motivating students to make the most of all the membership benefits offered.
requiredDocuments: A colored personal photo.
A copy of the academic record (transcript).
A copy of the student’s introduction letter issued by the university with a recent date.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: To be of Saudi nationality.

To have one of the following qualifications: * A student at the bachelor’s level (or any higher degree) in colleges of administrative sciences from Saudi universities and other recognized universities. * A student at the diploma level in accounting from Saudi universities, colleges, institutes, or similar recognized bodies.

services.name: Approved accounting standards - hard copy
services.shortDescription: This service allows you to review the approved accounting standards.

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Saudi Organization for Chartered and Professional Accountants (SOCPA)
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Certified Accounting Standards Service - the paper copy is provided by the Saudi Authority for Auditors and Accountants, through which it provides a printed copy of the official certified accounting standards that are applied in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. These standards are considered the primary reference for accountants, auditors, and governmental and private financial institutions for preparing and presenting financial reports, as they reflect the Saudi financial sector’s commitment to international financial reporting standards with appropriate amendments that are compatible with the local regulatory environment.

The paper version of the standards includes all the standards approved by the Authority’s Board of Directors and issued periodically. They include the approved international accounting standards that address definitions of financial statements, evaluation methods, accounting treatments, required disclosures, and basic accounting policies that must be followed to ensure transparency and credibility. The version also includes details about the approved international auditing standards, which include the method of conducting a review of financial statements, the duties of the auditor, control and quality procedures, in addition to special auditing standards.

The paper copy of the accounting standards is requested through the Authority’s official channels, where professionals and institutions can submit a request to obtain a printed copy for a specific fee that includes printing and delivery costs. The Authority provides technical and information support to ensure that the copy is of the highest quality, in addition to guidance on how to use the standards in preparing reports and disclosures. Having access to a paper copy is an important necessity for many practitioners who prefer to work with tangible versions of standards, especially in environments that require constant review and careful comparison of standards.

The importance of the paper version of accounting standards

Ensure comprehensive access to all details of the standards in a clear and accessible format.
Facilitating field use of standards during financial statement preparation processes.
Providing an official, certified copy that facilitates the auditing and review process.
Accurately supporting compliance with international and local standards.
Enabling practitioners to work efficiently and reliably in the professional environment.

Service-related challenges

Higher cost of printing and distribution compared to digital copies.
The need to periodically update versions to maintain relevance to any new changes.
Delay in arrival of copies due to logistics and distribution operations.
The need to train users to understand and apply written standards accurately.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: According to the agreement to use international standards signed between the Authority and the International Financial Reporting Standards Foundation, only persons residing in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia are entitled to register and view the contents of this page.

services.name: Trademark registration
services.shortDescription: A service that allows the user to request trademark registration.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The trademark registration service is a basic regulatory procedure supervised by the Saudi Authority for Intellectual Property (SAIP), and allows individuals and companies to protect their logos, names, symbols, or marketing innovations from imitation and infringement, while granting them the exclusive right to use and market them within specific classifications of goods or services within the Kingdom. Registration guarantees the owner’s right to take legal action against any party trying to exploit the mark or similarity to it and enhances the market value and commercial reputation of the product or establishment. 

Steps to register a trademark in Saudi Arabia

Initial search: Ensure that the mark is not previously registered in the required category through the database of the Saudi Authority for Intellectual Property.
Submitting an application: Enter the trademark portal via the Authority’s website:
- Fill in the owner’s information (individuals or companies) and attach documents (copy of the mark/commercial registry/identity). 
Pay the application study fee (1000 riyals) and study the mark from the authority within 30-60 days.
The Authority’s decision: Conditional acceptance/final acceptance/rejection with the possibility of amendment/final rejection.
Publication stage: When the application is accepted, the publication fee (1,500 riyals) is paid and the mark is published in the Official Gazette within 60 days for the parties to object. 
Issuing the certificate: If no objection occurs, the final fee (2000 riyals) is paid and the trademark certificate is issued electronically (valid for 10 years, renewable). 

Basic requirements for registering a trademark

A clear digital image of the brand 
Translation of foreign phrases, if any.
Official authorization when applying through an agent 
Proof of ownership of the electronic domain or last name (if any).
International filing certificate, if the mark was previously filed in another country within the past six months.
Experience or qualification certificate if the mark contains an academic degree.

The importance of registering a trademark

Legal protection from imitation and assault within Saudi Arabia. 
An exclusive right to use and develop the mark within its trade category.
Enhancing the confidence of customers, partners and banks in products or services. 
Enabling the trademark owner to take legal action against any infringement or unauthorized use.
Raising the market value of the facility and bringing franchise or expansion opportunities.

Service difficulties and challenges

Rejection of the application due to similarity with other marks or incompatibility with the conditions of the system.
It is necessary to follow up on objections during the publication period and take regular measures to object or defend.
Multiple requirements and necessary documents, and the requirement of translation and documentation for some elements. 
The waiting period for the decision, publication, and objection may extend to several months.
High relative costs of registration for each new class or classification of mark.
requiredDocuments: 1- Brand image.
2- Attach the approval permission of the owner of the name/image/title/logo.
3- Add the meaning of the Arabic word if the word is not understood by the general public.
4- Attach a certificate proving the identity of the domain owner (.com) if the image contains a domain name.
5- Attach the supporting documents verifying the validity of the aforementioned date if the image of the mark contains a Gregorian or Hijri date.
6- Attach proof of eligibility for the academic degree indicated in the image of the trademark to be registered.

7- If the mark was previously submitted within six months in another country, a filing certificate is attached, a certificate showing the date of filing issued by the authority where the application is filed, along with a copy of the previous application and a translation into Arabic. This is within six months from the date of submitting the registration application.
8- Attach the translation of the sign, along with an explanation of how it pronounces foreign phrases, from a certified translator’s office.
9- Attach identification documents if the name is a family name (commercial registry - national ID).
10- Attach the mark registration certificate if the mark is expired and the renewal period has passed and the owner wishes to register it in a different or amended commercial registry.
11- National address.
serviceConditions: 1- It must not be similar to any other sign.
2- It must not be a family name, country name, or product name.
3- The approval of the owner of the name/image/title/logo appearing in the image of the trademark to be registered.
