services.name: Membership in engineering supporting disciplines (specialist)
services.shortDescription: It is a professional registration membership for anyone who holds a bachelor’s degree in one of the natural sciences supporting the engineering sciences from a regular scientific study program in an accredited college or university in the country of graduation, or its equivalent, according to registration requirements.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Engineering Supporting Specialties Membership Service (Specialist) is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, targeting individuals who have qualifications in supporting engineering specialties, who do not hold an official engineer’s license, but work in supportive engineering fields that help in completing and developing engineering projects. This service aims to provide an accredited membership that grants specialists their professional rights, and enables them to participate in practical and training activities organized by the Authority, which enhances their professional competence and is consistent with the Authority’s standards in regulating the engineering labor market.

The application process includes submitting documents proving specialized academic qualifications, in addition to submitting a record of practical experience and contact information. The applicant is subject to a careful review by the Authority to ensure the accuracy of the information and its compliance with government standards. The service provides a package of benefits to members, including the ability to attend technical courses and workshops, and benefit from developmental tests that raise the level of professional performance, as well as enabling members to communicate professionally and effectively with various industrial and engineering sectors within the Kingdom.

The service is characterized by easy procedures through the Authority’s electronic portal, and allows direct follow-up of the status of the application, while providing the necessary technical support, which makes it an ideal choice for specialists in the supporting engineering disciplines who seek to formalize their professional career and raise the level of their skills.

The importance of membership service for engineering supporting specialties (specialist)

Giving specialists official professional recognition to enhance employment opportunities.
Supporting the professional structuring of the engineering labor market and providing an advanced regulatory environment.
Raising technical competence through training programs and professional tests.
Strengthening cooperation and professional networks between members and different sectors.
Ensuring the commitment of workers in support specialties to engineering quality and safety standards.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Difficulty documenting experiences and professional paths accurately, especially for applicants with diverse experiences.
The need to constantly monitor regulatory requirements and regulations that may change periodically.
Ensure that the service reaches all target groups, especially those working in the informal sectors.
Continuous development of the electronic platform to meet members’ needs and improve the user experience.
requiredDocuments: Attach the necessary documents to complete the registration process (ID/border number, passport, work identification letter, academic record).

An equivalence certificate from the Ministry of Education for those holding qualifications from outside the Kingdom (for Saudis) or authentication of the certificate from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Cultural Attachés (for non-Saudis).
serviceConditions: Obtaining the necessary academic qualification in one of the natural sciences specializations supporting the engineering sciences.
Signing the acknowledgment and authorization.
Pay the prescribed registration fees depending on the number of years of membership required.
Study application fee: 500 Saudi riyals (paid once).
Government fees for membership, first year 250 riyals, second year 500 riyals, third year 750 riyals.
Approval depends on the application according to its examination by the system.

services.name: Technical Memberships (Technician - Senior Assistant Technician - Assistant Technician)
services.shortDescription: It is a professional registration membership for those who work in one of the technical specializations related to engineering sciences or engineering technology.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The technical membership service is one of the services provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, and aims to register and accredit specialists in various technical specializations related to engineering sciences and engineering technology, such as technicians and assistant technicians, to enhance the professional organization of the engineering field within the Kingdom. These memberships target individuals who possess technical qualifications or applied experience in various engineering disciplines but do not hold official professional engineering licenses.

The service enables technicians to create an approved membership file electronically, allowing them to obtain their professional rights and participate in the Authority’s training and development programs, which raises the level of their skills and technical competence. Technical membership also provides the ability to communicate directly with the Authority and obtain technical support and updated information in their field of specialization. Admission to these memberships depends on submitting a diploma or its equivalent, in addition to proof of relevant professional experience, with the possibility of submitting a letter of acknowledgment and authorization in some cases. Applications are reviewed electronically to ensure that the conditions and laws are met.

The Authority also manages the renewal and promotion process electronically, which saves technicians time and effort and ensures continuity of membership with clear legal and professional benefits.

The importance of technical membership service

Careful professional organization of technicians to enhance the quality and efficiency of engineering and technical work.
Providing continuous training opportunities and enhancing the professional capabilities of technicians through the Authority’s programs.
Enabling technicians to participate effectively in engineering projects through official recognition of their membership.
Strengthening the relationship between the Authority and technicians to support the development of technical specializations in the Kingdom.
Enhancing the protection of professionals and providing an accurate database for users of technical services.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

The difficulty of formally documenting professional experience for many technicians, especially those coming from unregulated work environments.
The need to constantly update membership requirements to keep pace with technical and engineering developments.
Dealing with requests from some technicians was delayed due to lack of documents or incomplete conditions.
The need to improve technical support systems and follow-up services to ensure the satisfaction of technical membership members.
requiredDocuments: Attach the certificate in one of the technical specializations that meets the required technical professional degree.

Attach certificates of practical experience certified by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for expertise from outside the Kingdom, and attestation by the Chamber of Commerce (electronic documentation) for expertise from within the Kingdom (according to the acceptance criteria for the required technician membership).

Attach the necessary documents to complete the registration process (ID/border number, work visa, passport, work identification letter, certificate, academic record). Saudi: Equivalency certificate from the Ministry of Higher Education for those holding qualifications from outside the Kingdom or authentication. Non-Saudi: Authentication of the certificate from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Cultural Attachés.
Attach the professional license or license.
Attach documented experience of no less than 5 years.
Attach your high school certificate.
ID photo.
A copy of the passport.
Personal photo.
serviceConditions: Attach the certificate in one of the technical specializations that meets the required technical professional degree.

Attach certificates of practical experience certified by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for expertise from outside the Kingdom, and attestation by the Chamber of Commerce (electronic documentation) for expertise from within the Kingdom (according to the acceptance criteria for the required technician membership).

Attach the necessary documents to complete the registration process (ID/border number, work visa, passport, work identification letter, certificate, academic record). Saudi: Equivalency certificate from the Ministry of Higher Education for those holding qualifications from outside the Kingdom or authentication. Non-Saudi: Authentication of the certificate from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Cultural Attachés.
Study application fee: 500 Saudi riyals (paid once).
Government fees for membership: The first year is 200 riyals, the second year is 400 riyals, and the third year is 600 riyals.
Signing the acknowledgment and authorization.
Payment of registration fees.
Approval depends on the application according to its examination by the system.

services.name: Student membership
services.shortDescription: Membership for students of academic levels in engineering majors.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The student membership service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, targeting students who are studying in the fields of engineering and supporting engineering specializations at the bachelor’s or diploma levels from regular and accredited scientific academic programs in recognized colleges or universities inside or outside the Kingdom. This service aims to provide an official membership for students that will allow them to begin building their engineering career, and enable them to benefit from the benefits and educational and training programs organized by the Authority, in addition to facilitating communication with the organizing body to help them develop their skills and gain the necessary experience to ensure success in the engineering labor market in the Kingdom.

The registration process includes filling out the membership application form via the Authority’s electronic platform, uploading basic documents such as a letter introducing the academic stage, transcript of grades or academic record, and submitting complete personal data. The Authority reviews registration applications, verifies the validity of the qualifications submitted, and then issues a membership certificate that is added to the student’s professional file within the Authority.

 The service also allows students to follow up on the application electronically and obtain immediate notifications about the status of the application, with the possibility of renewing membership as long as the student continues to study. Membership aims to provide a stimulating and supportive environment to build an engineering professional future in accordance with the standards of the Saudi Council of Engineers.

The importance of student membership service

It allows students to begin forming a professional identity approved by the Saudi Council of Engineers.
It allows the student to follow the latest training programs and specialized workshops.
It contributes to building an updated database for all students entering the engineering labor market.
Facilitates coordination between the Authority and educational institutions to support the student’s career path.
It provides the student with multiple benefits, including technical support and career guidance.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Challenges related to ensuring the reliability and validity of documents and information provided by students.
Difficulty in following up on the status of requests in some cases due to administrative delays or platform technology.
Some students are unaware of the importance of registration and its impact on their professional future.
The constant need to update regulations and procedures to match academic and labor market developments.
requiredDocuments: Attach a recent letter of introduction from the university explaining the specialization and student status.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: Government fees for one year membership are free.

services.name: Interested in membership?
services.shortDescription: Membership for those interested in engineering specializations and their sciences

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Interested Membership Service is a specialized service provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, directed to individuals interested in the fields of engineering and its sciences, but who do not hold accredited engineering certificates or official professional licenses. This membership provides those interested with the opportunity to join a professional platform that provides them with access to the latest engineering developments, participate in events and training programs, and benefit from the Authority’s services that enhance their understanding and skills in various fields of engineering. Matham membership provides a supportive professional identity that allows them to communicate with the engineering community within the Kingdom, which contributes to developing their expertise and increasing their technical and professional knowledge.

The registration process for the Interested Membership service takes place through the Authority’s electronic platform, where the membership form is filled out and documents proving interest in the fields of engineering are uploaded, in addition to submitting some basic data such as national ID or residency and a personal photo. Applications are subject to a review stage to ensure that the conditions are met, and the period for verifying the educational qualification may take up to three months in some cases. After acceptance, the member can receive the membership certificate and membership card from the Authority’s main headquarters or one of its branches, with the possibility of requesting delivery by mail for an additional fee.

The importance of membership service is interested

It gives specialists and amateurs an approved professional platform for development and communication.
It enhances the knowledge of those interested in the latest engineering standards and innovations in the field.
It opens opportunities to participate in training programs and workshops organized by the Authority.
Increases opportunities to learn and interact with a professional community that discusses engineering challenges.
It supports building a reliable database for those interested in the field of engineering within the Kingdom.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Ensure the validity and reliability of documents and data submitted by applicants.
The need for continuous monitoring of the system and updates to ensure compatibility with the Authority’s strategy.
Difficulty in delivering the service to all those interested, especially from remote areas or unorganized groups.
The challenge is to encourage applicants to interact and participate effectively within the Authority’s programs.
requiredDocuments: the biography.
Personal photo.
ID photo.

services.name: Renewal of professional accreditation (engineer - architect - technical engineer)
services.shortDescription: The professional accreditation system enables the engineer to manage his personal file without the need to review the authority and implement many self-services such as requests for renewal or promotion or renewal and promotion, applying for professional tests, linking with passports for expatriates, and many other services through the electronic services portal.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The professional accreditation renewal service is one of the central electronic services provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers. It aims to enable engineers, architects, and technical engineers to update and approve their professional files periodically, with the aim of continuing to practice the profession in accordance with the approved legal standards and regulations. The service allows beneficiaries to submit an electronic renewal request through the Authority’s platform without the need to visit the Authority’s centers directly, which speeds up procedures and saves time and effort.

The renewal system is based on fulfilling several conditions, including that membership be valid, and achieving a specific number of continuing professional development points during the previous accreditation period according to the professional grade (for example, 60 points for an associate, 40 points for a professional, and 30 points for a consultant). Renewal also includes paying the prescribed fees and completing the necessary professional tests for those who have not passed them previously. The Authority reviews the application and verifies that all requirements are met, then issues an updated professional accreditation certificate proving the continuity of accreditation and the validity of membership.

The electronic platform provides accurate monitoring of the status of the application, with the possibility of receiving the certificate electronically or by receiving it from the authority’s branches, or delivering it by mail for a fee. The renewal also includes updating personal and professional data to ensure the accuracy of the authority’s professional records.

The importance of the professional accreditation renewal service

It enhances the continuity of practicing the profession in accordance with standardized and advanced engineering practices.
It ensures updating professional skills and knowledge through development points and continuous training.
It maintains the legal relationship between the engineer and the authority and provides professional protection.
It facilitates the renewal of the professional classification without the need for paper procedures or in-person reviews.
Ensures the accuracy and improvement of the Authority’s certified engineers’ database.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Ensure that the engineer verifies all professional development requirements and pays fees on time.
Difficulties in passing professional exams, especially for those who have not taken them previously.
Delay in reviewing applications due to lack of documents or failure to complete the required points.
Continuous updating of regulations and requirements, which requires continuous follow-up by engineers.
requiredDocuments: Attach the necessary documents to complete the registration process (ID/border number, passport, work identification letter, certificate from behind, academic record).

An equivalence certificate from the Ministry of Education for those holding qualifications from outside the Kingdom (for Saudis) or authentication of the certificate from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Cultural Attachés (for non-Saudis).
The academic certificate is certified by the Saudi Foreign Ministry.
serviceConditions: Obtaining the necessary academic qualification in one of the engineering/architectural/technical engineering specializations.
The engineer, architect, and technical engineer must each hold a bachelor's degree in their specializations.
Approval depends on the application according to its examination by the system.
Government fees for renewing membership, the first year is 250 riyals, the second year is 500 riyals, the third year is 750 riyals.
Signing the acknowledgment and authorization.

services.name: Renewal of technical memberships (technician - senior assistant technician - assistant technician)
services.shortDescription: It is a professional registration membership for those who work in one of the technical specializations related to engineering sciences or engineering technology.​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The technical membership renewal service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, and is part of the professional accreditation system that aims to periodically renew the technical accreditation of technicians and assistant technicians in various grades. This service allows technicians whose memberships have expired or are about to expire the ability to submit a membership renewal request electronically through the Authority’s platform with ease, without the need to visit Authority centers directly, which saves time and effort and ensures continuity of professional accreditation according to the governing regulations.

The renewal process requires fulfilling a set of requirements, including paying the prescribed fees for renewing membership, which is 200 riyals per year, in addition to submitting the required documents such as proof of practical and training experiences acquired during the previous membership period. Applicants must also ensure that their personal and professional data is updated to ensure the accuracy of the Authority’s records. The Authority reviews the application and verifies that all conditions have been completed before approving the renewal, and issues a modern accreditation certificate indicating the new validity date of the membership.

The Authority provides the ability to follow up on the application via the electronic platform. The technician can also receive the renewal certificate electronically or go to the Authority’s headquarters to receive it or request its delivery. This service works to enhance the professional discipline of technicians, improve the quality of technical services provided in the Saudi market, and ensure that technicians adhere to the regulatory and development standards necessary to continue practicing their professional activity.

The importance of the technical membership renewal service

Ensures the continuity of practicing artistic work in a legal and orderly manner.
Promotes technical skills development through compliance with renewal and training requirements.
It facilitates renewal procedures for technicians through the digital platform without the hassle of visiting the Authority’s centers.
It contributes to raising the quality of technical performance in various engineering sectors.
It supports the Authority in updating the database of accredited persons accurately to enhance control and quality.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Difficulty confirming and documenting the experiences and training acquired during the membership period.
Challenges in matching applicants’ data with the Authority’s database when requesting renewal.
Possibility of delaying the review of applications due to missing documents or incomplete updating of information.
The continuous need to develop the electronic system and improve the user experience to ensure easy access to the service.
requiredDocuments: Attach the certificate in one of the technical specializations that meets the required technical professional degree.

Attach certificates of practical experience certified by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for expertise from outside the Kingdom, and attestation by the Chamber of Commerce (electronic documentation) for expertise from within the Kingdom (according to the acceptance criteria for the required technician membership).

Attach the necessary documents to complete the registration process (ID/border number, work visa, passport, work identification letter, certificate, academic record). Saudi: Equivalency certificate from the Ministry of Higher Education for those holding qualifications from outside the Kingdom or authentication. Non-Saudi: Authentication of the certificate from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Cultural Attachés.
Attach the professional license or license.
Attach documented experience of no less than 5 years
Attach your high school certificate.
Personal photo.
serviceConditions: Government fees for renewing membership, the first year, 200 riyals, the second year, 400 riyals, the third year, 600 riyals.
Signing the acknowledgment and authorization.
Approval depends on the application according to its examination by the system.

services.name: Renewal of membership in engineering supporting specialties (specialist)
services.shortDescription: It is a professional registration membership for anyone who holds a bachelor’s degree in one of the natural sciences supporting the engineering sciences from a regular scientific study program in a college or university recognized by the country of graduation or its equivalent according to registration requirements.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The membership renewal service for engineering supporting specialties (specialist) is one of the professional services provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, and aims to maintain the continuity of accreditation of specialists in supporting engineering specialties, ensuring the updating of their qualifications and following up on professional developments in the various fields of engineering. This type of membership targets professionals who hold a specialist’s degree in engineering-related specialties, such as technical and technical support, and provides them with continuity in practicing the profession within the framework of the Authority’s professional systems and controls.

The membership renewal process is completed by submitting an electronic application through the official authority platform, which includes filling out data and updating personal and professional information, as well as attaching the required documents, including a copy of the national ID or residence permit, academic record, previous specialist certificate, or current membership permit. The applicant must be persistent in collecting continuing professional development points determined by the Authority as a condition for renewing membership, as membership requires a 200 riyal annual fee to renew professional accreditation for each year, and renewal usually takes 10 working days.

One of the criteria for renewal is also to ensure the continuity of active membership without interruption, while adhering to the organizational and professional regulations governing the supporting specialties. The Authority provides training programs and courses that help specialists keep pace with technical and legislative updates in their field of specialization. It also provides technical support service and answers applicants' inquiries to ensure the process is smooth and completed efficiently.

The importance of the membership renewal service for engineering supporting specialties (specialist)

Ensuring the continuity of practicing the profession within approved regulatory frameworks.
Updating technical knowledge and developing skills to keep pace with engineering developments.
Maintaining the professional rights and facilities granted by the Authority to specialists.
Enhancing the quality of engineering work in sectors that enhance the growth of the national economy.
Supporting professional communication and exchanging experiences among associates.

Service-related challenges

It is necessary to fulfill the conditions for development points periodically to confirm eligibility.
Commitment to membership renewal dates to avoid interruption of accreditation.
Dealing with high requests during renewal registration periods.
Ensuring the accuracy and validity of the data and documents provided to speed up the process.
requiredDocuments: An equivalence certificate from the Ministry of Education for those holding qualifications from outside the Kingdom (for Saudis) or authentication of the certificate from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Cultural Attachés (for non-Saudis).
Attach the necessary documents to complete the registration process (ID/border number, passport, work identification letter, academic record).
serviceConditions: Obtaining the necessary academic qualification in one of the natural sciences specializations supporting the engineering sciences.
Signing the acknowledgment and authorization.
Government fees for renewing membership, the first year is 250 riyals, the second year is 500 riyals, the third year is 750 riyals.
Approval depends on the application according to its examination by the system.

services.name: Interested in renewing membership?
services.shortDescription: Membership for those interested in engineering specializations and their sciences

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Interested Membership Renewal Service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Council of Engineers, directed to members of the “Interested” category who wish to renew their membership that is about to expire or has expired, in order to continue benefiting from the benefits available to them within the Authority. This service allows members to manage their applications electronically through the Authority’s platform with ease and convenience, which reduces time and effort and gives them the ability to follow the status of the application directly without the need to visit the Authority’s headquarters.

To renew an interested membership, it is required to pay the renewal fee for the category, which amounts to 450 riyals for three years, and the previous membership must be in an active status or not a long period has passed since it expired. The renewal process includes updating the member’s personal and professional data, while ensuring compliance with the regulations and instructions issued by the Saudi Council of Engineers. The electronic system reviews applications and ensures that they meet the conditions before approving them. An acknowledgment of approval is sent and an updated membership certificate proving continued membership is received within the member’s file in the Authority.

The Authority provides technical support and guidance during the renewal process, with the possibility of receiving the certificate electronically, through the Authority’s branches, or through the mail delivery service for an additional fee, which enhances their experience and professional competence.

The importance of the membership renewal service is interested

Continuing to benefit from the benefits provided by the Authority to members of the interested category.
Providing the opportunity to pursue professional development and participate in training activities and programs.
Ensuring that the member remains in constant contact with the Authority and has access to the latest engineering and professional developments.
Strengthening professional identity and achieving continuity in the professional accreditation process.
Facilitating membership management procedures and following up on requests electronically, professionally and easily.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

It is necessary to confirm payment of fees in a timely manner to avoid interruption of membership.
The challenge of updating and monitoring member data continuously and correctly.
Dealing with peak times in receiving requests that may lead to delays in examining requests.
The continuous need to improve and develop the electronic system and provide the necessary support to all applicants.
requiredDocuments: the biography.
Personal photo.
ID photo.
serviceConditions: Government fees for renewing membership, first year, 100 riyals, second year, 200 riyals, third year, 300 riyals.

services.shortDescription: This service allows issuing authorization for another person to obtain licenses, permits, and use commercial records

services.name: Electronic publishing house license
services.shortDescription: It is responsible for issuing any scientific, cultural, or artistic production in electronic form for the purpose of circulation

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
An electronic publishing house license is an official permit regulated by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which grants institutions and companies the ability to issue and publish scientific, cultural, or artistic production in an electronic format for the purpose of distribution and circulation on the Internet. The publishing house must obtain ownership of an effective electronic domain, provide proof of practicing media activity electronically on a regular basis, and have a commercial register containing the required media activity. It is also required to specify a clear national address and a valid ID for the applicant, whether Saudi or resident, and the availability of the academic qualification of the responsible director or editor-in-chief. This service aims to regulate the movement of electronic publishing, ensure the quality of the content provided, protect intellectual property, and facilitate oversight and clearance processes by the competent authorities. By activating this license, the publishing house becomes legally eligible to present its work through digital platforms and move from traditional publishing to electronic distribution, which supports the growth of digital local content and enhances media cultural diversity in Saudi Arabia.

The importance of licensing an electronic publishing house

Ensuring the protection of copyright and intellectual property of content owners.
Enhancing the confidence of government agencies and users in publications and digital publications produced within the Kingdom.
Supporting the cultural and media movement by providing a legal issuance mechanism for digital content.
Facilitating the process of monitoring electronic publications and facilitating procedures for legal clearance of content.
Opening opportunities for investment in the digital publishing market and providing advanced services to creators and publishing institutions.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing an electronic publishing house

It is necessary to fulfill all regulatory requirements and official documents, such as proof of domain ownership, commercial registry, and national address.
Requirements for the academic qualifications and experience of the director or editor-in-chief and what this may pose as an obstacle for some small institutions or new publishers.
High operating costs and continuous development of the electronic platform to maintain quality and comply with regulatory standards.
Facing the high competitiveness in the local and global digital publishing market, and the requirements for innovation in digital marketing.
Continuous monitoring of updating the systems and regulations related to electronic publishing and content compliance with Saudi legal and cultural requirements.
requiredDocuments: A contract of incorporation indicating the details of the partners, ID numbers, and nationalities.
Verify domain ownership.
Proof of activity.
Identity numbers and nationalities.
serviceConditions: He must not be less than 25 years old.
In the case of companies, the previous conditions apply to their representatives.
National Classification of Economic Activities Code 581106.

services.name: License for individuals to submit advertising content via social media platforms (trusted)
services.shortDescription: A service through which a license can be obtained to provide advertising content by individuals via social media platforms. The advertisement includes the individual’s promotion of a brand, product, service, event, or commercial event. This license excludes the individual’s advertisement of his own product or service through his personal account.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A “trusted” license is an official license issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It is a mandatory condition for individuals to engage in the activity of providing advertising content on various social media platforms such as Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Snapchat, and Facebook. This license aims to regulate the digital advertising sector, protect consumer rights, and ensure that advertisers adhere to legal and regulatory frameworks to achieve greater transparency and responsibility in the Saudi digital advertising market. Individuals holding a license may submit advertisements for any products or services, provided that they adhere to the controls and standards set by the Authority, which include age classification of content, credibility controls, and a commitment to delete any violating content immediately upon the Authority’s request without objection.

To obtain a license, the applicant must be a Saudi or reside within the Kingdom, and must not be less than 18 years old, and must not have a criminal record for crimes against honor or trust. The content published during the previous six months must also be compatible with the Authority’s regulations, with the need to register the accounts through which it will be advertised and prove their ownership, which ensures the transparency and credibility of advertising activity. Strict penalties are imposed on violators, including stopping advertising and imposing financial fines that may reach 500,000 riyals.

The importance of a “trusted” license

Regulating and monitoring the advertising market via social media platforms in accordance with local regulations.
Protecting the rights of the public and consumers from advertisements that are misleading or that violate ethics and laws.
Enhancing the confidence of users and advertisers in advertising content via social media.
Providing a fair market environment that allows transparent competition between advertising content creators.
Enabling individuals to carry out their advertising activity in a legal manner that protects them from legal accountability.
Difficulties and challenges related to a “trusted” license

Fulfilling all regulatory conditions and constantly adhering to the updates and requirements issued by the Authority.
It is necessary to provide accurate and comprehensive information about the accounts and platforms through which advertising will be made.
Immediate commitment to delete the violating content based on the Authority’s request without objection.
Licensing costs and fees that may be a burden on some individuals or small content creators.
Intense competition in the digital advertising market and the need for continuous innovation to maintain excellence.
requiredDocuments: Proof of Facebook account ownership.
Proof of Tik Tok account ownership.
Proof of Instagram account ownership.
Proof of Snapchat account ownership.
Verify ownership of your YouTube account.
Verify ownership of a Twitter account.
Proof of ownership of a Jacko account.
serviceConditions: The applicant must be at least 18 years old.
The license applicant must pledge to abide by the terms and conditions for individuals submitting advertising content via social media platforms issued by the Authority.
The license applicant must pledge to adhere to the controls regarding content, advertisements, classifications (including age classification), and instructions issued by the Authority.
The license applicant must undertake to provide any data, information or reports requested by the Authority.
The license applicant must pledge to stop advertising any media content immediately and without objection upon the Authority’s request.
The license applicant must pledge not to display any advertisement except through an account registered with the Authority and linked to the license granted to the licensee.

The resident or foreign investor is required to have a license (audio and visual media advertising offices, marketing offices, and advertising agencies) and his percentage of ownership in the company must not be less than 50%, according to the data registered with government agencies.

services.name: License to operate an “production” studio
services.shortDescription: The license means providing: audio-visual media services through studios and sites equipped to produce and/or record professional media content for all purposes. Studios are divided into two categories: 1- Fixed studio: a site equipped to produce and/or record media content, including permanent supervision and control rooms. 2- Mobile studio: A mobile vehicle or mobile vehicle containing the equipment necessary to produce and/or record digital content.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license to operate a “production” studio is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which aims to regulate the activity of producing and recording visual and audio media content through fully equipped studios, whether fixed or mobile. Studios host all types of media production, such as filming TV shows, films, advertisements, and digital content. A fixed studio is a fully equipped location that includes permanent supervision and control rooms, while a mobile studio is a mobile vehicle or vehicle equipped with production equipment to record content on the go.

Obtaining a license requires the fulfillment of several conditions, including the applicant obtaining a license for audio-visual media production, the presence of a commercial register to which the required media activity is added, the presence of a valid national address, and the validity of the applicant’s identity. A detailed list of all equipment and devices used in the studio must also be provided to ensure strict technical and organizational standards.

This license represents a legal guarantee that gives institutions the ability to operate within a regulated and technologically advanced environment, which contributes to the development of the audiovisual media industry in the Kingdom, and provides confidence to viewers and investors in the quality of the various media products that are produced.

The importance of a license to operate a “production” studio

Organizing the media production process according to a legal framework that ensures the integrity and reliability of the content.
Protecting the rights of all parties in the audiovisual media industry.
Providing a technologically advanced production environment that keeps pace with global developments in the media.
Enabling enterprises to compete in the local and regional market in a systematic manner.
Supporting cultural and media diversity by producing content that reflects society’s identity and values.

Difficulties and challenges related to a license to operate a “production” studio

The high costs required to equip a fixed or mobile studio with the latest technical equipment.
The necessity of strict adherence to supervision and control procedures, which requires additional investments in infrastructure.
Continuous requirements for updating and maintaining equipment to ensure continuity of production quality.
Continuous coordination with regulatory authorities and compliance with new and changing regulations in the audiovisual media sector.
The need for a specialized technical and administrative staff to ensure that the studio is managed efficiently and professionally.
requiredDocuments: A commercial register containing the required media activity.
The license applicant must have a specific address (national address).
The applicant’s ID must be valid (national ID - resident ID - passport).
Attach a list of all devices, equipment and systems used in the studio.
serviceConditions: The vehicle form if the request is for a mobile studio, and it must be on the entity’s ownership and valid.
The entity must have a license to produce audio-visual media content.
Code of the national classification of economic activities 591105 592014 591204

services.name: Printing license
services.shortDescription: Automatic printing of words and images on paper, cloth, or the like.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A printing license is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which aims to regulate the activity of automatic printing of words and images on paper, cloth, or other materials in accordance with the approved rules and regulations. Obtaining this license requires that the institution or company be registered in the commercial registry, with the addition of the required media activity, and that it have a clear national address. The applicant is required to be the owner of the institution or the director of the company, and to have an educational qualification of no less than elementary school, along with providing proof of practicing the activity and a pledge to adhere to the printing and publications controls stipulated in the system.

Licensing allows companies and institutions to practice all printing activities in a regular and legal manner, ensuring the protection of intellectual rights and the official character of printed products. It is also applied to the pre-printing processes of preparation, design and sorting, to ensure uniformity in the quality of the services provided and compliance with technical specifications. License holders are also committed to periodic monitoring by the competent government authorities, which contributes to controlling the market and protecting the consumer from fraudulent or illegal products.

The license is usually valid for three years, and requires renewal before its expiration to ensure legal and orderly business continuity. The Authority provides technical support and guidance to beneficiaries throughout the processing period to facilitate the completion of procedures as quickly as possible and reduce any obstacles.

The importance of printing licensing

Regulating the printing market and protecting the intellectual rights of publications inside Saudi Arabia.
Ensuring the quality of printed products and their adherence to technical and professional standards.
Providing a legal production environment that helps the development of the printing and publications industry.
Enabling companies to enter a regulated competitive market while maintaining their reputation.
Limiting the spread of illegal or leaked publications that may negatively affect the national economy.

Difficulties and challenges related to printing licensing

Fulfilling the regulatory requirements and supporting documents such as the commercial register, national address, and necessary documents.
Adherence to monitoring procedures and periodic checks that may require additional investments.
Providing evidence of activity and production quality, which may represent a challenge for small projects.
Financial costs associated with obtaining a license and renewing it annually.
The necessity of constantly updating equipment and technologies to keep pace with technical developments and ensure competition.
requiredDocuments: Proof of activity.
serviceConditions: The applicant must be a director of the company in the case of companies (and registered in the commercial registry)
The applicant must be the owner of the institution in the case of (institutions)
The media activity must be added to the commercial register.
Code of the National Classification of Economic Activities: 181100

services.name: Issuing a license for audio-visual media advertising offices, marketing offices, and advertising agencies
services.shortDescription: Practicing activities related to the design and implementation of commercial, editorial, pictorial, drawn, and spoken advertisements, and issuing calendars, calendars, commercial and economic guides, service guides, gifts, and the like, as well as preparing and implementing marketing campaigns related to goods and services, as well as for advertising and advertising facilities. Marketing that promotes goods, goods or services via visual and audio media. This includes: supervising customer accounts on social networking sites and similar services.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Licensing audio-visual media advertising offices, marketing offices, and advertising agencies is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and aims to regulate the practice of media and advertising activities in a legal and professional manner. The service allows institutions and companies to provide services for designing and implementing commercial advertisements in various forms, whether they are editorial, pictorial, drawn, or spoken advertisements, or through preparing marketing campaigns related to goods and services. The license also includes supervising customer accounts on social media sites and digital marketing services, ensuring adherence to quality and transparency standards.

To obtain this license, a commercial register containing the required media activity is required, a specific national address must be provided, and the applicant’s ID must be valid, whether it is a national ID, a resident ID, or a passport. It is also required to prove the competence of the applicant or administrative official in managing the activity, and to pledge not to promote any products or services that violate the controls of visual and audio media content and advertising content.

This license is considered essential to provide a fair market environment that guarantees the protection of consumers and the development of the media and advertising sector in line with local laws and the Kingdom’s Vision 2030 for digital transformation and innovation in the media.

The importance of licensing advertising offices

Organizing advertising activities to ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
Protecting the rights of consumers and advertisers by setting clear standards for media and advertising content.
Enhancing opportunities for fair competition between advertising and marketing service providers.
Raising the level of professional quality in the audiovisual media and digital marketing industry.
Creating a reliable environment that stimulates investment and stimulates the national economy in the media and advertising sector.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing advertising offices

Fulfilling legal registration requirements such as commercial registry, national address, and valid ID.
It is necessary to demonstrate administrative and technical competence to manage the activity while providing clear commitments and pledges.
Organizations adhere to regulations on media content, which requires continuous monitoring and immediate correction measures.
Bearing the annual and operational costs to continue the activity while maintaining the quality of services.
Facing an increasingly competitive environment requires continuous development in marketing methods and advertising techniques.
requiredDocuments: A commercial register containing the required media activity.
The license applicant must have a specific address (national address).
The applicant’s ID must be valid (national ID - resident ID - passport).
serviceConditions: Providing proof of the competence of the applicant or the facility’s administrative official to manage this activity.
Pledge not to promote goods or goods and services that violate audiovisual media content controls.
The entity requesting the license must pledge when marketing a product, good or service to individuals that they have a license to provide individuals with advertising content via social media.
If an entity desires to produce and photograph advertising content, it is required to obtain a license to produce visual and audio media content.
Code of the National Classification of Economic Activities: 731011.

services.name: Licensing book publishing activity
services.shortDescription: Carrying out activities related to issuing, preparing and financing any written, scientific, cultural or artistic production for the purpose of circulation, as well as participating in book fairs.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A book publishing activity license is a permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, allowing institutions and companies to engage in the activity of issuing, preparing, and financing any written production, whether scientific, cultural, or artistic, for the purpose of circulation. The license includes issuing paper and electronic books, participating in book fairs and organizing related events. The applicant must obtain a commercial register containing the required media activity, a clear national address, and a valid ID, whether the applicant is a Saudi or a resident. Among the accompanying conditions is that the applicant’s academic qualification must not be less than the primary level, along with proof of practicing the activity and a pledge to abide by the applicable rules and regulations.

The book publishing license represents a legal guarantee that authorizes publishers to issue books legally and reliably, guarantees the protection of the rights of authors and publishers in the Kingdom, and also contributes to regulating the publishing market and controlling the quality of published content. Through this license, the compliance of publications with the Sharia system and laws related to security and public order is monitored, which prevents materials that are in violation or that may negatively affect society. Licensing gives publishers the opportunity to expand and reach the public through recognized legal channels, supporting the development of the Saudi publishing industry locally and globally.

The importance of licensing book publishing activity

Protecting the rights of authors and publishers through regulated legal rules and regulations.
Supporting the book publishing industry by providing a stable environment and standard for high-quality publishing.
Enabling institutions to use legal methods for distribution and publishing.
Limiting the spread of infringing publications that may threaten cultural, religious and social values.
Stimulating the cultural and media economy by supporting the local publishing industry and promoting approved publications.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing book publishing activity

Fulfilling the legal registration requirements such as the commercial registry, national address, and valid identity.
Compliance with publishing and distribution controls in accordance with the executive regulations and the system for publishing and publications.
Providing complete documents to prove the activity, quality, and work within the legitimate and legal systems.
The financial cost of licensing, renewing it, and adhering to the required standards.
Meeting the challenges of the changing publishing market and the requirements of continuous content development and digital publishing.

services.name: License to publish newspapers and magazines
services.shortDescription: Carrying out activities related to issuing, preparing and financing any written, scientific, cultural or artistic production for the purpose of circulation, as well as participating in book fairs.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license to publish newspapers and magazines is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and aims to regulate the activity of issuing and managing newspapers and magazines of all types, whether paper or electronic, in accordance with the applicable laws and regulations. The applicant for the license must have a commercial register with the required media activity, a clear national address, and a valid identity for the applicant, whether he is a Saudi national or a resident. The basic conditions for the applicant are that the applicant must not be less than 25 years old, and that he must have a good conduct and conduct, in addition to obtaining an appropriate qualification and following up on updating the academic qualifications of the editor-in-chief.

The license includes monitoring published content, ensuring that newspapers and magazines adhere to ethical and legal standards, especially with regard to not violating the provisions of Islamic Sharia, not disturbing security or public order, and protecting the rights of individuals and institutions. The newspaper or magazine publisher is obligated to clearly state the licensing information on each issue, and is responsible before the law for everything published in its publications. The license also limits the spread of unlicensed newspapers and magazines that may provide misleading or contrary information that may affect public opinion and cultural and social values.

Usually, the General Authority for Media Regulation alerts publishers sufficiently before the license expiration period to prepare the renewal application, while providing technical and guidance support to ensure that all requirements are met at that time, which facilitates maintaining the license and enables publishers to continue their activities easily and smoothly.

The importance of licensing newspapers and magazines

Ensuring the integrity and transparency of the content of published newspapers and magazines.
Protecting copyright and intellectual property of publishers and writers.
Regulating the print media market in a way that preserves cultural and social stability.
Enhancing confidence in the news and information circulated among the public and investors.
Stimulating investment in the media and journalism sector through clear regulatory rules.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the publication of newspapers and magazines

Applicants must meet the requirements of age, qualifications and good reputation.
Adherence to content and legal standards under strict supervision of the competent authorities.
Bearing the administrative costs of issuing and renewing the license and the newspaper or magazine.
The need to modernize and qualify administrative and technical cadres to ensure quality performance.
Facing the challenges of the changing digital media market and the competitiveness of new media.

services.name: Wholesale license for books and magazines
services.shortDescription: Marketing all types of publications, internal and external, at various distribution points, and participating in book fairs.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A wholesale license for books and magazines is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to engage in the activity of distributing and selling books, magazines, newspapers, and educational aids in bulk at various distribution points inside and outside the Kingdom. This license allows applicants to participate in book fairs and organize distribution within legal frameworks to ensure the protection of intellectual property rights and effectively regulate the local market.

To obtain a license, the applicant must have a commercial register with the required media activity, and must have a clear national address and a valid identity (national ID, resident ID, or passport), in addition to the applicant being the owner of the institution or a manager of the company. The license also requires that the applicant’s educational qualification be no less than the primary level, along with actual proof of practicing the activity and a pledge to abide by the regulations and laws in force in Saudi Arabia.

The validity period of a license for the wholesale sale of books and magazines in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia is usually three years from the date of issuance of the license. The license can be renewed before its expiry to ensure that the activity continues in a legal and orderly manner without interruption, by submitting an official request for renewal via the electronic platform approved by the General Authority for Media Regulation.

The importance of licensing the wholesale sale of books and magazines

Organizing the process of distributing books and magazines and ensuring that it proceeds in accordance with legal frameworks.
Protecting the rights of authors and publishers through an official system that preserves intellectual property.
Supporting the local and global market for books and publications with a legal and reliable approach.
Enabling participants in the sector to enter into fair competition in local and international distribution markets.
Promoting the growth of the publishing industry by facilitating seamless access of books and magazines to various points of sale.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the wholesale sale of books and magazines

Adhere to a set of strict regulatory requirements such as commercial registration, national address and valid IDs.
The necessity of submitting documents proving the actual activity and quality of work, which may pose a challenge for small and medium enterprises.
Bearing the financial costs associated with obtaining and renewing the license.
Keeping up to date with regulations and laws governing wholesale activity to ensure full compliance.
Competing with various entities in a highly competitive market that requires continuous innovation in distribution and marketing methods.

services.name: Press services license
services.shortDescription: Providing supportive media services and representing and corresponding with internal and external media outlets.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A press services license is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to provide supportive press media services that include internal and external media outlets, in addition to covering press events and corresponding with various parties. The applicant must be registered with a commercial registry in addition to the required media activity, and must have a clear national address and a valid identity, whether Saudi or resident. The applicant must also be the owner of the institution or the director of the company, and the educational qualification must not be less than the primary level, along with proof of actual activity and a pledge to abide by the relevant laws and regulations.

The license allows the provision of reliable and reliable services in the journalistic field, and ensures the institutions’ commitment to providing balanced and reliable media content, which contributes to raising the quality of media work and protecting the rights of journalistic institutions and their employees. The license also constitutes a legal basis for practicing journalistic activities within an organized environment that ensures respect for laws and protection of national and societal interests.

There are specific categories that can apply and obtain a license for press services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Application is usually limited to institutions and companies officially registered in the commercial registry, and to whose records the media activity of press services has been added. The applicant must be the owner or CEO of the institution, with a valid national ID or residence permit. The applicant must have an appropriate educational qualification, usually not less than the primary level, in addition to having experience or the ability to manage the activity professionally and in compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

The importance of licensing press services

Organizing journalistic activities in accordance with national laws and regulations.
Enhancing the credibility of journalistic institutions and the reliability of the information provided.
Protecting the rights of workers in journalistic institutions and raising the quality of media content.
Enabling institutions to expand their services and areas of work in a legal and orderly manner.
Supporting the national media scene by providing specialized, high-quality journalistic services.

Fulfilling the legal and administrative requirements such as commercial registration, national address, and valid identity.
Adherence to the rules of regulating journalistic content, which require effective and continuous oversight.
Bear the costs associated with obtaining the license and renewing it regularly.

Facing changing market requirements and moving towards interactive digital media.

services.name: License for a platform for distributing visual and audio content via Internet Protocol
services.shortDescription: This license is granted: 1- To operate a cable and television distribution platform, using the Internet Protocol, that is capable of providing visual and audio content through servers, coaxial cables, and fiber optic cables, including broadcasting using Internet Protocol networks. 2- Entities that provide video broadcasting services over a closed network (such as cable services) for the benefit of beneficiaries.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license for a platform for distributing visual and audio content over the Internet Protocol is an official permit provided by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to operate digital platforms specialized in broadcasting visual and audio content over the Internet using the Internet Protocol (IPTV) and modern broadcasting technologies such as cable and fiber optics. The service includes the provision of television content, films, programs, and video games, in addition to live or on-demand broadcast via dedicated platforms.

The applicant must be the owner of the institution or the director of the company, possess a license to produce audio-visual media content, and have a commercial register with the required media activity added, in addition to having a national address and a current and valid ID for the applicant. An integrated economic and operational feasibility study for the project must be presented, in addition to a commitment to apply all information security standards for broadcast servers, and to provide a detailed list of services, packages and subscription prices, while adhering to the technical and regulatory standards issued by the Authority, including age classification and advertisements.

This license is vital for regulating the digital broadcasting market in the Kingdom, ensuring legal compliance for providers, in addition to supporting technical development and enhancing investment opportunities in the digital media sector, while providing diverse and safe content to viewers.

The importance of licensing a platform for distributing visual and audio content

Regulating the digital content distribution market according to clear national standards and strict laws.
Protecting consumers’ rights and ensuring the quality of content through approved mechanisms and controls.
Encouraging investment in the digital content industry and providing job opportunities in the media sector.
Enhancing media diversity and expanding the spread of local content in line with national identity.
Ensure compliance with age ratings and laws regarding advertising and digital content.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing a visual and audio content distribution platform
Requirements for submitting a detailed feasibility study to evaluate the economic and technical feasibility of the project.
The necessity of adhering to information security standards and providing a strong and advanced technical infrastructure.
Submitting periodic reports to the Authority, including the number of subscribers, channels, packages, and subscription prices.
Implementing conditions that packages do not contain hostile channels or sources from hostile countries.
High financial costs related to licensing, construction, and ongoing operation of the platform.

services.name: Licensing of the satellite uplink station
services.shortDescription: A license to provide and operate the satellite uplink service for the purposes of distributing content. The license allows the establishment, operation and maintenance of the following: 1- Mobile communication equipment via satellite; Such as: satellite news gathering vehicles (SNG), and satellite broadcast phones specialized in broadcasting live sports, news, political, cultural, and other events and reports. 2- Assembly platforms that are connected to the fixed overhead link infrastructure; To provide satellite overhead link facilities.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A satellite uplink station license is an official permit granted by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to institutions and companies wishing to provide and operate uplink services via satellite for the purposes of distributing audio-visual media content. The license allows the construction, operation and maintenance of mobile communications equipment such as satellite news gathering (SNG) vehicles and broadcast phones for broadcasting sports, news, political and cultural events live via aggregation platforms linked to fixed infrastructure.

The applicant must be the owner of the institution or the director of the company, and must have a commercial register plus the required media activity, with a national address and a valid identity (national ID, residency, or passport). The license also requires the submission of a detailed economic and operational feasibility study for the project, and a pledge to abide by the conditions and controls set by the Commission, in addition to providing proof of payment of the financial compensation and the use of the frequency spectrum in accordance with the financial compensation regulations for the frequency spectrum approved by the Communications and Information Technology Commission.

The license period is usually three years with the possibility of renewal, and the Authority imposes continuous monitoring on compliance with technical and regulatory controls to ensure the quality and stability of broadcasting and content linking services.

The importance of licensing the satellite uplink station

Enabling institutions to provide high-quality broadcast services via satellite in a legal and regulated manner.
Support coverage of live events and various events with fast and reliable transmission.
Strengthening national capabilities in the field of satellite broadcasting and improving technical infrastructure.
Ensuring information security and compliance with regulations related to the use of frequency spectrum.
Providing investment and development opportunities in the media and satellite broadcasting sector in the Kingdom.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the satellite uplink station

Providing a detailed feasibility study and high technical requirements to ensure service efficiency.
The necessity of adhering to information security standards and frequency spectrum protection.
High financial costs related to the installation, operation and maintenance of satellite broadcasting equipment.
The need for coordination with multiple government agencies to monitor broadcast services and update regulations.
Requirements for periodic reports, performance follow-up, and collaboration with the Authority in resolving any technical or organizational problems.

services.name: Licensing a distribution platform via satellite receivers
services.shortDescription: A license to operate a satellite channel distribution and management platform, including live satellite broadcast distribution service providers who use a Conditional Access System (CAS) to broadcast audio-visual content.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license for a distribution platform via satellite receivers is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to operate and manage platforms for distributing visual and audio content via satellite using Conditional Access System (CAS) technologies. The license includes live broadcast services and on-demand visual content across multiple satellite channels and management of packages offered to subscribers.

The applicant must possess the commercial register, in addition to the required media activity, and must have a clear national address and a valid identity for the owner or manager. An integrated economic and operational feasibility study for the project must be submitted that proves the feasibility of costs and optimal utilization of the infrastructure. The license holder is also obligated to submit periodic, semi-annual reports to the Authority that include the number of subscribers, financial data, lists of channels and packages, and subscription prices, while adhering to all technical and regulatory specifications, pledging not to provide services to unlicensed parties, and adhering to regulations related to regulatory and family content and age classifications.

The license period is three years with the possibility of renewal. The Authority stresses the necessity of adhering to the conditions in order to obtain stability and quality of services and to achieve the goals of regulating the satellite media market in Saudi Arabia.

The importance of licensing a distribution platform via satellite receivers

Providing a strict legal framework for the management and distribution of content via satellite.
Protecting the rights of subscribers and ensuring the quality of services provided.
Supporting the development of the Saudi satellite market and increasing the diversity of available media content.
Enhancing investor and consumer confidence in satellite broadcasting services.
Contributing to achieving the goals of digital transformation and developing the media sector in the Kingdom.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing a distribution platform via satellite receivers

Requirements for submitting a detailed feasibility study and high technical specifications to ensure efficient operation.
The high financial cost of creating the platform and managing the infrastructure.
It is necessary to submit accurate periodic reports to the Authority and strictly adhere to the regulations.
Dealing with continuous updates in security and technical regulations and implementing parental control.
The need for a qualified technical and administrative team capable of dealing with the complexities of operation and broadcasting via satellite.

services.name: Software retail license
services.shortDescription: The practice of offering and selling local and foreign computer programs and renting them under special licenses from the producers of those programs

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A software retail license is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to engage in the activity of displaying and selling local and international computer software, in addition to renting this software at retail within the Kingdom in a legal and regulated manner. The license requires the presence of a commercial register with the required media activity, a valid national address, a valid ID for the owner or manager, and an educational qualification of no less than the primary level. The applicant must prove the practice of the activity and pledge to abide by the applicable regulations and laws.

There are special conditions for selling foreign software in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

It is necessary to obtain an official license to carry out retail or wholesale sales of foreign software.
Proof of a legal relationship with the owner of the software rights or its authorized agent, and this includes official distribution or licensing contracts.
Commitment to providing authentic copies of the software along with providing the necessary technical catalogs and documentation proving the authenticity of the products.
Adherence to local intellectual property laws, and not dealing with pirated or counterfeit software that exposes the license holder to legal accountability.
Providing proof that the software is compatible with Saudi technical standards and legislation, including security and privacy requirements.
Commitment to inspection and monitoring procedures carried out by the competent authorities to monitor compliance with standards and requirements.

The importance of software retail licensing

Protecting the rights of businesses and consumers by adhering to official and legal standards.
Regulating the market and ensuring the quality of the programs offered and rented.
Promoting fair competition by providing a regular work environment.
Facilitating the acquisition of licensed software that ensures safety and effectiveness of use.
Supporting investors in the technical sector and providing sustainable growth opportunities.

Difficulties and challenges related to software retail licensing

It is necessary to fulfill all regulatory requirements, including a commercial register, a national address, and a valid identity.

Follow up on periodic updates of technical and regulatory systems related to software.

services.name: Licensing copying and photocopying activities
services.shortDescription: Photocopying: The practice of photocopying documents for commercial use Photocopying: The practice of photocopying more than one copy of legible print or images for circulation.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license for copying and photocopying activities is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to engage in the activity of photocopying documents for commercial purposes, in addition to photocopying more than one copy of publications and photos for the purpose of legal circulation. The service is only available to qualified establishments that are legally registered, and to obtain it, they need to fulfill a set of administrative and technical conditions that guarantee the safety of the activity and the establishment’s compliance with local regulations related to copyright and the authenticity of the content.

To obtain a license, a commercial register with the required media activity is required, a specific national address, and a valid ID, whether it is a national ID, residence permit, or passport. The applicant must also be the owner of the institution or the director of the company with a qualification of no less than the primary level, in addition to actual proof of practicing the activity, and submitting a pledge to abide by the approved rules and regulations. The license period is three years and is renewed according to electronic procedures via the government media platform.

Licensed institutions are required to adhere to all standards governing the activity, including not violating Islamic law or the general regulations of the state, and not publishing or copying any content that violates national and cultural values, and placing the licensing data clearly on all copied or photographed publications and documents to ensure control and quality.

The importance of licensing copying and photocopying activities

Regulating photocopying and copying activity and ensuring that establishments adhere to professional ethics and intellectual property laws.
Protecting the rights of authors and publication owners from unauthorized copying.
Providing a safe legal environment that helps limit the spread of infringing documents, books, and images.
Facilitating government oversight of establishments and developing the quality of services provided.
