services.name: Licensing media studies and consultations
services.shortDescription: This service enables carrying out the work of developing economic feasibility studies for media activities and their projects, providing media consultations on the media, their effects and activities, and the extent of their influence through a field study and public opinion polls, developing and preparing studies and research for media campaigns, drawing appropriate plans for them, following them up, and evaluating their results.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license for media studies and consultations is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing companies and institutions to carry out the work of developing economic feasibility studies for media projects, providing consultations to the media and analyzing their effects through field studies and public opinion polls, as well as developing media campaign plans and evaluating their results.

To obtain a license, the applicant must be the owner of the establishment (in the case of institutions) or the director of the company (in the case of companies), that the media activity must be added to the commercial registry, and that the establishment or company must have a specific national address and a valid identity (national ID, residency, or passport). The applicant's educational qualification must not be less than the university level, with the need to prove actual practice of the activity and provide a pledge to abide by the rules and regulations.

The application is submitted through the electronic services portal, and it takes 30 working days to issue the license after meeting all conditions and reviewing the documents. The license period is three years and is renewed according to the procedures approved on the government media platform.

Those holding a license are obligated not to engage in any activities that violate the provisions of Islamic Sharia or public order or threaten national security. The regulations also require oversight of the quality of services and content provided to the public.

Organizing media studies and professional consultations according to a clear legal framework.
Enhancing the credibility of institutions and companies providing the service and the confidence of beneficiaries in the results of studies.

services.name: Electronic press activity license
services.shortDescription: A website with a fixed address that provides online press publishing services (sites that publish news, reports, investigations, articles, etc.) issued on regular or irregular dates.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
An electronic journalism activity license is an official permit provided by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which allows institutions, companies or specialized websites to practice digital journalistic publishing activity via the Internet, whether by transmitting news, investigations, or publishing reports, articles, etc. The license requires the presence of a commercial register containing the required media activity, a specific national address and a valid identity for the owner or manager (national ID, residency, or passport), in addition to proof of actually practicing the activity in electronic publishing.

One of the most important conditions is that the editor-in-chief must be of Saudi nationality, not be less than 18 years old, and have a university qualification or its equivalent. Ownership of the website’s electronic domain must be proven and the editor-in-chief’s qualifications must be supported periodically. The service requires submitting the editor-in-chief's CV and proving the continuity of updating qualifications for technical media leaders.

The license period is only one year, and it takes about 30 working days to issue the license after fulfilling the required conditions through the “Etalam” electronic government platform.

Licensed entities are obligated not to violate the provisions of Islamic Sharia or public order and not to publish any content that affects national values, undermines the credibility of the media, or threatens security. Licensed websites are subject to technical and periodic monitoring to ensure the quality of information and protect users and society from fake news or harmful content.

The importance of licensing electronic journalism activity

Regulating digital press publishing and ensuring that websites adhere to national media standards.
Enhancing confidence in news and electronic content and protecting the public from rumors and misinformation.
Supporting the growth of electronic media institutions and achieving their legal status in the Saudi market.
Protecting the rights of authors, writers and editors through a clear regulatory framework.
Facilitating government oversight of the digital journalism sector and increasing the quality of services provided to society.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing electronic journalism activity

It is necessary to fulfill all regulatory conditions such as commercial registration, domain ownership, qualifications, and identity.

services.name: Photography activity license
services.shortDescription: Practicing activities related to regular or color photography, developing and developing films on paper, cloth, or the like

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A photography activity license is an official permit granted by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, which enables institutions and companies to practice regular or color photography activities, develop and develop films, and provide commercial photography services on paper, cloth, or digital media. The license includes photography in studios, photography of occasions and events, photography of products and advertising and media purposes, in addition to printing and processing services of all types of photographs.

To obtain this license, the applicant must have a commercial register containing the required media activity, a specific national address, and a valid ID (national ID, residency, or passport), and the applicant must be a director of the company(s) or an owner of the institution(s). The applicant’s academic qualification must not be less than the primary level, in addition to proof of actually practicing the activity and providing a pledge to abide by the rules and regulations. Issuing the license usually takes one business day via the government “Etalam” platform, and the license period is three years, subject to renewal.

There are strict obligations regarding not violating privacy regulations, not violating the rights of individuals, photographing them without their permission, or publishing any content that violates Islamic law or the state system or harms the national and cultural values ​​of society. Control systems require licensing information to be clearly displayed on all images and documents produced, while adhering to continuous updates to photography policies in the Kingdom.

The importance of licensing photography activity

Regulating photography activity and ensuring compliance with national and international privacy and copyright laws.
Protecting photographers and clients from manipulation or exploitation and ensuring the quality of the service provided.
Supporting the growth of the commercial photography sector and increasing investment and professional opportunities in the local market.
Reducing privacy issues by regulating the process of photographing in public and private places.
Facilitating government oversight, ensuring the integrity of documents and outputs, and improving customer experience.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing photography activity

Effective management of human and technical resources with a commitment to updating the tools and technologies used.

The preparation of seals is subject to a special license for this from the Ministry.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license for drawing and calligraphy activity is an official permit provided by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to practice the activities of writing calligraphy in its regular or neon types and manufacturing advertising and promotional signs, in addition to drawing, displaying and selling artistic paintings in various forms. The permit also grants the right to carry out the work of news and information signs and designs for visual, artistic and decorative advertisements, and requires that the preparation and licensing of seals be part of separate services.

Obtaining a license requires the presence of a commercial register, including the media activity related to painting and calligraphy, specifying a clear national address, and a valid identity for the owner or manager, whether it is a national identity, residence, or passport. The applicant must be a director of the company or owner of the institution, and the educational qualification must not be less than the primary level, with actual proof of practicing the required activity. Issuing the license usually takes one business day via the official “Etalam” platform, and the license period is three years, renewable.

There are additional requirements related to the location of the establishment, such that it is on a commercial street, while adhering to special building rules, the minimum area of ​​the store, and providing parking for each specific space. The license must be displayed in a prominent place in the store. It is prohibited to exploit the facility for purposes other than what it was licensed for. Municipal approval is required if it is decided to modify the store’s area, change the activity, or link it to unallocated units. In addition, you must adhere to intellectual property rights, not violate cultural or religious values, and not sell or display any content that violates public order and Sharia.

The importance of licensing the activity of drawing and calligraphy

Regulating the market for drawing and calligraphy services and ensuring the quality and creativity of artistic outputs.
Protecting artists and institutions from exploitation or unfair competition in the market.
Promoting national aesthetic and cultural values ​​in artistic works and advertising content.
Facilitating government oversight of activity and ensuring the safety of work facilities from an administrative and technical standpoint.
Providing a safe legal environment that supports investment and development of visual arts and Arabic calligraphy projects.
Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the activity of drawing and calligraphy

Fulfilling the regulatory and administrative requirements of a commercial register, a national address, and an appropriate facility space.
Bearing the financial costs of issuing and renewing the license and arranging the store’s location and equipment.
Adherence to special municipal standards and technical requirements with precise details.
Facing competitiveness in the commercial art market and the need to develop presentation and marketing methods.
It is mandatory to keep up with technical and technical developments to ensure the provision of modern services that keep pace with local demand.
requiredDocuments: Proof of activity.
serviceConditions: The applicant must be a director of the company in the case of companies (and registered in the commercial registry).
The applicant must be the owner of the institution in the case of (institutions).
The media activity must be added to the commercial register.
Code of the National Classification of Economic Activities 731012.

services.name: Retail license for used books
services.shortDescription: Practicing the activity of displaying, selling or renting used books.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A retail license for used books is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, allowing individuals and institutions to engage in the activity of buying and selling used books within the local market in a regular and legal manner. This license guarantees the regulation of used book trade in terms of quality and legality of distribution. It also protects the rights of consumers and contributes to preserving cultural and social values ​​in Saudi society by regulating the circulation of books that may be offered by various websites or libraries.

Obtaining this license requires the presence of a commercial register in addition to the required media activity, in addition to the presence of a national address and a valid identity for the owner or manager, whether it is a national identity, residence, or passport. The applicant must prove that the activity is actually practiced, along with providing a pledge to abide by the rules and regulations of the activity, and is required to adhere to the controls on books sold to ensure that they are free of contents that violate customs and laws.

The license is granted for a renewable period of 3 years, and upon renewal it is required to submit periodic reports and adhere to all laws and regulations governing the used book selling market, while monitoring the quality and legal environment of practice.

The importance of retail licensing for used books

Regulating the used book market and protecting the intellectual and cultural rights of authors and publishers.
Ensuring that the books displayed are free of infringing content and controlling quality and standards.
Providing legal guarantees for individuals and institutions in carrying out legitimate and reliable activities.
Supporting the circulation of used books in a way that promotes reuse and reduces cultural waste.
Providing an organized economic environment that supports small enterprises and contributes to the local economy.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the retail sale of used books
Fulfilling the legal registration requirements and proving actual activity.
Continuous adherence to regulations that impose control on the quality and content of books.
Bearing the costs of licensing and renewing it and adhering to legal updates.
The challenge of competing in the market with the emergence of online digital and used book selling platforms.
The need to ensure that content is compatible with the cultural and religious values ​​of Saudi society.
requiredDocuments: Proof of activity.
serviceConditions: The applicant must be a director of the company in the case of companies (and registered in the commercial registry).
The applicant must be the owner of the institution in the case of (institutions).
The media activity must be added to the commercial register.
Code of the National Classification of Economic Activities 477410.

services.name: Licensing the activity of designing and programming private software
services.shortDescription: The practice of preparing, designing and issuing computer programs and preparing them for printing

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license for special software design and programming activity is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to practice special software design and development activities, including preparing, designing and issuing computer programs and preparing them for commercial or personal use, whether they are office applications, websites, or custom software upon request. The license allows developers and companies to sit on a legal platform that operates within the regulatory framework, which contributes to protecting intellectual property rights and helps promote technical innovation within the Kingdom.

To obtain a license, the applicant must have a commercial register that includes the media activity related to software, have a clear national address, and have a valid identity (national ID, residency, or passport). It is also required that the applicant be at least 25 years old, with an educational qualification of no less than the primary level, provided that the applicant proves that he actually practices the activity and submits a pledge to abide by the rules and regulations governing it. The license period is 3 years with the possibility of renewal, and the license is issued immediately if the conditions are met through the government “Etalam” platform.

The importance of licensing the activity of designing and programming private software

Providing legal protection for developers and companies through a regulatory framework to protect intellectual property rights.
Regulating the private software sector, which enhances the innovation environment and facilitates the legal access of technical products to the market.
Enhancing customer confidence in the quality of the software provided and its commitment to national and international standards.
Supporting the growth of the Saudi digital economy and achieving the goals of Vision 2030 in developing the technology and innovation sector.
Providing a fair competitive environment by organizing professional design and programming activities.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the activity of designing and programming private software

Meet licensing requirements, in particular legal registration, qualifications and required ages.
Ensuring the provision of effective and high-quality services that keep pace with the requirements of the modern and changing market.
Costs and fees associated with licensing and annual renewal.
Technical challenges in software development and the need to follow continuous developments in the field.
Facing intense competition in the market, especially from large international and local software companies.
requiredDocuments: Attach a photo proving the activity.
serviceConditions: The applicant must be at least 25 years old.
Academic qualification: University degree or below. Certificate: (Secondary, Intermediate, Primary).
The applicant must be a director of the company in the case of companies (and registered in the commercial registry).
The applicant must be the owner of the institution in the case of (institutions).
The media activity must be added to the commercial register.
Code of the National Classification of Economic Activities 620102.

services.name: License to sell and rent audio-visual media content
services.shortDescription: It means: a license for the purpose of selling and renting visual and/or audio content through portable and/or physical means (such as: CDs, digital video discs, and Blu-ray discs). This license also applies to all electronic stores that practice this activity in the Kingdom.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A license to sell and rent audiovisual media content is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It allows institutions and companies to sell and rent audiovisual media content via physical or digital means such as CDs, in addition to carrying out the activity through electronic stores and digital platforms within the Kingdom.

The applicant must obtain a commercial register with the required media activity, a clear national address, and a valid identity of the owner or manager, whether it is a national ID, residence permit, or passport. The applicant also undertakes not to purchase or distribute any content except through licensed parties that have a license to import and distribute audio-visual media content. You must adhere to the Authority’s terms and technical specifications, print the age rating on all sold or rented media, and immediately stop distributing content upon the Authority’s request without any objection.

The license is valid for three years, and must be renewed before its expiration. License and renewal fees are paid according to the tariffs issued by the Authority.

The importance of licensing the sale and rental of audio-visual media content

Regulating the audiovisual content market and ensuring the circulation of legal and controlled content.
Protecting the rights of producers and distributors and ensuring safe and age-appropriate content.
Enabling consumers to receive high-quality, clearly labeled content.
Supporting the local digital economy and strengthening the audiovisual media sector in the Kingdom.
Imposing continuous oversight to ensure that companies and all participating parties adhere to regulations and laws.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the sale and rental of audiovisual media content

It is necessary to provide complete and continuous official documents when requesting licensing and renewal.
Financial costs may be high for some institutions, especially small ones.
Dealing with continuous updates in technical and organizational regulations and standards.
Commitment to periodic monitoring and periodic reports addressed to the Authority to ensure compliance.
Facing the market challenges of high competition and changes in digital media demand.
requiredDocuments: A commercial register containing the required media activity.
The license applicant must have a specific address (national address).
The applicant’s ID must be valid (national ID - resident ID - passport).
serviceConditions: The entity requesting the license must undertake not to purchase any visual or audio media content except through licensed entities that have a license to import and distribute visual and audio media content.
Code of the national classification of economic activities 476211 476290 464996 772201 772202.

services.name: Retail sale of media content receivers and accessories
services.shortDescription: A license to sell devices that receive electronic signals, or display media content through any means of communication (satellite or terrestrial communication, etc.), such as: televisions (including smart TVs), radios, and related devices, and accessories for these devices (including receiving dishes, control devices, wires, and parts for operating the device).

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A retail license for media content receivers and their accessories is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to engage in the activity of selling terrestrial and satellite television broadcast receivers and digital content receivers through satellite channels or via the Internet, in addition to selling accessories such as remote controls, antennas, decoders and related technical accessories.

The applicant must have a commercial register that includes the required media activity, a specific national address, and a valid ID for the owner or manager, whether it is a national ID, residence permit, or passport. The licensee is responsible for ensuring that the devices offered for sale are compatible with the technical and technological standards approved in the Kingdom, and that they are not included in the list of prohibited devices. The Authority also requires sellers to adhere to regulatory controls for the import and distribution of electronic devices, including providing guarantees and service standards.

The duration of the license is usually three years, renewable. The license is issued via the “Etalam” electronic platform after fulfilling the conditions and submitting the required documents. License holders must also comply with the Authority’s periodic reports and audit the sales and distribution operations.

The importance of retail licensing for media content receivers and accessories

Regulating the content receiver market and ensuring that vendors adhere to technical and legal standards.
Consumer protection from fraudulent or non-compliant devices.
Supporting the industry of importing and distributing electronic devices in a legal and organized manner.
Enhancing trust between consumers and sellers by ensuring product quality and after-sales service.
Limiting the spread of unlicensed devices that may negatively affect the quality of broadcast reception and the privacy of users.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing the retail sale of media content receivers and accessories

Fulfilling precise regulatory requirements and ensuring that devices comply with technical specifications.
Bearing the costs associated with obtaining the license and renewing it periodically.
Follow up on updating technical standards and laws related to content receiving devices.
Monitoring sales and distribution operations to control the market and prevent the circulation of unlicensed devices.
High market competition, especially with the abundance of new devices and technologies in the market.
requiredDocuments: A commercial register containing the required media activity.
The license applicant must have a specific address (national address).
The applicant’s ID must be valid (national ID - resident ID - passport).
serviceConditions: The entity requesting the license must pledge not to purchase the devices except through entities authorized to license the import and distribution of media content receivers and their accessories.
National classification code for economic activities 475923.

services.name: Terrestrial broadcast station license
services.shortDescription: It is granted to establishments that want to operate a terrestrial broadcast station capable of providing visual and audio content, via radio waves, to broadcast television/radio service.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A terrestrial broadcast station license is an official permit issued by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing institutions and companies to operate terrestrial broadcast stations that provide visual and audio content over radio waves to broadcast television and radio services. The license aims to regulate radio and television broadcasting services in a way that ensures the quality of the content, adherence to the technical and regulatory standards approved by the Commission, and protects the rights of the public to access balanced and reliable media content.

The license requires that the applicant be the owner of the institution or the director of the company, have a commercial register with the required media activity, have a specific national address, and have a valid ID (national ID, residency, or passport). It also requires the submission of a detailed economic and operational feasibility study for the project from a party acceptable to the Authority, in addition to proof of ownership of the property, supplies, and equipment used for the continuation of the license. The Authority must also be provided with a list of service operators and commit to not providing services to parties not licensed by the Authority.

The license is valid for three years, with the possibility of renewal when all conditions and requirements are met. The license issuance process takes approximately 30 working days after completing the data and documents via the “Etalam” electronic services platform.

The importance of licensing a terrestrial broadcast station

Regulating the radio and television broadcasting market and ensuring that companies adhere to technical and legal standards.
Protecting the quality of content and ensuring its diversity in accordance with national and ethical values.
Promoting a culture of responsible media and an informed news community.
Providing a suitable environment for investment in the media and broadcasting sector.
Preventing unlicensed broadcasting and protecting the rights of participating parties and consumers.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing a terrestrial broadcast station

Providing an accurate technical and economic feasibility study that meets the Authority’s requests and requirements.
Strict adherence to technical specifications and security and safety requirements for broadcasting and equipment.
Bearing the costs associated with station licensing, renewal and ongoing maintenance.
Coordination with several government agencies to ensure compliance with frequencies and coverage range.
Competing in a highly sophisticated market requires constant innovation in content and services.
requiredDocuments: A commercial register containing the required media activity.
The license applicant must have a specific address (national address).
The applicant’s ID must be valid (national ID - resident ID - passport).
Submitting a detailed economic and operational feasibility study for the project from a party acceptable to the Authority.
Providing the Authority with a list of service operators.
serviceConditions: Service fees are determined after submitting the application.
Adherence to the technical specifications approved by the Authority for terrestrial broadcasting services.
National classification code for economic activities 602011.

services.name: Publication license
services.shortDescription: This service allows obtaining a publications license (magazines and newspapers).

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
A publication license is an official permit granted by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing individuals and institutions to issue various publications, including books, magazines, newspapers, and paper and electronic brochures. The license is granted in accordance with the Publications and Publishing System, which regulates publishing operations, and aims to regulate printing and distribution in a way that guarantees the rights of publishers and authors, and protects society from violating or harmful content.

To obtain a license, a commercial register with the appropriate media activity is required, along with a fixed national address and a valid ID for the owner or manager. The applicant must adhere to the conditions related to the content of publications. Paper or digital publications may be issued, and each publication must be registered in a way that allows production to be fully monitored and documented.

The license period is usually three years, renewable. The license includes subjecting publications to legal and technical oversight to ensure that they do not violate the provisions of Sharia law and laws related to security and public order.

The importance of licensing a publication

Regulating the publishing market and ensuring that publishing houses and publishers operate within a legal regulatory framework.
Preserving the rights of authors and publishers and protecting the intellectual property of publications.
Reducing the spread of publications that violate or negatively affect social and cultural values.
Facilitating control over the quality of publications and their content to ensure the credibility of publication and distribution.
Supporting the local printing industry and expanding printing and distribution activities.

Difficulties and challenges related to licensing a publication

Meet official registration requirements and keep data updated to ensure compliance.
Adherence to legal and technical regulatory controls on all releases.
Financial costs associated with obtaining and renewing a license.
Dealing with the rapid development of digital content and the need to update legislation to keep pace with developments.
Facing competition with electronic publications and new alternatives in the publishing sector.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: The applicant must be a director of the company in the case of companies (and registered in the commercial registry).
The applicant must be the owner of the institution in the case of (institutions).
The media activity must be added to the commercial register.
The academic qualification of the editor-in-chief must be updated.
Having a prior login to the licensing system.

services.name: Renewing the license for individuals to provide advertising content via social media platforms (trusted)
services.shortDescription: A service through which the license to provide advertising content can be renewed by individuals via social media platforms. The advertisement includes the individual’s promotion of a brand, product, service, event, or commercial event. This license excludes the individual’s advertisement of his own product or service through his personal account.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service for renewing a license for individuals to provide advertising content via social media platforms (trustworthy) is an official service provided by the General Authority for Media Regulation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It allows individuals who hold a trustworthy license to renew their license to practice providing advertisements on social media platforms such as Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Snapchat, and Facebook. The renewal aims to continue practicing the activity in a legal and orderly manner, while maintaining compliance with all of the Authority’s regulations and requirements for monitoring and controlling the quality of advertising content.

To renew the license, the applicant must have a valid trustworthy license and submit the renewal application via the “Etalam” electronic platform or the trustworthy service platform, while updating personal data and information related to advertising activity. The applicant must be committed to not having violated or transgressed the previous license period, in addition to adhering to the controls and standards for advertising content. The renewal process may require the payment of specific fees depending on the regulations, and the application is processed within a short period of time that allows the work to continue without interruption.

The importance of renewing the license for individuals to provide advertising content via social media platforms (trusted)

Ensuring the continuity of individuals’ advertising activity in a legal and disciplined manner.
Maintaining the quality of advertising content in accordance with the Authority’s standards and protecting the public from violating content.
Avoid falling into legal violations and financial or administrative penalties due to the expiration of the license.
Enhancing the confidence of consumers and regulatory agencies in the content presented on social platforms.
Supporting a healthy competitive environment between advertising content makers and the legitimate promotion of products and services.

Difficulties and challenges related to license renewal

It is necessary to follow up on license expiration and renewal dates in a timely manner to avoid stopping activity.
Submit all required documents and data accurately to speed up the processing process.
Permanent adherence to new controls and standards that the Authority may issue during the licensing period.
Payment of estimated renewal fees and no delays in payment.
Keeping up with technical updates to social media platforms and changing requirements in advertising content.
requiredDocuments: Proof of Facebook account ownership.
Proof of Tik Tok account ownership.
Proof of Instagram account ownership.
Proof of Snapchat account ownership.
Verify ownership of your YouTube account.
Verify ownership of a Twitter account.
Proof of ownership of a Jacko account.
serviceConditions: 1- The applicant must be at least 18 years old.
2- The license applicant must pledge to abide by the terms and conditions for individuals submitting advertising content via social media platforms issued by the Authority.
3- The license applicant must pledge to adhere to the controls regarding content, advertisements, classifications (including age classification), and instructions issued by the Authority.
4- The license applicant undertakes to provide any data, information or reports requested by the Authority.
5- The license applicant must pledge to stop advertising any media content immediately and without objection upon the Authority’s request.
6- The license applicant must pledge not to display any advertisement except through an account registered with the Authority and linked to the license granted to the licensee.

7- The resident or foreign investor is required to have a license (audio and visual media advertising offices, marketing offices, and advertising agencies) and his ownership percentage in the company must not be less than 50%, according to the data registered with government agencies.

services.name: Drone registration
services.shortDescription: Drone service is the use of small, remotely piloted aircraft, equipped with cameras and sensors, to carry out various tasks such as aerial photography, geographic surveying, facility monitoring, and delivery. This service provides smart and effective solutions that enable individuals and companies to collect accurate data, monitor locations remotely, and improve business operations in innovative and safe ways.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription: Drone service is the use of small, remotely piloted aircraft, equipped with cameras and sensors, to carry out various tasks such as aerial photography, geographic surveying, facility monitoring, and delivery. This service provides smart and effective solutions that enable individuals and companies to collect accurate data, monitor locations remotely, and improve business operations in innovative and safe ways.
requiredDocuments:
1- Information required in the case of using drones in the specified category: 
- The name of the applicant, and for an applicant other than an individual, 
- The name of the authorized representative applying for the aircraft registration certificate.
- Permanent postal address/national address.  
- If the applicant's permanent mailing address is a PO Box number, the applicant must also provide a current residential address.
- The applicant’s email address or the email address of the authorized representative for applicants other than individuals
- The name and model of the aircraft manufacturer.
- The aircraft serial number, if any.
2- Information required in the case of using open category drones:
- Name of the applicant.
- Permanent postal address/national address.  
- If the applicant's permanent mailing address is a PO Box number, the applicant must also provide a current residential address.
- The applicant's email address.
serviceConditions: 1- It is not permissible to register a drone if the aircraft is registered in a foreign country.
2- It must be owned by a Saudi citizen or it must be owned by a legal and acceptable foreign resident in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (resident).

3- The drone must be registered by its owner using its owner’s legal name, unless the owner is under 18 years of age.  If the owner is under 18 years of age, the drone must be registered by someone at least 18 years old.

4- Government fees:
- Issuing an aircraft registration certificate (commercial drone less than 25 kg) 500 riyals.
- Issuing an aircraft registration certificate (commercial drone more than 25 kg) 5,000 riyals.
- Aircraft registration for recreational use: 250 riyals.

services.name: Val license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms
services.shortDescription: Description of the license What a licensed person can do: • Practice brokerage activity • Create a unified brokerage contract • Contract with one or more other brokers - unless the contract stipulates otherwise - • Marketing and displaying the property, to attract potential clients

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The FAL license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms represents an essential official accreditation for anyone who wishes to enter the world of digital real estate marketing within a safe, regulatory environment in Saudi Arabia. The service is not limited to being an administrative permit, but rather a gateway to accessing the real estate market through approved electronic platforms, allowing brokers and marketers to present their offers and services in an organized and reliable manner. Possessing this license is a major condition for practicing the activity legally within the systems of the Ministry of Municipal, Rural Affairs and Housing, which ensures credibility and protects the rights of both the service provider and its beneficiary. It thus represents an important link between owners, investors and buyers, and enhances the quality of the real estate experience in the digital space.

The FAL license is a pivotal step to ensuring the quality and safety of real estate brokerage operations in Saudi Arabia, and it works to develop the real estate sector by empowering qualified and reliable practitioners, while providing a legal framework that preserves rights and enhances transparency and confidence in the real estate market.

The importance of the FAL license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms

Ensures legal practices compatible with approved systems within the digital real estate market.
It gives greater confidence and reliability to customers searching for electronic real estate contracts or deals.
It constitutes a competitive advantage for offices and platforms that seek to stand out among their competitors.
It helps regulate the relationship between brokers and other parties, and prevent irregular practices.
It supports real estate projects in reaching a larger audience in a safe and reliable way.

Difficulties and challenges related to FAL’s license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms

Obtaining a FAL license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms may face some challenges that require advance preparation, such as requirements for accurate documentation of data and submission of regulatory documents according to specific standards. Also, constant compliance with updates and changes in regulations may constitute a burden on some applicants. Another common challenge is the long review period if the files do not meet the requirements from the beginning, which delays the start of the activity. Add to this the administrative cost and subsequent operational obligations, which may be a barrier for some individuals or small organizations. serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The FAL license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms represents an essential official accreditation for anyone who wishes to enter the world of digital real estate marketing within a safe, regulatory environment in Saudi Arabia. The service is not limited to being an administrative permit, but rather a gateway to accessing the real estate market through approved electronic platforms, allowing brokers and marketers to present their offers and services in an organized and reliable manner. Possessing this license is a major condition for practicing the activity legally within the systems of the Ministry of Municipal, Rural Affairs and Housing, which ensures credibility and protects the rights of both the service provider and its beneficiary. It thus represents an important link between owners, investors and buyers, and enhances the quality of the real estate experience in the digital space.

The FAL license is a pivotal step to ensuring the quality and safety of real estate brokerage operations in Saudi Arabia, and it works to develop the real estate sector by empowering qualified and reliable practitioners, while providing a legal framework that preserves rights and enhances transparency and confidence in the real estate market.

The importance of the FAL license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms

Ensures legal practices compatible with approved systems within the digital real estate market.
It gives greater confidence and reliability to customers searching for electronic real estate contracts or deals.
It constitutes a competitive advantage for offices and platforms that seek to stand out among their competitors.
It helps regulate the relationship between brokers and other parties, and prevent irregular practices.
It supports real estate projects in reaching a larger audience in a safe and reliable way.

Difficulties and challenges related to FAL’s license for brokerage and marketing of electronic real estate platforms

services.name: FAL Brokerage and Marketing License
services.shortDescription: Description of the service What can the licensee do: Description of the service • Practicing brokerage activity • Creating a unified brokerage contract • Contracting with one or more other brokers - unless the contract stipulates otherwise - • Promoting and displaying the property, to attract potential clients

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Vale Brokerage and Marketing License is an official permit approved by the General Real Estate Authority in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, authorizing individuals and establishments to practice real estate brokerage and marketing activities with absolute transparency and within a clear regulatory framework that protects all dealing parties. This license represents a major link between sellers, buyers, and tenants on the one hand, and brokers and marketers on the other hand, as it ensures documentation of real estate operations in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. The license is not limited to the administrative aspect only, but rather adds a professional dimension through training requirements and tests that must be passed, which raises the level of service and quality of dealing in the real estate market. It also contributes to reducing irregular practices and provides a legal work environment that stimulates stability and investment in both the digital and real estate sectors.

The FAL license contributes to raising the level of confidence among investors and dealers in the real estate market by ensuring that brokers are licensed by the General Real Estate Authority and operate in accordance with clear controls. It also opens up greater expansion opportunities for brokers and marketers at the local and regional market level, and encourages the use of innovative and effective marketing solutions within a regulated legal framework.

The importance of a valid brokerage and marketing license

Confirming full compliance with the regulations and laws that regulate the real estate market in the Kingdom.
Protecting the rights of customers and brokers and securing real estate transactions in a legal and reliable manner.
Raising the level of trust and credibility among investors and dealers in the real estate sector.
Giving competitive advantage to offices and individuals who have a license versus those who are not.
Contributing to enhancing market transparency and improving the quality of services provided in line with the Kingdom’s vision.

Difficulties and challenges related to the FAL brokerage and marketing license

It is necessary to complete all required documents and data with complete accuracy in order to comply with the license issuance standards.
The possibility of delaying the issuance of the license in the event of a deficiency or incompleteness in the documents submitted.
Administrative and operational financial costs that may be a burden on individuals or small offices.
Constant interest in following up on updates and amendments to real estate laws and regulations.
Constant adherence to professional and regulatory standards to maintain the validity of the license and the continuity of activity.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The real estate broker successfully passes the license qualification program, which includes the following training courses from the Saudi Real Estate Institute, which are as follows: • Real estate brokerage course • Real estate marketing course • Electronic real estate marketing course.
You must pass the courses to obtain the license.

services.name: Vale real estate consultancy license
services.shortDescription: Description of the license What the licensed person can do: • Practicing real estate consulting activity • Concluding a consulting contract with the beneficial owner or his representative under a scope determined by both parties

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The FAL Real Estate Consultation License is one of the modern regulatory pillars launched by the General Real Estate Authority in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to regulate the real estate consulting sector and advance it to higher professional levels. This license allows individuals and establishments to practice the activity of providing real estate consultations legally within a clear framework, where licensees can prepare feasibility studies, provide technical and financial analyses, and formulate advisory opinions for real estate owners, investors, and real estate developers. Those who hold this license have the ability to conclude formal consulting contracts and strengthen their professional relationships with their clients according to standards approved by the Authority. The Vale Real Estate Consultancy license gives double confidence and enhances the position of its holders in the market, especially with the Kingdom’s move to enhance professional transparency and legalize all real estate evaluation and analysis work. The license is also necessary for anyone seeking to provide impartial and reliable real estate advice that serves the market and supports making sound investment decisions.

The FAL license opened wider opportunities for serious consultants and specialists in the sector, raised the value of consulting services in the market, and established the principle of competition on the basis of professional competence and formal qualification in the face of random and unqualified consultations.

The importance of the FAL license for real estate consultancy

Documenting the work of real estate consultants and providing legal cover for all their dealings.
Enhancing customer and investor confidence in market reports and studies provided by certified consultants.
Reducing random real estate consultations and ensuring the quality of professional services.
Supporting the national investment environment through approved and reliable reports for real estate decision makers.
Raising the level of professionalism and giving a competitive advantage to entities and individuals holding an official license.

Difficulties and challenges related to the FAL Real Estate Consultancy license

It is necessary to prove the applicants’ academic qualifications and experience, as well as the existence of specialized training and testing requirements.
The consultant’s commitment to providing studies that are compatible with the profession’s national regulations and standards.
The possibility of delaying the procedures if there is a lack of the applicant’s data or documents.
Challenges of building trust with new customers in a competitive market that depends on reputation and actual results.
The constant need to follow up on legislative and technical updates in the real estate sector to maintain the quality of service and the credibility of the license.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The real estate broker successfully passes the license qualification program, which includes the following training courses from the Saudi Real Estate Institute, which are as follows: • Real estate consulting track (including several training courses).
You must pass the courses to issue the license.

services.name: Vale Real Estate Analytics License
services.shortDescription: Description of the license What the licensor can do: • Practice real estate analysis activity

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The FAL license for real estate analytics is one of the specialized licenses created by the General Real Estate Authority within the “FAL” license package to regulate the data and analysis sector in the Saudi real estate market. This license grants individuals and establishments the legal right to practice real estate analysis activities, by collecting and processing real estate data, and providing specialized analytical reports on prices, trends, and market indicators. The activity is a vital part of supporting decision makers, including investors, developers, and government agencies alike, as it requires skill and accuracy in reading data and using approved real estate analysis tools. The FAL Real Estate Analytics license allows its holder to prepare market studies, analyze risks, and anticipate investment opportunities, in addition to participating in the development of real estate analysis tools and software. This license reflects the Kingdom’s vision towards enhancing transparency in the market, relying on accurate information in all real estate transactions, and achieving integration with the aspirations of digital transformation in the sector. 

The Vale Real Estate Analytics license strengthened the role of the technical sector in the market by encouraging the development of innovative tools and modern digital solutions, in line with the national trend towards digital transformation and governance of real estate services, which pushed the market towards greater professionalism, controlling the quality of services, and improving the real estate investment environment in the Kingdom.

The importance of the FAL license for real estate analytics

Adding a systematic and reliable nature to professional real estate analysis services in the Kingdom.
Helping real estate investors and developers make decisions based on accurate data and analysis.
Supporting state agencies and regulatory bodies in building balanced and sustainable real estate policies.
Providing market reports that enhance transparency and reduce ambiguity in the movement of real estate indicators.
Opening the way for analysis companies and qualified individuals to provide innovative solutions that support the trend towards smart and digital real estate.

Difficulties and challenges related to the FAL real estate analytics license

High technical qualification requirements and proof of experience or competence in the field of real estate analysis.
The analyst must commit to providing accurate studies in accordance with the standards of the General Real Estate Authority, which requires continuous investment in training and new technologies.
Potentially having difficulty building trust with clients in a market that is still evolving in terms of acceptance of professional analytics.
The importance of daily monitoring of market and legislative changes that may affect the accuracy and credibility of the reports submitted.
The financial and administrative challenge associated with licensing costs and periodically updating systems and tools to ensure sustainable compliance.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The real estate broker successfully passes the license qualification program, which includes the following training courses from the Saudi Real Estate Institute, which are as follows: • Real estate analysis track (including several training courses).
You must pass the courses to issue the license.

services.name: Insert beauty products
services.shortDescription: This service allows cosmetic products to be listed via the unified electronic system (Ghad).​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The Cosmetic Products Listing Service is an electronic service provided by the Saudi Food and Drug Authority, and aims to regulate the process of registering and notifying cosmetic products that are marketed within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. This service allows manufacturers and importers to register their products according to a unified electronic system known as the “Ghad” system, whereby the products are officially listed in the Authority’s records after meeting all technical and regulatory conditions and requirements. These products include skin care products, makeup, perfumes, shampoos, creams, and other cosmetics for external use.

This service is part of the health oversight that the Authority sets a strict framework to ensure the safety and quality of products, and to provide a comprehensive database on marketed cosmetics, which facilitates product tracking and protects consumers from harmful or adulterated substances. The service is provided via an electronic registration platform that enables the user to upload all detailed information about the product, such as the product name, country of origin, product components, images of identification labels, and any supporting documents confirming the product’s compliance with Saudi specifications. After submitting the application, the authority reviews the data and reviews the documents, and if the product complies with the standards, an approval notice is issued that allows it to be marketed in the Saudi market.

The service is characterized by ease of procedure and clarity of requirements. It also provides electronic follow-up of the status of the request, which ensures transparency of operations and speed of completion.
The importance of beauty product listing service

Protecting consumer health by ensuring the quality and safety of the listed products.
Regulating the cosmetic market and preventing the circulation of products of unknown origin or non-conformity.
Building a reliable database that includes all marketed products and their technical and regulatory details.
Enabling companies to market their products in a formal, legal manner that reduces risks and penalties.
Enhancing transparency between the Authority, consumers and importers through an integrated electronic portal.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

It is necessary to provide accurate and comprehensive documents proving the conformity of components and standards.
It is necessary to continuously update product information and follow up on changes in technical regulations.
Requests may be rejected in the event of any data errors or the presence of prohibited components.
The challenge is to ensure that all SMEs adhere to registration procedures to ensure comprehensive oversight.
requiredDocuments: Product information poster (Artwork).
An image of the product for the purpose of publication on the Authority’s website.
List of product ingredients including concentrations and roles.
Authorization letter from the importing facility or manufacturing contract from the local factory.

services.name: Registration of food products
services.shortDescription: This service allows you to know the requirements and procedures for registering food products, so we hope that you will review all the attached links and guides

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The food product registration service is one of the important electronic services provided by the Food and Drug Authority with the aim of ensuring the safety and quality of all food products traded within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. This service targets all companies, factories and importers who wish to introduce their food products to local markets in accordance with the approved health and technical regulations.

The service allows, through a unified electronic platform, the possibility of submitting an application to register a food product, accompanied by all necessary documents, which include a certificate of conformity, quality reports, laboratory analyzes that reflect the components and safety of the product, in addition to packaging models and technical appendices for the product. Applications are subject to careful technical review by the Authority, which ensures that food safety standards are met and compatible with national and international standards.

The Authority also provides an electronic follow-up mechanism for the status of applications, which enhances transparency and helps users follow the progress of registration procedures, and receive approval notifications or requests to correct documents. This service is an essential part of the food control system and consumer health protection, and enhances consumer confidence in the products available on the market.

The importance of food product registration service

Enhancing the safety of food products by verifying their compliance with health standards.
Regulating the food market and ensuring the legality and quality of the products traded.
Consumer protection by ensuring that harmful or violating products are not traded.
Supporting companies and manufacturers in obtaining the necessary licenses to officially market their products.
Facilitating import and export operations by registering products in the Authority’s official records.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

It is necessary to provide accurate documents and analyzes to prove the safety and quality of products.
Delayed processing of applications if documents are not completed or there are errors in the data.
Renewed requirements related to technical regulations and health legislation that must be constantly followed up.
The challenge is to educate SMEs about the importance of registration and adherence to standards.
requiredDocuments: Open an electronic account.
Canceling the requirement for FDA approval to increase the shelf life of nutritional supplement products.
According to the Product Registration Guide, the Authority has the right to request any additional documents or requirements.
serviceConditions:
Financial compensation for studying nutritional supplement products and energy drinks = 5000 riyals.                                
The financial compensation for providing more than one size or weight of a registered nutritional supplement product = 500 riyals.

The marketing registration/authorization period varies depending on the type of product: Conventional products: 5 working days. · New products and baby food: 90 working days. Food supplements: 60 working days. Energy drinks: 20 working days.

services.name: Clear beauty products
services.shortDescription: This service allows you to clear cosmetic products and materials used in their manufacture imported through the Kingdom’s ports

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The cosmetic products clearance service is a major electronic service provided by the Saudi Food and Drug Authority, and it works to organize and control the entry of cosmetic products into the Saudi market in accordance with the approved health and technical frameworks and standards. The service aims to enable importers to obtain an official permit to enter cosmetic products into the Kingdom after ensuring that they comply with the relevant regulatory requirements, thus enhancing the protection of consumer health and ensuring the quality of the products traded.

The service provides a unified electronic platform through which a product clearance request can be submitted, which requires uploading multiple documents, including a certificate of conformity, approved analytical reports, risk and chemical residue certificates, in addition to good manufacturing practice certificates. These documents are necessary to prove the safety of the products and their compliance with Saudi standards, and are carefully reviewed to ensure that there are no harmful or prohibited ingredients in the products.

The clearance process includes examining shipments upon their arrival at customs ports. The Authority conducts audits and field inspections to ensure that all safety and quality conditions are met. After a careful review, official permission is issued to clear the shipment to allow its distribution and marketing within the market. This system helps speed up entry and exit processes and reduce delays, while maintaining the highest levels of control over cosmetic products.

The importance of cosmetic products clearing service

Ensures the entry of safe products that comply with specifications to reduce health risks to consumers.
Supports regulatory oversight that protects the market from unapproved or adulterated products.
Facilitates customs and commercial procedures through a unified and transparent electronic system.
Enhances consumer confidence through continuous verification and examination of market products.
It supports commercial establishments and importers by providing clear mechanisms for inspection and approval.

Difficulties and challenges related to the service

Requires the provision of accurate and comprehensive documentation to avoid delay or rejection of the application.
The possibility of rejecting products that contain ingredients that are violating or prohibited in Saudi Arabia.
Challenges of logistical coordination between the shipping process, customs, and clearing follow-up.
The need to constantly follow up on changes in standards and regulations related to cosmetic products.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the customs declaration.
A copy of the commercial invoice.
A copy of the bill of lading.
Consignment conformity certificate.
serviceConditions: Some incoming products require additional documents to be cleared. We hope you review the terms and requirements for product clearance.

Special conditions for individuals: The companion and the main expatriate must have valid residency permits. The accompanying person must be at least 18 years old. requiredDocuments: ID photo.
serviceConditions: The visitor must be from the included segment: between 18 and 60 years old.

Special conditions for individuals: The individual must hold a valid visitor visa.

services.name: Contract management and documentation
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the facility owner to manage and document employee contracts

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The contract management and documentation service via the Qiwa platform is one of the basic digital services provided by the Saudi Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development, and aims to develop the human resources management sector, raise the level of transparency, and protect the rights of both parties to the employment contract within the Saudi market. This service allows establishments and companies to create, document, amend and terminate new employment contracts completely electronically without the need for paperwork or physical presence in work offices, which contributes to accelerating procedures and saving time and effort for both business owners and employees.

Using the service begins with the facility owner or human resources manager logging into the Qiwa platform, choosing the contract management and documentation service, then adding data for the facility, the worker, and contract details (contract type, salary, allowances, trial period, benefits, work start date, etc.). The contract is then sent electronically to the employee to review the terms and confirm or reject the contract or request a modification. Once approved by both parties, the contract becomes officially documented and linked to the employee’s record at the General Organization for Social Insurance.

The service supports contract documentation for Saudi and expatriate workers, and includes all types of contracts such as fixed-term, indefinite-term, partial contracts, as well as remote work contracts. The platform provides a mechanism for monitoring the status of each contract and the documentation percentages; Facilities can track undocumented or expired contracts or contracts under review, and issue periodic performance and compliance reports. The service also simplifies the procedures for terminating the contract or terminating the contractual relationship in accordance with the regulations approved by the Ministry of Human Resources, and allows the employee to follow up on his requests and rights related to the end of service and its rewards through the platform.

Among the advantages of the service are ensuring electronic archiving of all contracts, providing legal protection for the worker and the facility, ease of reviewing and amending contracts, the possibility of verifying the validity of data and achieving its consistency between government agencies, and supporting digital development and the transition to a paperless work environment. Qiwa platform emphasizes the importance of documenting contracts for all workers and that this is mandatory from the date the worker begins until the end of the relationship to guarantee the rights of all parties.

The importance of managing and documenting contracts.

Accelerating recruitment and documentation procedures and facilitating connection with social insurance.
Promoting transparency and protecting the legal rights of all parties.
Supporting ease of archiving, accessing and verifying contracts electronically.
Reducing errors and achieving compliance with the Saudi labor system.

Challenges

It is necessary to constantly complete and update worker and facility data to ensure correct documentation.
Manage contract and form changes in compliance with legislative updates.
Handling large numbers of contracts electronically during peak or training times.
requiredDocuments: ID photo.
A copy of the commercial register.
serviceConditions: The establishment must be existing.
The worker does not have a valid contract with Qiwi.
The worker’s work permit must be valid for more than (60) days.

Required data: (email address - mobile number linked to Absher - employee ID - bank IBAN - contract duration - salary determination - profession - academic qualification - number of working days and hours).
