Implementation is followed up and compliance with technical conditions and specifications is ensured during visits by oversight teams. Obtaining the license requires paying the prescribed fees, which vary according to the type of application, and an information sign must be placed at the site showing the license number and the depth of the well.

The importance of the new well drilling license service
Regulating groundwater extraction operations according to water resources sustainability controls.
Protecting property and ensuring that drilling is not carried out in prohibited areas or overlapping with service networks.
Supporting the development of agricultural and industrial projects and providing safe and sustainable water sources.
Ensuring the beneficiary’s compliance with technical conditions, and facilitating government oversight of drilling.

Challenges and difficulties

It is necessary to complete all documents and clarify the location accurately to avoid rejection of the application.
Facing drilling restrictions in some areas and reserves.
Coordination with oversight and follow-up authorities and technical inspection procedures.
Updating licenses or correcting the well’s status in the event of a change in use or deepening/cleaning the existing well.
requiredDocuments: Property title deed, lease contract, or ministerial decision.

A building permit from the municipality and a photo showing that the land is fenced in any way for the purposes of washing and watering crops in residential lands located in the Arabian Shield and in the excluded area on the sedimentary shelf and in the cities of (Riyadh, Buraidah, Dammam, Al-Khobar, Dhahran, Jubail).<br>
A valid commercial register containing the activity of producing purified water for the purposes of adding drinkable things.

Permission from the Ministry of Municipalities and Housing to withdraw groundwater and drain it using the flood drainage network, allowing the license applicant to drain the water through the wastewater network or through tanks.<br>
Industrial license to establish a factory for the purpose of drilling a new well for bottled drinking water factories, ice factories, food factories, and juice factories.

A valid project establishment license from the competent authority for the purpose of drilling a new well for mining projects, crushers, block and brick factories, cement and ready-mixed concrete, and other factories.
serviceConditions: Do not drill the well until after obtaining the new well drilling license and the contractor’s approval.
Approving the conditions and controls for issuing licenses for groundwater sources (wells) and classifying their violations.
Approval from the Ministry of Transport and Logistics to drill a well for the purpose of drilling a new well for road construction projects.

services.name: Issuing a license to export bottled drinking water
services.shortDescription: A service that enables the business sector (owners of bottled drinking water factories) to issue licenses to export bottled water in accordance with the Ministry’s regulations and requirements.

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Ministry of Environment Water and Agriculture
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of issuing a bottled drinking water export license is a regulatory service that aims to enable accredited water factories in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to export their bottled drinking water products to foreign markets, under the supervision of the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture and in coordination with relevant government agencies such as the Saudi Food and Drug Authority and the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources. This service comes within the Kingdom's efforts to enhance control over water resources, ensure the availability of water in the local market, and encourage investment in the national water sector of high quality and approved.
The service requires the factory wishing to export to obtain an official license, which is issued based on the availability of a number of conditions and regulatory controls:

The factory must have a valid technical license from the Food and Drug Authority and an export validity certificate.
The industrial license issued by the Ministry of Industry must include customs information, production capacity, water source (renewable or non-renewable), and package capacity (maximum of one liter per package).
The factory must adequately cover the needs of the local market, and exports must not exceed the maximum ceiling determined by the Minister of Environment.
You must pay a bottled water export duty of 38 riyals per cubic metre, or 50 halalas per 330 ml carton containing 40 bottles.
The export percentage does not exceed 7% of the actual production capacity for factories that rely on non-renewable water sources, and does not exceed 60% for factories that rely on renewable water sources.

Applications are submitted electronically through the Nama portal, and are reviewed by specialized teams to verify that all technical and regulatory conditions and necessary documents are met, after which a license is issued and the factory is enabled to engage in exports in a regular manner. Exported shipments are subject to quality standards and laboratory examination in accordance with Saudi specifications, and the Ministry follows up on implementing controls periodically to ensure the sustainability of resources and protect the market.

The importance of issuing a bottled drinking water export license service

Stimulating domestic and foreign investment in the bottled water sector.
Ensuring that water resources are preserved and not depleted through strict controls.
Supporting the quality of national products and enhancing their reputation in global markets.
Protecting the security of the local market from the shortage of bottled drinking water.
Facilitating the management of the bottled water sector according to international standards.

Challenges and difficulties

Strict technical and administrative verification of factory documents and energy.
It is necessary to plan well to cover the local market before exporting.
Commitment to the permitted export rates and not exceeding them.
Follow up on updating controls and changes in policies and specifications periodically.
requiredDocuments: Valid commercial registration.
A valid industrial license.
The technical license for the factory issued by the Saudi Food and Drug Authority is valid.
Export certificate for bottled drinking water issued by the Food and Drug Authority.
A license to use the well if the water source is inside the factory grounds is issued by the Ministry.

A water source approval certificate issued by the Ministry if the water source is a valid supply contract in the case of supplying raw water to the factory through a contractor, whether inside or outside the industrial cities.
serviceConditions: To obtain a license to “export bottled drinking water” from the Ministry, it must be obtained through the Nama platform.
The water factory must be licensed to produce bottled drinking water by the Food and Drug Authority and its license is valid.
The factory’s direct and indirect water sources must be licensed and regulated.
Obtaining a bottled water export certificate from the Food and Drug Authority in accordance with an initial permit from the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture.
The factory must achieve the minimum local content as determined periodically by the Local Content and Private Sector Development Unit.
The factory must be operational and produce bottled water available in the local market.

Allowing water factories based on non-renewable water sources (sedimentary shelf) to export 7% of the design capacity indicated in the industrial license issued by the Ministry of Energy, Industry and Mineral Resources, provided that the container capacity does not exceed one liter.
Allowing water factories based on renewable water sources to export 60% of their designed energy.

services.name: Issuing licenses to use groundwater sources (wells)
services.shortDescription: A service that enables beneficiaries to submit a request for a use license for a groundwater source (the well), and its use and allocation shall be in accordance with the following order (basic human needs, then watering animals, agricultural, urban, and industrial demand, the minimum environmental balance, and other purposes).

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Ministry of Environment Water and Agriculture
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of issuing licenses to use groundwater sources (wells) is an important electronic service provided by the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It aims to regulate the use of groundwater by granting official licenses to drill and use groundwater wells for various purposes including agriculture, industrial uses, municipal, and livestock drinking. This service is part of government efforts to ensure the sustainability of water resources and protect them from unjust depletion, in accordance with the water system and its executive regulations.

Anyone who owns or intends to use a ground well must submit an application for a use license through the Ministry’s “Nama” electronic portal, and the application must be submitted within one year of publishing the regulations in the Official Gazette. Issuing a license requires submitting a set of documents, including: a well drilling license, disclosure certificate, or status correction license, in addition to an approved engineering drawing showing the location and extent of the land surrounding the well, and a water study containing chemical, biological, and radiological water quality analyzes from an accredited laboratory.

It is also required to install an electromagnetic meter connected to the central “Hafiz” system to monitor water use, and provide a statement from the National Water Company stating that it is not possible to supply water to the site from its sources to confirm the validity of the need for underground wells. You must also attach a notarized ownership instrument or lease contract, and an updated agricultural register if the purposes are agricultural. The license is issued for a period ranging from 3 to 5 years depending on the type of water use, with the possibility of renewal according to the specified conditions.

The Ministry provides follow-up control procedures to ensure compliance with technical and environmental controls, and classifies violations to ensure that violations are dealt with strictly, which contributes to preserving resources and the rights of all users. The Ministry also employs advanced technologies to ensure sustainable and equitable use of groundwater.

The importance of issuing licenses to use groundwater sources

Providing strict regulation of groundwater use and ensuring its sustainability.
Protecting the rights of landowners, farmers, and those searching for water resources.
Supporting agricultural and industrial development plans in accordance with precise environmental standards.
Facilitating the process of obtaining licenses through a unified and easy-to-use electronic system.
Continuous follow-up and monitoring to ensure compliance with laws and reduce waste.

Challenges and difficulties associated with the service

The complexity of preparing the hydrological studies and laboratory analyzes required.
The necessity of coordination with multiple parties, such as municipalities, the water company, and environmental institutions.
Dealing with special cases such as old wells or rectification cases.
The need to educate users about the importance of adhering to controls and protecting resources.
requiredDocuments: A drilling license (well/wells), a disclosure certificate, a license to rectify the situation, or payment of the prescribed fine.

An ownership instrument, an ownership decision based on a distribution decision, an ownership instrument based on a royal decree, a lease contract issued by the ministry or a government entity, a lease contract based on an ownership instrument authenticated by the competent authority, or a notarized declaration on an Ihkam platform limited only to agricultural purposes.
Attach a survey report from one of the engineering offices approved by the Ministry of Municipalities and Housing, showing the entire area of ​​the land and the location of the well to be used.

Submitting a water study on the wells, including water quality analyzes (chemical, bacteriological, radiological) from an office approved by the Ministry according to the approved specifications, or a drilling completion report from the drilling contractor.
Attach the pump catalog, its picture and its production capacity.
Attach a license to establish a drink, for the purpose of establishing drinks (potable and non-drinkable).
Attach the developed agricultural record, for agricultural purposes.
serviceConditions: It is prohibited to use groundwater sources (wells) for purposes other than the licensed purpose.

If the applicant is an agent for heirs, he must attach an heir inventory instrument and a legal power of attorney from all heirs stipulating that they visit the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture to obtain a license to use groundwater sources (wells).
Anyone who obtains a license to drill a new or replacement well must apply within thirty days of completing the drilling work to obtain a use license.
You must apply for a new use license if you wish to change the purpose of use or add another purpose other than the one for which it was licensed.
The licensee must commit to not exceeding the quantities of water specified in the use license.
When the activity is cancelled, the licensee is obligated to apply for the use license cancellation service within ninety days of canceling the activity.
The presence of permanent agricultural facilities or an agricultural license for agricultural purposes.
An agricultural register developed for agricultural purposes on lands located in the alluvial shelf.

Undertaking to install a meter and data transmitter according to the Ministry’s specifications and under its supervision for the following purposes:
1. Urban purposes (drinking) for government agencies, companies, bodies, institutions and centers affiliated with them.
    2. Drinkable items
    3. Agricultural purposes in lands located on the sedimentary shelf.
    4. Non-drinkable items
    5. Bottled drinking water factories, ice factories, food factories, and juice factories.
    6. Mining projects, crushers, block and brick factories, cement and ready-mixed concrete, and other factories.
    7. Industrial and Economic Cities Authority

services.name: Request to import fertilizers and agricultural fertilizers
services.shortDescription: The service allows companies and institutions to apply to import agricultural fertilizers to enter the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Ministry of Environment Water and Agriculture
serviceDetails.serviceDescription: The service allows companies and institutions to apply to import agricultural fertilizers to enter the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
requiredDocuments: Certificate of analysis.
Certificate of origin.
A copy of the invoice.
Civil defense permit.
Poster image.
Public Security approval.
Annual letter of need.
serviceConditions: A commercial register plus fertilizer activity.
An agricultural engineer working for the company.
Fertilizer warehouse licensed by Civil Defense.

When wanting to import fertilizers that contain materials restricted by industrial security, a Saudi agricultural engineer, a Saudi chemical engineer or technician, or a Saudi pharmacist or pharmaceutical technician must be available.
When the requirements are completed, they are submitted electronically on the Ministry’s website via the Hassad system, and after approval, import requests are submitted through the system.
View the list of fertilizers and soil amendments.
Obtaining an import approval from the Ministry before shipping, to review the requirements required to be submitted to the port upon the arrival of the shipment.

services.name: Request to amend a commercial agency registration
services.shortDescription: This service enables you to amend the data in the terms of the contract, whether you are the agent or the principal, by agreement of both parties.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of requesting an amendment to a commercial agency registration constitutes the only legal path for making any update or change to the data of a commercial agency contract registered in the Kingdom, whether the change is in the parties (agent or principal), the products covered, or any essential details of the contract. The Saudi Commercial System requires that these procedures be implemented entirely electronically through the Ministry of Commerce portal, which provides speedy implementation and transparency in tracking the request, without the need to visit the Ministry’s branches in person.

The service is characterized by flexibility in dealing between parties, as the agent or principal may - by written agreement - amend the data or clauses of the contract. The application requires filling out all the required data and attaching the legal documents, such as an official letter of approval from the foreign party (in the case of an international agency), or an original letter from the Saudi client, along with the amended contract or additional documents. If both parties are Saudis, the amendments must be authenticated by the Chamber of Commerce. As for the foreign party, the documents require authentication by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Saudi Embassy or by an approved Apostille document. After studying and reviewing the application by Ministry employees, the applicant will be notified of the processing result electronically and the amendment certificate will be available for immediate printing

The importance of the commercial agency registration amendment request service

Protecting parties from legal problems and disputes with suppliers or partners due to out-of-date data.
Ensure that official authorities recognize amendments to the new contract, especially in disputes or customs or banking operations.
Enhancing the company’s competitiveness by adapting its products and services to the actual reality of the market through regulatory amendments.
Facilitating expansion, withdrawal, product switching, or changing the coverage market without violating the regulations.
Supporting businesses in facing local and international legislative or commercial changes by updating the registration easily. 

Difficulties related to completing or issuing a request to amend a commercial agency registration

The need for high accuracy in filling out data and matching the amended clauses to the original contract, which requires regulatory and legal expertise.
The requirement to authenticate some documents from several parties inside or outside the Kingdom (Ministry of Foreign Affairs, embassies, chambers of commerce), and the delay or additional cost that sometimes accompanies it.
The length of the study cycle or ensuring the authenticity of documents in the event of conflicting or different information or a lack of attachments
The difficulty of amending the terms of some old contracts that do not include the possibility of amendment, which may require concluding a new contract between the parties entirely.
Overlapping procedures in cases of multiple agencies or contracts or the existence of existing disputes between the two parties.
There is a constant need for continuous follow-up of commercial laws and regulations that may witness updates that affect the form and documents of the application.
requiredDocuments: 1- A copy of the amended contract.
2- A letter from the foreign client stating that the contract has been amended if the client is a foreigner.
3- A letter from the Saudi client stating that the contract has been amended if it is between (two Saudi parties).
4- A letter from the Saudi client on his printed papers stating that the contract was amended based on what was mentioned in the contract concluded between the two parties.

5- A letter from the foreign client stating that the contract has been amended by referring to the amended clause and proving the new amendment or proving the addition only if the matter is merely an addition.
6- A copy of the authorization, if any.
serviceConditions: 1- If the client is a foreigner, the original contract shall be certified by the following competent authorities: the Ministry of Foreign Affairs - the Chamber of Commerce in the client’s country “if any” - the Saudi Embassy in the client’s country - or an Apostille certification if (the client is a foreigner).”
2- If both parties to the contract are Saudis, the contract shall be certified by the Chamber of Commerce in the Kingdom.

6- A copy of the authorization, if any.
serviceConditions: 1- If the client is a foreigner, the original contract shall be certified by the following competent authorities: the Ministry of Foreign Affairs - the Chamber of Commerce in the client’s country “if any” - the Saudi Embassy in the client’s country - or an Apostille certification if (the client is a foreigner).”
2- If both parties to the contract are Saudis, the contract shall be certified by the Chamber of Commerce in the Kingdom.

services.name: Request to amend a commercial agency registration
services.shortDescription: This service enables you to amend the data in the terms of the contract, whether you are the agent or the principal, by agreement of both parties.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The service of requesting an amendment to a commercial agency registration constitutes the only legal path for making any update or change to the data of a commercial agency contract registered in the Kingdom, whether the change is in the parties (agent or principal), the products covered, or any essential details of the contract. The Saudi Commercial System requires that these procedures be implemented entirely electronically through the Ministry of Commerce portal, which provides speedy implementation and transparency in tracking the request, without the need to visit the Ministry’s branches in person.

The service is characterized by flexibility in dealing between parties, as the agent or principal may - by written agreement - amend the data or clauses of the contract. The application requires filling out all the required data and attaching the legal documents, such as an official letter of approval from the foreign party (in the case of an international agency), or an original letter from the Saudi client, along with the amended contract or additional documents. If both parties are Saudis, the amendments must be authenticated by the Chamber of Commerce. As for the foreign party, the documents require authentication by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Saudi Embassy or by an approved Apostille document. After studying and reviewing the application by Ministry employees, the applicant will be notified of the processing result electronically and the amendment certificate will be available for immediate printing

The importance of the commercial agency registration amendment request service

Protecting parties from legal problems and disputes with suppliers or partners due to out-of-date data.
Ensure that official authorities recognize amendments to the new contract, especially in disputes or customs or banking operations.
Enhancing the company’s competitiveness by adapting its products and services to the actual reality of the market through regulatory amendments.
Facilitating expansion, withdrawal, product switching, or changing the coverage market without violating the regulations.
Supporting businesses in facing local and international legislative or commercial changes by updating the registration easily. 

Difficulties related to completing or issuing a request to amend a commercial agency registration

The need for high accuracy in filling out data and matching the amended clauses to the original contract, which requires regulatory and legal expertise.
The requirement to authenticate some documents from several parties inside or outside the Kingdom (Ministry of Foreign Affairs, embassies, chambers of commerce), and the delay or additional cost that sometimes accompanies it.
The length of the study cycle or ensuring the authenticity of documents in the event of conflicting or different information or a lack of attachments
The difficulty of amending the terms of some old contracts that do not include the possibility of amendment, which may require concluding a new contract between the parties entirely.
Overlapping procedures in cases of multiple agencies or contracts or the existence of existing disputes between the two parties.
There is a constant need for continuous follow-up of commercial laws and regulations that may witness updates that affect the form and documents of the application.
requiredDocuments: 1- A copy of the amended contract.
2- A letter from the foreign client stating that the contract has been amended if the client is a foreigner.
3- A letter from the Saudi client stating that the contract has been amended if it is between (two Saudi parties).
4- A letter from the Saudi client on his printed papers stating that the contract was amended based on what was mentioned in the contract concluded between the two parties.

5- A letter from the foreign client stating that the contract has been amended by referring to the amended clause and proving the new amendment or proving the addition only if the matter is merely an addition.
6- A copy of the authorization, if any.
serviceConditions: 1- If the client is a foreigner, the original contract shall be certified by the following competent authorities: the Ministry of Foreign Affairs - the Chamber of Commerce in the client’s country “if any” - the Saudi Embassy in the client’s country - or an Apostille certification if (the client is a foreigner).”
2- If both parties to the contract are Saudis, the contract shall be certified by the Chamber of Commerce in the Kingdom.

services.name: Request to renew commercial agency registration
services.shortDescription: This service enables the agent or distributor to continue in his duties assigned to him by foreign companies or Saudi companies.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Renewing the registration of a commercial agency is the procedure that ensures the continuity of the activity of a legally registered agent or distributor in the Saudi market, as regulations require that this renewal be valid and documented to ensure the validity of commercial representation with local or foreign companies. The service is performed entirely electronically via the Ministry of Commerce’s platform, without the need for personal attendance, and is summed up in submitting a renewal application after completing the required documents, entering the agency and original contract data, and renewing approvals between the parties.

The procedures begin by logging into the platform, choosing the commercial agency registration renewal service, filling out all the required data, attaching a copy of the expired commercial agency certificate, and an official renewal letter from the principal (whether foreign or Saudi), certified by the competent authorities such as the Ministry of Foreign Affairs or the Chamber of Commerce, according to the nationality of the parties. After completing the application, it is studied electronically and the facility receives an electronic notification through which the renewal certificate can be printed directly.

The importance of the commercial agency registration renewal request service

Continued regular benefit from the commercial franchise without interruption or legal cessation.
Facilitating banking transactions, customs and all regulatory authorities that require a valid agency record.
Maintaining the agent's rights in the local market and ensuring the safe execution of associated contracts.
Avoid statutory penalties or temporary suspension of the agency if the registration expires and is not renewed on the scheduled date.
Enhancing commercial competitiveness and increasing the degree of reliability in government tenders and transactions.

Difficulties related to completing or issuing a commercial agency registration renewal

The need to complete specific documents, most notably a copy of the expired power of attorney and renewal letters from the principal, which require official certifications that vary according to the nationality or location of the principal.
Approvals are sometimes delayed due to a lack of documents or discrepancies in details between the original contract and the renewal letter.
The length of the review cycle in the event of verifying the validity of external certifications or the existence of a previous dispute between the parties.
It is necessary to follow up on regulatory and procedural amendments to the ministry’s policies and the electronic platform, which may cause confusion in the event of sudden updates.
The possibility of rejecting the application if the renewal date does not comply with the terms of the original contract or there is a discrepancy in the parties’ data.
requiredDocuments: 1 copy of the expired commercial agency.
2- A letter from the foreign client stating that the contract has been renewed if the client is a foreigner.
3- A letter from the Saudi client stating that the contract has been renewed if it is between (two Saudi parties).
serviceConditions: 1- A letter from the foreign client stating that the contract has been renewed based on what was mentioned in the contract concluded between the two parties. The letter must be authenticated by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in the client’s country and the Saudi embassy in the client’s country or certified by an Apostille.

2- A letter from the Saudi client stating that the contract has been renewed based on what was mentioned in the contract concluded between the two parties, and the letter is authenticated by the Chamber of Commerce and Industry in the Kingdom.

services.name: Request to register a commercial agency
services.shortDescription: This service enables the agent or distributor to practice commercial agency activity on behalf of Saudi companies or institutions or foreign companies contracted with in the Kingdom pursuant to a commercial agency contract between the two parties.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The commercial agency registration request service represents the official gateway for any agent partnership between a local facility and an external producer or supplier to enter the Saudi market according to regulatory standards. The commercial agency is required to be registered electronically through the Ministry of Commerce portal, which gives the agent or principal legal advantages that enable him to represent the trademark or product, conduct contractual and customs operations, and open official accounts with government and private agencies.

The service procedures begin with preparing the original contract for the agency that meets the conditions of the Saudi commercial system (including the basic terms, contract mechanism, and information of the parties), then filling out the application data and submitting documents electronically for agencies with foreign parties. The contract must be authenticated by the Kingdom’s representation in the client’s country or by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the embassy, ​​with the certified legal translation attached. In the case of a local agency, the documents must be certified by the Chamber of Commerce. All data is uploaded electronically so that the Ministry’s team undertakes review, conformity and approval, and the service ends with the issuance of a commercial agency registration certificate that can be printed immediately.

The importance of the commercial agency registration request service

Regular recognition of the agent or distributor in all official transactions.
Ease of executing contracts and benefiting from exclusive rights to products and services.
Facilitating import and customs clearance procedures by proving the legal representation.
Protecting the rights of both parties commercially and legally in future disputes or claims.
Raising the degree of trust with banks, financing agencies and relevant government institutions.
Preparing the formal basis for joining official tenders or exporting to new markets.

Difficulties related to completing or issuing a commercial agency registration

The contract data must comply with the requirements of the Saudi commercial system in its entirety, which requires precise legal expertise to draft the terms.
The need to authenticate a number of documents from different parties (embassies, ministries, chambers of commerce), and the delay or additional cost that this may cause.
Difficulty in processing the request in the event of a discrepancy or lack of information about parties or contracts, especially with foreign agencies.
The possibility of refusal to register if it is proven that there is a similar active agency or a conflict or exception in the text of previous contracts.
Updating systems or requirements of the Ministry of Commerce platform may cause unexpected complications in some procedures.
The constant need to follow the regulations to ensure that all regulatory conditions are met and that the registration is maintained after its registration.
requiredDocuments: 1- A copy of the commercial register.
2- A copy of the contract and its attachments (if any).
3- National address.
4- Required data: (ID number - email - Absher mobile number)
5- A copy of the authorization, if any
serviceConditions: 1- The presence of a commercial register corresponding to the agency’s activity.
2- The agent companies or institutions must be entirely Saudi, with 100% Saudi capital.
3- If both parties to the contract are Saudis, the contract shall be certified by the Chamber of Commerce and Industry in the Kingdom for both parties

4- If the client is a foreigner, the original contract shall be authenticated by the following competent authorities: the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in the client’s country - the Chamber of Commerce in the client’s country “if any” - the Saudi Embassy in the client’s country - the Saudi Ministry of Foreign Affairs - the Saudi Chamber of Commerce and Industry, or an Apostille.
5- The contract must be contracted directly with the producing company (parent) or its representative in its country of origin, without any intermediary outside its country.
6- The types and names of the goods and services that are the subject of the agency must be clarified in the contract in detail.
7- The effective date of the contract, its duration, how to terminate it, and how to renew it must be clarified.
8- The official name of the foreign company must be stated in the contract in Arabic and English without any abbreviations or symbols.
9- The name of the foreign company must be translated literally into Arabic, not the meaning.
10- Ensure that any dispute or disagreement between the client and the agent is settled before the competent authorities (mentioned in the contract).
11- The contract must be translated. If the contract is in English or any other language, it must be translated from an accredited office.
12- Signature of the contract by both parties.
13- Determine the competent judicial authority or country to which reference will be made in the event of disputes arising between the two parties (mentioned in the contract).

services.name: Request to cancel a commercial agency registration by the agent
services.shortDescription: This service enables you, whether you are an agent or a distributor, to submit a request to stop practicing commercial agency activity on behalf of Saudi or foreign companies and to remove the agency from commercial records.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Procedures for deleting a commercial agency registration by the agent are considered the best path to end the legal relationship between the agent and the principal or to stop the agency activity related to an international or local product or partner in the Saudi commercial registry. This service allows the agent or distributor to request to stop practicing the activity of commercial agencies for Saudi or foreign companies and to officially cancel them through the Ministry of Commerce platform without the need for personal attendance at any branch of the Ministry.

The service mechanism depends on simple electronic steps, which begin by choosing the service for canceling a commercial agency through the Ministry’s electronic portal, entering the agency and agent data and attaching the necessary documents such as a letter of cancellation request certified by the Chamber of Commerce, then submitting the required pledges and sending the application through the portal to be reviewed by the Ministry’s employees. After approval, a text message will be sent to the customer, with the ability to print the cancellation certificate directly through the approved electronic system.

The importance of the service of requesting cancellation of a commercial agency registration

Protecting the facility from any future financial or regulatory responsibilities or obligations associated with its name in the records.
Electronic documentation to cancel the commercial relationship with the client (local or international) in a way that preserves the rights of both parties.
Rapid response to market changes, and providing the opportunity to change business models or contract with new parties without systemic interference or conflict.
Avoid penalties or regulatory notices as a result of the continuation of a registered activity without the desire of the agent or principal.

Difficulties related to completing or issuing the cancellation of a commercial agency registration

All documents must be submitted accurately, most notably an official letter requesting cancellation certified by the Chamber of Commerce, which may require additional rounds if any document is missing.
The possibility of suspending or delaying the examination of the application due to errors in data entry or lack of attachments.
In some cases, the applicant may need to prove that there are no existing commercial disputes or previous obligations associated with the agency.
Updating all the facility’s transactions in customs departments and banks to ensure that the agency’s data does not appear after deletion.
Some international agencies require additional documentation steps or approval from third parties, which may increase the length of the procedural cycle, especially in cross-border transactions.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the agency to be cancelled.
serviceConditions: Submitting a letter to the Saudi agent’s publications stating the cancellation of the commercial agency, authenticated by the Chamber of Commerce.

services.name: Discount licenses
services.shortDescription: An electronic service provided by the Ministry of Commerce, which allows beneficiaries to issue a discount license through which the prices of goods displayed in affiliated stores can be reduced electronically without the need to visit the Ministry’s branches.​​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Discount licenses constitute the approved regulatory tool that allows commercial establishments to organize seasonal or temporary discount offers legally and transparently in the Saudi market. This service allows merchants, commercial centers and retail stores to offer discounts and promotional prices to customers approved by the Ministry of Commerce through its dedicated electronic platform, which adds additional confidence to consumers and gives brands an opportunity to officially enhance purchasing activity.

Service procedures depend on submitting a license application electronically, specifying the discount period and lists of products or services included in the discounts, and attaching commercial data, records, and invoices proving previous prices. Applications are reviewed electronically and the license is granted as soon as the data is complete and the discount rates are verified. Platforms and stores are required to display the license and the quick response (QR) code to customers throughout the discount period to confirm its legality.

Regulators are keen to carefully verify the credibility of basic prices and apply the announced discount rates for the listed products or services. It is prohibited to announce discounts without a valid license or to exceed the upper limit of the approved rates.

The importance of the discount licensing service

Ensuring consumer protection from misleading offers or fake discounts.
Enhancing customer confidence in licensed brands and the credibility of the announced discount.
Supporting seasonal marketing plans for establishments and raising sales rates on a systematic basis.
Enabling regulatory authorities to control the market and deter any violations or price fraud.
Providing accurate data on the movement of discounts in the market to support trade policies.
Increasing competitiveness among establishments and stimulating creativity in offers without bypassing regulations.

Difficulties related to completing or issuing reduction licenses

It is necessary to prepare accurate documents proving the basic prices of products before the sale period, and to attach them in an organized manner to the order.
Possibility of delay in obtaining a license during seasons or periods that witness high demand from establishments.
It is necessary to strictly adhere to the specifications and percentages of discounts according to the instructions of the Ministry of Commerce, which may limit the merchant’s flexibility in setting a different price offer.
Continuous monitoring by the Ministry during the discount period, and imposing immediate fines in the event of price manipulation or discounts higher than the regular rates.
The constant need to keep up with updates to the system and electronic platforms used to submit requests or display licenses to customers.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial registry/store license.
Attach a list of discounted products.
Attach the price list before and after the sale.
National address.

An Excel file with the discounted products, indicating this data in the file (product name and product code (barcode) - discounted quantity - price before and after the discount - product unit of account - product classification)
The store's logo (logo).
serviceConditions: 1- The merchant must have (a commercial register / commercial agency / trademark) and it must be registered with the Ministry.
2- Determine the duration of the discounts.
3- Required data: (ID number - Absher mobile number - email).
4- The percentage of discounted products should not be less than (50%).

services.name: Issuing licenses for gemstones and precious metals
services.shortDescription: An electronic service provided by the Ministry of Commerce, which allows beneficiaries to obtain a license to practice the activity of manufacturing precious metals and gemstones, electronically without the need to visit the Ministry’s branches.​​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Issuing licenses for gemstones and precious metals is the regulatory procedure that enables commercial and industrial sector establishments to practice the activities of selling, importing, manufacturing and trading these materials in a regular manner in Saudi Arabia. This service targets jewelry establishments and gold, diamond and precious metal stores, and is implemented entirely electronically via the Ministry of Commerce platform or relevant specialized platforms, ensuring ease in submitting applications and transparency in the processing stages.

The service requires the submission of all supporting documents such as facility data, regulatory documents, security and safety approvals, and clarification of commercial lists of materials for which a license is required. Processing operations are supervised by specialized committees to ensure that the activity conforms to regulatory controls and the objectives of monitoring the trading of precious metals and to maintain confidence in the local and global market. The license is granted for specific periods with the possibility of renewal, and is accompanied by permanent requirements such as updating data and reporting any changes in activity.

The importance of the service of issuing licenses for gemstones and precious metals

Consumer protection and enhancing confidence in the trade of precious stones and precious metals within the Saudi market.
Ensuring transparency and control over the sources of precious materials and their circulation, manufacturing and export channels.
Enabling formal establishments to build their business reputation through compliance with local and international regulations and controls.
Contributing to combating commercial fraud and confronting any illegal trading or anti-money laundering violation.
Strengthening the Kingdom’s position as a regional center for the trade, manufacture and design of jewelry and precious metals.
Reducing price manipulation and achieving fair competition in the jewelry sector.

Difficulties related to obtaining or issuing licenses for gemstones and precious metals

Accuracy of data completion: The process requires providing accurate official documents on products, import channels, supplier names, and technical classifications.
Security and safety requirements: Establishments must provide high-level electronic and field security and protection systems, with continuous data updating.
Length of the study cycle: Studying the file sometimes takes time if field verification is needed or if there are doubts about the source of the materials.
Multiple regulatory authorities: Some cases require additional approvals from customs, security, or environmental authorities.
Possibility of rejection: The application may be rejected if it is proven that there are irregularities or inaccuracies in the data or if there is a suspicion of violating the anti-money laundering system.
Regulatory changes: Suddenly updating platform requirements or licensing requirements may require establishments to constantly keep up with systems and update their files.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the owner’s national ID.
Attach a copy of the lease contract or the ownership deed for the shop.

Submitting a pledge not to engage in the activity of (selling - importing - manufacturing) precious metals and gemstones except after obtaining the approval of the competent municipality and the security authority.
National address.
A copy of the company contract if the request was for a company.
A copy of the partners’ decision if the application is for a company.
serviceConditions: Approved a pledge not to engage in the activity of (selling - importing - manufacturing) precious metals and precious stones except after obtaining the approval of the competent municipality and the security authority.
If the license is for a company’s retail store, the partners’ acknowledgment must be attached to the branch’s approval.
A trademark must be registered through an intellectual body.
Required data: (email - Absher mobile number).

services.name: Commercial franchise registration (registration - amendment - cancellation)
services.shortDescription: ​This service enables the registration and management of a commercial franchise, which is provided in accordance with the commercial franchise system and its executive regulations. ​

serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
The commercial franchise registration service (whether registration, modification or cancellation) represents the regular electronic portal to protect and document the relationship between the franchisor and the franchisee in the Kingdom, as it ensures the recognition of the Ministry of Commerce and the rights of both parties and allows obtaining all the statutory privileges associated with the franchise contract. The entire service is carried out electronically, and includes filing the franchise agreement and disclosure document and submitting all applications and documents, with the possibility of amending or canceling the registration according to the requirements of the activity and the development of the relationship.

Registration procedures require submitting a written and signed franchise agreement, along with a disclosure document that provides the franchisor with all the financial, operational and regulatory details of the trademark. In the event of a modification, the revised version of the agreement and an updated disclosure document explaining the material changes or change by a party must be provided. When canceling, the reason for cancellation is required, such as a court ruling or the expiration of the period, and supporting documents must be submitted. The service is completed through the Ministry of Commerce’s platform with complete clarity in its costs and requirements, and allows beneficiaries to print their certificates directly after approval.

The importance of the commercial franchise registration service

Ensuring the protection of both parties (grantor and franchisee) with established and legally recognized rights by the Ministry of Commerce.
The possibility of systematically benefiting from the trademark and granting franchising or transferring rights based on officially approved agreements.
Facilitating the settlement of disputes through rapid recognition by official authorities of registered legal documents.
Enhancing the confidence of investors and financiers in commercial franchise projects thanks to the accreditation of the issued certificate.
Necessary for customs and banking operations, and in major transactions that require proof of the franchise’s regularity.

Difficulties related to completing or issuing a commercial franchise registration

It is necessary to prepare a comprehensive and clear disclosure document that complies with the requirements of the system and submit it electronically within the regulatory period (90 days from signing the agreement).
Difficulty amending the registration in the event of fundamental differences, incomplete documents, or a lack of amendments issued by one of the parties.
Dealing with translating contracts or disclosures into Arabic and authenticating foreign documents in accordance with regulations, which sometimes causes delays in registration.
The possibility of the application being rejected or postponed due to lack of clarity of rights and obligations or lack of accuracy in the declared financial and operational terms.
The constant need to follow up on regular and official updates on the commercial franchise platform, which may affect the speed of completing or amending the registration.
requiredDocuments:
1- To register a commercial franchise:
- Franchise agreement.
- Disclosure document.

2- To amend the commercial franchise registration:
- Amended concession document.
- Amended disclosure document.

3- To cancel the commercial franchise:
- Adding the document in the event of a judicial ruling.
serviceConditions: 1- In accordance with the commercial concession system and its executive regulations.

2- الرسوم الحكومية:
500 riyals (for registering a commercial franchise).
100 riyals (to amend the commercial franchise registration).

services.shortDescription: An electronic service provided by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs that enables the beneficiary to manage and register his visa authorizations, and also allows the relevant authorities to authenticate and approve these authorizations electronically.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription: An electronic service provided by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs that enables the beneficiary to manage and register his visa authorizations, and also allows the relevant authorities to authenticate and approve these authorizations electronically.

2- Commercial register.
serviceConditions: 1- Register the visa number on the visa platform.

services.shortDescription: An electronic service provided by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs that enables the beneficiary to manage and register his visa authorizations, and also allows the relevant authorities to authenticate and approve these authorizations electronically.

services.name: Apostille certification request
services.shortDescription: It is an international legalization approved under the Hague Convention. It is used to authenticate official documents issued by a particular country so that they are legally accepted in another country that is a member of the Convention, without the need for certification from embassies and consulates.

serviceDetails.serviceDescription: It is an international legalization approved under the Hague Convention. It is used to authenticate official documents issued by a particular country so that they are legally accepted in another country that is a member of the Convention, without the need for certification from embassies and consulates.
requiredDocuments: Submit an electronic application via the Ministry of Foreign Affairs platform or approved platforms.
Enter applicant data and document data accurately.
Pay the certification fees electronically.
Providing a copy of the applicant’s national ID or residence permit, if necessary.
In some cases a letter of request or authorization must be attached (eg if the request is submitted by an agent).
Verify that the applicant’s name matches the document data if it concerns personal certificates.
Receiving the document after legalization electronically or through legalization offices.
serviceConditions: 1- The document must be an original or an exact copy certified by the competent authority within Saudi Arabia.
2- The document must be issued by an official body (governmental or accredited).
3- The country concerned with ratification must be a party to the Hague Convention.
4- An apostille can only be issued for some specific, officially recognized documents, and not for all types of documents.
5- The document must be current and not be erased or modified.
6- Government fees are 30 riyals per page.

categoryName: Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources

services.name: Issuing an industrial license
services.shortDescription: The Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources provides the industrial licensing service. Which is a document issued by the Ministry in accordance with the Unified Industrial Organization Law (System) of the Gulf Cooperation Council countries, which allows the establishment of an industrial project according to specific stages and mechanisms that the Ministry takes care of investors from establishment, to construction, then production.

serviceDetails.ministryInfo: Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources
serviceDetails.serviceDescription:
Industrial licensing.
To build a solid industrial edifice in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, industrial licensing represents the cornerstone that guarantees your business legitimacy, sustainability, and the ability to effectively contribute to the renaissance of the industrial sector. It is not just a document, but rather the key that opens the doors to production, innovation, and expansion in a promising market, full of major investment opportunities.

Obtaining an industrial license is the mandatory step that confirms your facility’s compliance with national standards and regulations, and qualifies you to carry out industrial activities efficiently and safely. Whether you are an ambitious investor looking to establish a new factory, or an entrepreneur seeking to turn his industrial idea into reality, this license gives you the legal cover necessary to get started, and protects you from any violations that may hinder your path.

Why is industrial licensing an absolute necessity for your business?

The importance of industrial licensing lies in the fact that it guarantees several vital aspects for the success and continuity of your facility:
Legitimacy and Compliance: An industrial license ensures that you conduct your activity within the Saudi legal framework, which protects you from fines and penalties, and confirms your commitment to industrial and environmental standards.
Credibility and trust: An official license gives your facility a stamp of credibility before customers, suppliers, banks, and government agencies. This enhances confidence in your ability to produce to standards, and opens up broader horizons for collaboration and partnerships.
Market access and support: As a licensed facility, you can access local and international markets with confidence, and benefit from government support programs directed to the industrial sector, and financing facilities provided by banks and financial institutions for approved industrial projects.
Expansion and Growth: The industrial license represents a solid foundation for any future expansion plans. As your business grows, you will find that having a valid and updated license simplifies the process of adding new product lines, or expanding into other markets.
Investment protection: The license ensures that your investment is protected by providing an organized work environment, and makes it easier for you to settle any disputes that may arise in the future.

Complexities of industrial licensing Why do you need specialized experience?

Despite its importance, the process of obtaining an industrial license can be complex and requires in-depth knowledge of changing regulations and procedures. From precisely defining the industrial activity, to fulfilling the technical and environmental conditions, to preparing the required documents from multiple entities such as the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources, the Ministry of Environment, and the Saudi Authority for Industrial Estates and Technology Zones (MODON), all the way to following up on the application and responding to inquiries, all of this requires time, effort, and specialized expertise.

Any error in submitting the application, lack of documents, or lack of accurate understanding of the requirements may lead to a significant delay in obtaining the industrial license, causing you financial losses and affecting your timeline.
requiredDocuments: A copy of the commercial register.
Municipal license in case of outside industrial cities.
Cities Authority lease contract in the case of industrial cities.
A copy of the environmental license.
Employment edition of the Labor Office.
A copy of the civil defense permit.
Investment license if the investment is foreign or joint.
A valid spatial license/contract from the entities designated for the sites.
Energy allocation from the Department of Energy.
serviceConditions: The environmental license must be valid.
Submit a status upgrade request on the Senaei platform
Safety and environment for operation from the competent authorities
The commercial register must be valid and with an industrial license.

services.shortDescription: The Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources provides the industrial licensing service. Which is a document issued by the Ministry in accordance with the Unified Industrial Organization Law (System) of the Gulf Cooperation Council countries, which allows the establishment of an industrial project according to specific stages and mechanisms that the Ministry takes care of investors from establishment, to construction, then production.

Expansion and Growth: The industrial license represents a solid foundation for any future expansion plans. As your business grows, you will find that having a valid and updated license simplifies the process of adding new product lines, or expanding into other markets.
Investment protection: The license ensures that your investment is protected by providing an organized work environment, and makes it easier for you to settle any disputes that may arise in the future.

Complexities of industrial licensing Why do you need specialized experience?

Despite its importance, the process of obtaining an industrial license can be complex and requires in-depth knowledge of changing regulations and procedures. From precisely defining the industrial activity, to fulfilling the technical and environmental conditions, to preparing the required documents from multiple entities such as the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources, the Ministry of Environment, and the Saudi Authority for Industrial Estates and Technology Zones (MODON), all the way to following up on the application and responding to inquiries, all of this requires time, effort, and specialized expertise.

Any error in submitting the application, lack of documents, or lack of accurate understanding of the requirements may lead to a significant delay in obtaining the industrial license, causing you financial losses and affecting your timeline.

Municipal license in case of outside industrial cities.
Cities Authority lease contract in the case of industrial cities.
A copy of the environmental license.
Employment edition of the Labor Office.
A copy of the civil defense permit.
Investment license if the investment is foreign or joint.
A valid spatial license/contract from the entities designated for the sites.
Energy allocation from the Department of Energy.

Submit a status upgrade request on the Senaei platform
Safety and environment for operation from the competent authorities
The commercial register must be valid and with an industrial license.
